# SSM XBRL Taxonomy — Field Descriptions

Source: SSMxT 2022v1.0 (MFRS financial statements taxonomy)

This document lists all XBRL elements from the SSM taxonomy,
grouped by financial statement, with their labels and documentation descriptions.

---

## Table of Contents

- [Scope of Filing](#scope-of-filing)
- [Disclosures — Stock Exchange](#disclosures-stock-exchange)
- [Directors' Report & Statements](#directors-report-&-statements)
- [Auditors' Report](#auditors-report)
- [SOFP — Statement of Financial Position](#sofp-statement-of-financial-position)
- [SOPL — Statement of Profit or Loss](#sopl-statement-of-profit-or-loss)
- [SOCI — Statement of Comprehensive Income](#soci-statement-of-comprehensive-income)
- [SOCF — Statement of Cash Flows](#socf-statement-of-cash-flows)
- [SOCIE — Statement of Changes in Equity](#socie-statement-of-changes-in-equity)
- [Notes to Financial Statements](#notes-to-financial-statements)
- [Other](#other)
- [Ungrouped Elements](#ungrouped-elements)

---

## Summary Statistics

- Total elements documented: **8845**
- Total unique labels: **9280**
- Total unique descriptions: **8117**
- Presentation roles (MFRS): **25**
- Statement groups: **11**

---

## Scope of Filing

### [020000] Scope of filing

**Approved Application From The Registrar Or Minister [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_ApprovedApplicationFromRegistrarOrMinisterAbstract`

**Business 1 [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BusinessOneMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to business one of the entity.

**Business 2 [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BusinessTwoMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to business two of the entity.

**Business 3 [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BusinessThreeMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to business three of the entity.

**Changes From Subsequent XBRL Financial Statements Filing [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_ChangesFromSubsequentXBRLFinancialStatementFilingAbstract`

**Date of circulation of financial statements and reports to members**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfCirculationOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsToMembers`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date on which the financial statements and reports are circulated to members.

**Date of financial statements and reports of the directors and auditors (if applicable) laid in annual general meeting**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsOfDirectorsAndAuditorsLaidInAnnualGeneralMeeting`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date of tabling financial statements and reports of the directors and auditors in the annual general meeting.

**Date of financial statements approved by Board of Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfFinancialStatementsApprovedByBoardOfDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which the financial statements has been approved by the Board of Directors.

**Date of Statutory Declaration**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfStatutoryDeclaration`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date of which the Statutory Declaration prepared together with the financial statements and reports for the purposes of Companies Act 2016.

**Description of business**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOfBusiness`
- Description: Represents information pertaining description of business during the financial year.

**Description on whether company changed the duration of financial reporting period**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherCompanyChangedDurationOfFinancialReportingPeriod`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure on whether company changed the duration of financial reporting period.

**Description on whether company had applied any exemption, waiver, relief or extension of time with regards to annual return or financial statements and reports to Minister**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedAnyExemptionWaiverReliefOrExtensionOfTimeWithRegardsToFinancialStatementsAndReportsOrAnnualReturnToMinister`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied any exemption, waiver, relief or extension of time with regards to annual return or financial statements and reports to Minister.

**Description on whether company had applied for any exemption, waiver, relief or extension of time with regards to annual return or financial statements and reports from Registrar or Minister**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForAnyExemptionWaiverReliefOrExtensionOfTimeWithRegardToAnnualReturnOrFinancialStatementsAndReportsFromRegistrarOrMinister`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for any exemption, waiver, relief or extension of time with regards to annual return or financial statements and reports from Registrar or Minister.

**Description on whether company had applied for exemption from coinciding foreign subsidiary financial year end with holding company**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForExemptionFromCoincidingForeignSubsidiaryFinancialYearEndWithHoldingCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for exemption from coinciding foreign subsidiary financial year end with holding company.

**Description on whether company had applied for extension of time for circulation and holding annual general meeting**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForExtensionOfTimeForHoldingAnnualGeneralMeeting`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for extension of time for circulation and holding annual general meeting.

**Description on whether company had applied for extension of time for circulation of financial statements and reports**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForExtensionOfTimeForCirculationOfFinancialStatementsAndReports`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for extension of time for circulation of financial statements and reports.

**Description on whether company had applied for extension of time to lodge annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForExtensionOfTimeToLodgeAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied  for extension of time to lodge annual return.

**Description on whether company had applied for extension of time to lodge financial statements and reports**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForExtensionOfTimeToLodgeFinancialStatementsAndReports`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for extension of time to lodge financial statements and reports.

**Description on whether company had applied for relief from requirements as to form and contents of Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForReliefFromRequirementsAsToFormAndContentsOfDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for relief from requirements as to form and contents of Director's report.

**Description on whether company had applied for relief from requirements as to form and contents of financial statements**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedForReliefFromRequirementsAsToFormAndContentsOfFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for relief from requirements as to form and contents of financial statements.

**Description on whether company had applied to waive lodgement of financial statements by foreign company**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedToWaiveLodgementOfForeignStatementsByForeignCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied to waive lodgement of financial statements by foreign company.

**Description on whether company had applied for exemption from filing financial statements and reports in full XBRL format.**
- Element: `ssmt_DescriptionOnWhetherCompanyHadAppliedFromFilingFinancialStatementsAndReportsInFullXBRLFormat`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description on whether company had applied for exemption from filing financial statements and reports in full XBRL format.

**Disclosure of the regulation applied during incorporation of the company**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfRegulationAppliedDuringIncorporationOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of regulation applied during incorporation of the company.

**Disclosure of whether company regulated by Bank Negara Malaysia at the financial year end**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfWhetherCompanyRegulatedByBankNegaraMalaysiaAtFinancialYearEnd`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of whether company is regulated by Bank Negara Malaysia at the financial year end.

**Disclosure on scope of filing [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnScopeOfFilingAbstract`

**Disclosure on whether company involved as management company under Interest Scheme Act 2016**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherCompanyInvolvedAsManagementCompanyUnderInterestSchemeAct2016`
- Description: Represents information pertaining involvement as management company under Interest Scheme.

**Disclosure on whether company's shares are traded on any official stock exchange**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherCompanysSharesAreTradedOnAnyOfficialStockExchange`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to whether company's shares are traded on any official stock exchange during the financial year.

**Disclosure on whether comparative period values are restated**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherComparativePeriodValuesAreRestated`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure on whether comparative period values are restated.

**Disclosure on whether opening statements changed due to changes in accounting standards**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherOpeningStatementChangedDueToChangesInAccountingStandards`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure on whether opening statements changed due to changes in accounting standards.

**Disclosure on whether reclassification of previous financial statements changed due to changes in accounting standards**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnWhetherReclassificationOfPreviousFinancialStatementsChangedDueToChangesInAccountingStandards`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure on whether reclassification of previous financial statements changed due to changes in accounting standards.

**Method used for preparing Statement of Cash Flows**
- Element: `ssmt_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementOfCashFlows`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to method used for preparing statement of cash flows.

**Method used for preparing Statement of Comprehensive Income**
- Element: `ssmt_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementOfComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to method used for preparing statement of comprehensive income.

**Method used for preparing Statement of Financial Position**
- Element: `ssmt_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementOfFinancialPosition`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to method used for preparing statement of financial position.

**Method used for preparing Statement of Profit or Loss**
- Element: `ssmt_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementOfProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to method used for preparing statement of profit or loss.

**MSIC Code**
- Element: `ssmt_MSICCode`
- Description: Represents information pertaining MSIC code.

**Nature of business [axis]**
- Element: `ssmt_NatureOfBusinessAxis`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to classification of nature of business.

**Nature of business [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt_NatureOfBusinessLineItems`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to nature of business of the entity.

**Nature of business [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_NatureOfBusinessMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to classification of nature of business.

**Nature of business [table]**
- Element: `ssmt_NatureOfBusinessTable`
- Description: Classification of nature of business.

**Particulars of Financial Statements and Reports [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_ParticularsOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsAbstract`

**Principal activities of business [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DetailsOfPrincipalActivitiesOfBusinessAbstract`

## Disclosures — Stock Exchange

### [110000] Disclosure - Involvement in Stock Exchange

**Date of company listed in Stock Exchange**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfCompanyListedOnStockExchange`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date on which company is listed on Stock Exchange.

**Date of delisting of shares**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfDelistingOfShares`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which shares are delisted.

**Disclosure of foreign stock exchange**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfForeignStockExchange`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of foreign stock exchange on which company is listed.

**Disclosure of foreign stock exchange which the company were delisted**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfForeignStockExchangeWhichCompanyWereDelisted`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of foreign stock exchange o which company's shares are delisted.

**Disclosure of securities listing on Shari’ah compliant Securities list**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfSecuritiesListingOnShariahCompliantSecuritiesList`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of securities listed on Shari'ah compliant securities list.

**Disclosure on involvement in stock exchange [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnInvolvementInStockExchangeAbstract`

**Explanation of other securities listed on Shari’ah compliant Securities list**
- Element: `ssmt_ExplanationOfOtherSecuritiesListedOnShariahComplaintSecuritiesList`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to explanation of other securities listed on Shari'ah compliant securities list.

**Type of exchange from which shares were delisted**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfExchangeFromWhichSharesWereDelisted`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of stock exchange from which shares are delisted.

**Type of exchange on which company is listed**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfExchangeOnWhichCompanyIsListed`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of stock exchange on which company is listed.

**Type of market listed in Bursa Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfMarketListedOnBursaMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of market listed in Bursa Malaysia.

---

## Directors' Report & Statements

### [120000] Disclosure - Directors report

**Date of signing director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfSigningDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which director's report is signed.

**Director's Report [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DirectorsReportAbstract`

**Disclosure of contingent or other liability being enforceable within twelve months after the end of financial year**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfContingentOrOtherLiabilityBeingEnforceableWithinTwelveMonthsAfterEndOfFinancialYear`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of contingent or other liability being enforceable within twelve months after the end of financial year.

**Disclosure of Director's Report [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfDirectorsReportExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of director's report.

**Disclosure of directors received or become entitled to receive other benefits by reason of contract made by company or related corporation**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfDirectorsReceivedOrBecomeEntitledToReceiveOtherBenefitsByReasonOfContractMadeByCompanyOrRelatedCorporation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of directors received or become entitled to receive other benefits by reason of contract made by company or related corporation.

**Disclosure of occurrence of any substantial, material or unusual in nature items, transactions or events**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfOccurenceOfAnySubstantialMaterialOrUnusualInNatureItemsTransactionsOrEvents`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of occurrence of any substantial, material or unusual in nature items, transactions or events.

**Disclosure of status of dividend (final dividend)**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfStatusOfDividend`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of status of final dividend.

**Disclosure on directors report [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnDirectorsReportAbstract`

**Identification number of the fifth director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of fifth director who signed director's report.

**Identification number of the first director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfFirstDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of first director who signed director's report.

**Identification number of the fourth director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfFourthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of fourth director who signed director's report.

**Identification number of the second director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfSecondDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of second director who signed director's report.

**Identification number of the third director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfThirdDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of third director who signed director's report.

**Name of fifth director who signed the director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of fifth director who signed director's report.

**Name of first director who signed Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFirstDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of first director who signed director's report.

**Name of fourth director who signed the director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFourthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of fourth director who signed director's report.

**Name of second director who signed the director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfSecondDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of second director who signed director's report.

**Name of third director who signed the director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfThirdDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of third director who signed director's report.

**Number of directors signing Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_NumberOfDirectorsSigningDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to  number of directors signing director's report.

**Type of identification of fifth director who signed Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of fifth director who signed director's report.

**Type of identification of first director who signed director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFirstDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`

**Type of identification of fourth director who signed Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFourthDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of fourth director who signed director's report.

- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfSecondDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`

- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfThirdDirectorWhoSignedDirectorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of third director who signed director's report.

### [120100] Disclosure - Statement by directors

**Date of signing statement by directors**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfSigningStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which Statement by Directors is signed.

**Disclosure of directors opinion that the financial statements or consolidated financial statements are drawn up in accordance with approved accounting standards and reflect true and give true and fair view of financial position and performance of the company and the group**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfDirectorsOpinionThatFinancialStatementsOrConsolidatedFinancialStatementsAreDrawnInAccordanceWithAccountingStandards`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of directors opinion that the financial statements or where applicable the consolidated financial statements is or are drawn up in accordance with approved accounting standards, to give a true and fair view of financial position and performance of the company and of the group.

**Disclosure of Statement by Directors [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfStatementByDirectorsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of statement by  directors.

**Disclosure on statement by directors [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnStatementByDirectorsAbstract`

- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure whether the fifth director is primarily responsible for financial management of the company.

- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureWhetherFirstDirectorIsAlsoPrimarilyResponsibleForFinancialManagementOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure whether the first director is primarily responsible for financial management of the company.

- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure whether the second director is primarily responsible for financial management of the company.

**Disclosure whether the third director is also primarily responsible for financial management of the company**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureWhetherThirdDirectorIsAlsoPrimarilyResponsibleForFinancialManagementOfTheCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure whether the third director is primarily responsible for financial management of the company.

- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`

**Identification number of fourth director who signed Statement by Directors**

- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of fourth director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Identification number of other person primarily responsible for financial management of the company**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfOtherPersonPrimarilyResponsibleForFinancialManagementOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to identification number of other person who is primarily responsible for financial  management of the company.

**Identification number of second director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_IdentificationNumberOfSecondDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`

- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of fifth director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Name of first director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFirstDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of first director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Name of fourth director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfFourthDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of fourth director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Name of other person primarily responsible for financial management of the company**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfOtherPersonPrimarilyResponsibleForFinancialStatementsOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of other person primarily responsible for financial management of the company.

**Name of second director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfSecondDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of second director who signed Statement by Directors.

- Element: `ssmt_NameOfThirdDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`

- Element: `ssmt_NumberOfDirectorsSigningStatementByDirectors`

- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfDirectorsAbstract`

**Type of identification of fifth director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFifthDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of fifth director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Type of identification of first director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFirstDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of first director who signed Statement by Directors.

**Type of identification of fourth director who signed Statement by Directors**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfFourthDirectorWhoSignedStatementByDirectors`

**Company's employees**
- Element: `ssmt_CompanysEmployees`
- Description: Represents option pertaining to disclosure of business review on company's employees.

- Element: `ssmt_DetailsOfCompanyEmployeesAbstract`

- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfBusinessReviewEitherOnEnvironmentEmployeesOrSocialAndCommunityIssues`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of business review either on environmental, employees or social and community issues.

**Disclosure of other business review applied**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfOtherBusinessReviewApplied`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other business review that not pertaining to environmental, employees or social and community issues.

**Disclosure of statement by directors for business review [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfStatementByDirectorsForBusinessReviewExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of statement by directors for business review.

**Disclosure on directors business review [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnDirectorsBusinessReviewAbstract`

**Environmental matters**
- Element: `ssmt_EnvironmentalMatters`
- Description: Represents option pertaining to disclosure of business review on environmental matters.

**Number of employees**
- Element: `ssmt_NumberOfEmployees`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to number of employees as of reporting date.

**Others**
- Element: `ssmt_Others`
- Description: Represents option pertaining to disclosure of business review on other issues.

**Social and community issues**
- Element: `ssmt_SocialAndCommunityIssues`
- Description: Represents option pertaining to disclosure of business review on social and community issues.

## Auditors' Report

### [130000] Disclosure - Auditors report to members

**Address line 1**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOne`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address one of audit firm.

**Address line 2**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressTwo`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address two of audit firm.

**Address line 3**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressThree`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address three of audit firm.

**Auditor's report [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditorsReportAbstract`
- Description: Mewakili maklumat berkaitan pendedahan laporan juruaudit kepada ahli.

**Auditors count [axis]**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditorsCountAxis`

**Auditors information [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditorsInformationAbstract`

**Auditors information [line item]**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditorsInformationLineitem`

**Auditors information [Table]**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditorsInformationTable`

**Date of signing auditor's report**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfSigningAuditorsReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which auditor's report is signed.

**Detailed address of audit firm [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DetailedAddressOfAuditFirmAbstract`

**Details of audit firm [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DetailsOfAuditFirmAbstract`

**Details of auditors signing report [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DetailsOfAuditorsSigningReportAbstract`

**Disclosure of auditor's report to members [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOfAuditorsReportToMembersExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of auditor's report to members.

**Disclosure on auditors report to members [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnAuditorsReportToMembersAbstract`

**License number of auditor**
- Element: `ssmt_LicenseNumberOfAuditor`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to license number of auditor as at the reporting date.

**Name of audit firm**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of audit firm.

**Name of auditor signing report**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfAuditorSigningReport`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of auditor signing the auditor's report.

**Postcode**
- Element: `ssmt_PostcodeOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to postcode where audit firm is located.

**Registration number of audit firm**
- Element: `ssmt_RegistrationNumberOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to registration number of audit firm.

**State**
- Element: `ssmt_StateWhereAuditFirmIsLocated`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to state where audit firm is located.

**Town**
- Element: `ssmt_TownWhereAuditFirmIsLocated`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to town where audit firm is located.

**Type of auditor's opinion**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfAuditorsOpinion`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of auditor's opinion.

## SOFP — Statement of Financial Position

### [210000] Statement of financial position, by current/non-current method

**Assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Assets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of assets held by the reporting entity. Assets are resources: a. controlled by an entity as a result of past events; and b. from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

**Assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAbstract`

**Cash and bank balances**
- Element: `ssmt_CashAndBankBalances`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash comprises of cash on hand and demand deposits and cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and that are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

**Consolidated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the financial statements of a group in which the assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses and cash flows of the parent and its subsidiaries are presented as those of a single economic entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Consolidated and separate financial statements' axis if no other member is used.

**Consolidated and separate financial statements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedAndSeparateFinancialStatementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify an asset as current when: a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in its normal operating cycle; b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting period; or d. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in MFRS 107) unless the asset is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period.

**Current assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAssetsAbstract`

**Current assets other than non-current assets or disposal groups classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAssetsOtherThanAssetsOrDisposalGroupsClassifiedAsHeldForSaleOrAsHeldForDistributionToOwners`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets other than assets held for sale held by the reporting entity.

**Current biological assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current portion of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

**Current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentContractAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of the reporting entity’s right to consideration in exchange for goods or services that the entity has transferred to a customer when that right is conditioned on something other than the passage of time (for example, the entity’s future performance).

**Current contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentContractLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of the reporting entity’s obligation to transfer goods or services to a customer for which the entity has received consideration (or the amount is due) from the customer.

**Current derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

**Current derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

**Current finance lease liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentFinanceLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of present value of the lease payments that are not paid at that date.

**Current investments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInvestments`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

**Current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify a liability as current when: a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating cycle; b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading; c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting period; or d. it does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not affect its classification. An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

**Current liabilities [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLiabilitiesAbstract`

**Current liabilities other than liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLiabilitiesOtherThanLiabilitiesIncludedInDisposalGroupsClassifiedAsHeldForSale`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities other than liabilities held for sale held by the reporting entity.

**Current portion of non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPortionOfLongtermBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay within a period of 12 months.

**Current provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentProvisions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of liabilities with uncertain timing or amount.

**Current provisions for employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentProvisionsForEmployeeBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

**Current tax assets, current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxAssetsCurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate excess amount already paid in respect of current tax for current and prior periods over the amount due for those periods.

**Current tax liabilities, current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxLiabilitiesCurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current tax for current and prior periods shall, to the extent unpaid, be recognized as a liability.

**Deferred tax assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income taxes recoverable in future periods in respect of:a. deductible temporary differences;b. the carryforward of unused tax losses; andc. the carryforward of unused tax credits.

**Deferred tax liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income taxes payable in future periods in respect of taxable temporary differences.

**Disclosure on statement of financial position [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_DisclosureOnStatementOfFinancialPositionAbstract`

**Equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Equity`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

**Equity [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityAbstract`

**Equity and liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityAndLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity and liabilities held by the reporting entity. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities. Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

**Equity and liabilities [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityAndLiabilitiesAbstract`

**Equity attributable to owners of parent**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityAttributableToOwnersOfParent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity attributable to owners.

**Intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.

**Inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoriesTotal`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of inventories which are: a. held for sale in the ordinary course of business; b. in the process of production for such sale; or c. in the form of materials or supplies to be consumed in the production process or in the rendering of services. Inventories encompass goods purchased and held for resale including, for example, merchandise purchased by a retailer and held for resale, or land and other property held for resale. Inventories also encompass finished goods produced, or work in progress being produced, by the entity and include materials and supplies awaiting use in the production process. In the case of a service provider, inventories include the costs of the service, for which the entity has not yet recognized the related revenue.

**Investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentProperty`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of properties (land or a building—or part of a building—or both) held (by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease) to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, rather than for:a.  use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; orb.  sale in the ordinary course of business.

**Investments in associates reported in separate financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities, over which the investor has significant influence.

**Investments in joint ventures reported in separate financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of joint arrangements whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

**Investments in subsidiaries reported in separate financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities controlled by another entity.

**Issued capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuedCapital`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Liabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of liabilities held by the reporting entity.Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

**Liabilities [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LiabilitiesAbstract`

**Liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LiabilitiesIncludedInDisposalGroupsClassifiedAsHeldForSale`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

**Non-controlling interests**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity in subsidiaries not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

**Non-current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current assets held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify an asset as current when: a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in MFRS 107) unless the asset is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. An entity shall classify all other assets as non-current.

**Non-current assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentAssetsAbstract`

**Non-current assets or disposal groups classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentAssetsOrDisposalGroupsClassifiedAsHeldForSaleOrAsHeldForDistributionToOwners`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise,together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

**Non-current biological assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NoncurrentBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of non-current portion of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

**Non-current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentContractAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of the reporting entity’s right to consideration in exchange for goods or services that the entity has transferred to a customer when that right is conditioned on something other than the passage of time (for example, the entity’s future performance).

**Non-current contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentContractLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of the reporting entity’s obligation to transfer goods or services to a customer for which the entity has received consideration (or the amount is due) from the customer.

**Non-current derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentDerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’). b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

**Non-current derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

**Non-current finance lease liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NoncurrentFinanceLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of present value of the lease payments that are not paid at that date.

**Non-current investments other than investments accounted for using equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentInvestmentsOtherThanInvestmentsAccountedForUsingEquityMethod`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

**Non-current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current liabilities held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify a liability as current when: a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating cycle; b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading; c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting period; or d. it does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not affect its classification. An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

**Non-current liabilities [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentLiabilitiesAbstract`

**Non-current portion of non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LongtermBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay after a period of 12 months or more.

**Non-current provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentProvisions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of liabilities with uncertain timing or amount.

**Non-current provisions for employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentProvisionsForEmployeeBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

**Non-current service concession assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NoncurrentServiceConcessionAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of infrastructure items to which the operator is given access by the grantor for the purposes of the  service arrangement are not recognized as property, plant and equipment of the operator. The grantor may also provide other items to the operator that the operator can keep or deal with as it wishes. If such assets form part of the consideration payable by the grantor for the services, they are not government grants as defined in MFRS 120. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition.

**Non-current service concession liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NoncurrentServiceConcessionLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of infrastructure items to which the operator is given access by the grantor for the purposes of service arrangement are not recognized as property, plant and equipment of the operator. The grantor may also provide other items to the operator that the operator can keep or deal with as it wishes. If such assets form part of the consideration payable by the grantor for the services, they are not government grants. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition. The operator shall recognize a liability in respect of unfulfilled obligations it has assumed in exchange for the assets.

**Other components of equity**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherComponentsOfEquity`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other reserves not attributable to owners.

**Other current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherCurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Other current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherCurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Other non-current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Other non-current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Other reserves**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherReserves`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

**Property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of property, plant and equipment which are tangible items that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

**Retained earnings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarnings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the reporting entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

**Right-of-use assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RightofuseAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contracts which is, or contains, a lease if the contract conveys the right to control the use of an identified asset for a period of time in exchange for consideration.

**Separate [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SeparateMember`
- Description: This member stands for separate financial statements. Separate financial statements are those presented by an entity in which the entity could elect, subject to the requirements in IAS 27, to account for its investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates either at cost, in accordance with IFRS 9, or using the equity method as described in IAS 28.

**Statement of financial position [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfFinancialPositionAbstract`

**Statement of financial position [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfFinancialPositionLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of financial position [table]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfFinancialPositionTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to financial position.

**Trade and other current payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherCurrentPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

**Trade and other current receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

**Trade and other non-current payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

**Trade and other non-current receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncurrentReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of nontrade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

**Treasury shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TreasuryShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity instruments of the reporting entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.

### [210100] Sub-classification of assets, liabilities and equity, by current/non-current method

**Accruals**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentNontradeAccruals`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

**Accruals**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NoncurrentNontradeAccruals`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

**Accrued income**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentAccruedIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current amounts of income for work that has been done but not yet invoiced.

**Aircraft**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Aircraft`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of aeroplanes, helicopters, or other machines capable of flight.

**Balances with banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BalancesWithBanks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash held in accounts with licensed banks.

**Bearer biological assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BearerBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of bearer biological assets other than bearer plants.

**Bearer plants**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BearerPlants`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of living plants that:a. is used in the production or supply of agricultural produce;b. is expected to bear produce for more than one period; andc. has a remote likelihood of being sold as agricultural produce, except for incidental scrap sales.

**Biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

**Biological assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BiologicalAssetsAbstract`

**Brand names**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BrandNames`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of name given by the maker to a product or range of products, especially a trademark.

**Building on freehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BuildingOnFreeholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on permanent and absolute tenure of land with freedom to dispose of it at will.

**Building on long term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BuildingOnLongtermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

**Building on short term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BuildingOnShorttermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

**Building under construction**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentPropertyBuildingUnderConstruction`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of building under construction. If an entity determines that the fair value of an investment property under construction is not reliably measurable but expects the fair value of the property to be reliably measurable when construction is complete, it shall measure that investment property under construction at cost until either its fair value becomes reliably measurable or construction is completed (whichever is earlier).

**Buildings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Buildings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of buildings.

**Buildings [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BuildingAbstract`

**Capital from non-redeemable preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CapitalFromNonredeemablePreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Capital from ordinary shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CapitalFromOrdinaryShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Capital from redeemable preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CapitalFromRedeemablePreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Capital reserve**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CapitalReserve`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

**Cash**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Cash`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash.

**Cash [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CashAbstract`

**Cash and bank balances**
- Element: `ssmt_CashAndBankBalances`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash comprises of cash on hand and demand deposits and cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and that are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

**Cash and cash equivalents [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CashAndCashEquivalentsAbstract`

**Cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CashEquivalents`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash equivalents.

**Cash equivalents [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CashEquivalentsAbstract`

**Cash equivalents with other financial institutions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CashEquivalentsWithOtherFinancialInstitutions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments with other financial institutions that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

**Cash on hand**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CashOnHand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money and notes, kept to pay small amounts but not deposited in the bank.

**Computer software**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ComputerSoftware`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of programmes and other operating information used by a computer.

**Computer software and hardware**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ComputerSoftwareAndHardware`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the programmes and other operating information used by a computer and the machines, wiring, and other physical components of a computer or other electronic system.

**Consolidated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the financial statements of a group in which the assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses and cash flows of the parent and its subsidiaries are presented as those of a single economic entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Consolidated and separate financial statements' axis if no other member is used.

**Consolidated and separate financial statements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedAndSeparateFinancialStatementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Consolidation reserve**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ConsolidatedReserve`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

**Construction in progress**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConstructionInProgress`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of long-term asset account in which the costs of constructing long-term assets are recorded.

**Consumable biological assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ConsumableBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of consumable biological assets.

**Contributions to subsidiaries, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ContributionsToSubsidiariesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contributions to subsidiaries which are amounts that entity does not expect repayment in the foreseeable future and are considered as part of the entity’s investment in the subsidiaries.

**Copyrights, patents and other industrial property rights, service and operating rights**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CopyrightsPatentsAndOtherIndustrialPropertyRightsServiceAndOperatingRights`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the exclusive and assignable legal right, given to the originator for a fixed number of years, to print, publish, perform, film, or record literary, artistic, or musical material and rights or titles for a set period, especially the sole right to exclude others from making, using, or selling an invention.

**Current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current borrowings.

**Current borrowings [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentBorrowingsAbstract`

**Current cash-settled share-based payment liability**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentCashSettledShareBasedPaymentLiability`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of goods or services acquired and the liability incurred at the fair value of the liability. Until the liability is settled, the entity shall remeasure the fair value of the liability at the end of each reporting period and at the date of settlement, with any changes in fair value recognized in profit or loss for the period.

**Current defined benefit plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

**Current defined contribution plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDefinedContributionPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Current derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

**Current derivative financial assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsAbstract`

**Current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial assets forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

**Current derivative financial assets options**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

**Current derivative financial assets others**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsOthers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current derivatives financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial assets swaps**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsSwaps`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

**Current derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

**Current derivative financial liabilities [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitesAbstract`

**Current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

**Current derivative financial liabilities forward contract used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContractUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

**Current derivative financial liabilities options**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

**Current derivative financial liabilities options used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptionsUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

**Current derivative financial liabilities others**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial liabilities others used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthersUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other derivatives used for hedging not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial liabilities swap**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesSwap`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

**Current derivative financial liabilities swap used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesSwapUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

**Current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives used for hedging.

**Current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossAbstract`

**Current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossAbstract`

**Current derivatives used for hedging [abstract]**
