- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of tax paid on gain on disposal of discontinued operation which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

**Withdrawal of bank deposits**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WithdrawalOfBankDeposits`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bank deposits withdrawn or placed which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Withdrawal of securities pledged for borrowings**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WithdrawalOfSecuritiesPledgedForBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of securities pledged for borrowings withdrawn or placed. A pledged asset is transferred to a lender for the purpose of securing debt which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Write back of expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WriteBackOfExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of expenses written back to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Write-down of trade and other receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WritedownsOfTradeAndOtherReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  trade and receivables written off to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. Write off of receivable is an elimination of an uncollectable accounts receivable balance recorded on the general ledger.

**Write-downs (reversals of write-downs) of inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WritedownsReversalsOfInventories`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  inventories written off to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Write-downs (reversals of write-downs) of property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WritedownsReversalsOfPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of write-offs of property, plant and equipment to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Writedowns (reversals) of assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WritedownsReversalsOfAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum assets written off.

**Writedowns (reversals) of intangible assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WritedownsReversalsOfIntangibleAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  write offs of intangible assets which are identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance, to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Writedowns (reversals) of investments**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WritedownsReversalsOfInvestments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  write offs of investments to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. An interest in another entity refers to contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

**Writedowns (reversals) of other financial assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WritedownsReversalsOfOtherFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other financial assets written off not reported elsewhere in the statement. An entity shall directly reduce the gross carrying amount of a financial asset when the entity has no reasonable expectations of recovering a financial asset in its entirety or a portion there of.

**WriteOff of assets [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WriteOffOfAssetsAbstract`

---

## SOCIE — Statement of Changes in Equity

### [610000] Statement of Changes in Equity

**Capital reserve [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CapitalReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

**Changes in equity [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ChangesInEquityAbstract`

**Components of equity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ComponentsOfEquityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total comprehensive income which refers to the change in equity during a period resulting from transactions and other events, other than those changes resulting from transactions with owners in their capacity as owners.Total comprehensive income comprises all component of "profit or loss" and of "other comprehensive income".

**Comprehensive income [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ComprehensiveIncomeAbstract`

**Consolidated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the financial statements of a group in which the assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses and cash flows of the parent and its subsidiaries are presented as those of a single economic entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Consolidated and separate financial statements' axis if no other member is used.

**Consolidated and separate financial statements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedAndSeparateFinancialStatementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Consolidation reserve [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ConsolidatedReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

**Contributions by and distributions to owners [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ContributionsByAndDistributionsToOwnersAbstract`

**Disclosure of changes in equity [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfChangesInEquityAbstract`

**Dividends recognised as distributions to owners**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DividendsPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend paid which refers to the distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

**Equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Equity`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

**Equity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sum of equity.

**Equity attributable to owners of parent [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EquityAttributableToOwnersOfParentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sum of equity attributable to owners.

**Equity balance restated**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_EquityBalanceRestated`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of components of equity considered as opening balances after taking into account the impact of changes in accounting policies in current reporting period. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

**Equity, others components [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherComponentsOfEquityMember`
- Description: This member stands for other reserves not attributable to owners.

**Fair value reserve [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_FairValueAdjustmentReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the fair value reserves.Fair value is the price that would be received to sellan asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date.

**Foreign currency translation reserve [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ForeignCurrencyTranslationReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount that comprises all foreign currency differences arising from the translation of the financial statements of subsidiaries whose functional currencies are different from that of the Company’s functional currency as well as foreign currency differences arising from the translation of monetary items that are considered to form part of a net investment in a foreign operation.

**Impact of changes in accounting policies**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ImpactOfChangeInAccountingStandards`
- Description: Report the value, as for the reporting period, of impact of changes in accounting policies. An entity shall present a statement of changes in equity as required. The statement of changes in equity includes each component of equity, the effects of retrospective application or retrospective restatement recognised in accordance with MFRS 108.

**Increase (decrease) in equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ChangesInEquity`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of increase (decrease) in equity.

**Increase (decrease) through acquisition of subsidiary, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughAcquisitionOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of acquisition or dilution of equity interest in subsidiaries. A parent shall present non-controlling interests in the consolidated statement of financial position within equity, separately from the equity of the ownersof the parent.

**Increase (decrease) through conversion of convertible instruments, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughConversionOfConvertibleInstruments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of conversion of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stock (ICULS). ICULS is a type of security that can be used to purchase underlying common shares.

**Increase (decrease) through other changes, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTransfersAndOtherChangesEquity`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from other changes not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Increase (decrease) through share-based payment transactions, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughSharebasedPaymentTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from share-based payment transactions. A share-based payment transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services as consideration for its own      equity instruments (including shares or share options), orb. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle      the transaction with the supplier.

**Increase (decrease) through transactions with owners, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTransactionsWithOwners`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other transactions with owners not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Increase (decrease) through treasury share transactions, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTreasuryShareTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of treasury shares transactions. If an entity reacquires its own equity instruments, those instruments (‘treasury shares’) shall be deducted from equity. No gain or loss shall be recognised in profit or loss on the purchase, sale, issue or cancellation of an entity’s own equity instruments. Such treasury shares may be acquired and held by the entity or by other members of the consolidated group. Consideration paid or received shall be recognised directly in equity.

**Issue of convertible instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssueOfConvertibleInstruments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of convertible notes (or bonds or debts) which is a type of debt security that can be converted into a predetermined amount of the underlying company's equity at certain times during the bond's life, usually at the discretion of the bondholder.

**Issue of equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssueOfEquity`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of shares which refers to the new allotment of shares during the reporting period.

**Issued capital [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuedCapitalMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of issued capital. Issued capital include ordinary shares, redeemable preference shares and non-redeemable preference shares.

**Non-controlling interests [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NoncontrollingInterestsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing equity in subsidiaries not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

**Other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total other comprehensive income which comprises items of income and expense (including reclassification adjustments) that are not recognized in profit or loss as required or permitted by other MFRSs.

**Other distributable reserves [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherDistributableReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of other distributable reserves apart from those disclosed seperately.

**Other non-distributable reserves [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherNondistributableReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of other non-distributable reserves apart from those reported in this section.

**Other reserves [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherReservesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the total amount of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

**Profit (loss)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProfitLoss`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

**Reserve of gains and losses on hedging instruments that hedge investments in equity instruments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnHedgingInstrumentsThatHedgeInvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing hedging reserves.Derivatives are financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics.a. its value changes in      response to the change in      a specified interest rate,      financial instrument price,      commodity price, foreign      exchange rate, index of      prices or rates, credit      rating or credit index, or      other variable, provided in      the case of a non financial      variable that the variable      is not specific to a party to      the contract (sometimes      called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net      investment or an initial      net investment that is      smaller than would be      required for other types of      contracts that would be      expected to have a similar      response to changes in      market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

**Reserve of non-current assets classified as held for sale [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ReserveOfNoncurrentAssetsClassifiedAsHeldForSaleMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the aggregate of reserves of non-current assets classified as held for sale.

**Reserve of share-based payments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfSharebasedPaymentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the goods or services received in an equity settled share-based payment transaction.

**Retained earnings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarningsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the net profit available for distibution, less any distribution made.

**Revaluation surplus [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevaluationSurplusMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the increase in carrying amount as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

**Separate [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SeparateMember`
- Description: This member stands for separate financial statements. Separate financial statements are those presented by an entity in which the entity could elect, subject to the requirements in IAS 27, to account for its investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates either at cost, in accordance with IFRS 9, or using the equity method as described in IAS 28.

**Statement of changes in equity [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementOfChangesInEquityAbstract`

**Statement of changes in equity [line items]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementOfChangesInEquityLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of changes in equity [table]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementOfChangesInEquityTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to changes in equity.

**Statutory reserve [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatutoryReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of liquid assets that entity must hold in order to remain solvent and attain partial protection against a substantial investment loss, and holding reserves reduces the risk of insurance.Statutory reserves is a requirement of which banking institutions must maintain in their Statutory Reserves Accounts at the Bank Negara Malaysia, balances that are at least equal to the prescribed ratio of eligible liabilities.

**Sub-Total of distributable reserves [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_DistributableReservesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sub-total amount of distributable reserves from those disclosed seperately.

**Sub-total of non-distributable reserves [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_NonDistributableReservesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of sub-total of non-distributable reserves from those reported in this section.

**Treasury shares [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TreasurySharesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing equity instruments of the reporting entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.If an entity reacquires its own equity instruments, those instruments (‘treasury shares’) shall be deducted from equity. No gain or loss shall be recognised in profit or loss on the purchase, sale, issue or cancellation of an entity’s own equity instruments. Such treasury shares may be acquired and held by the entity or by other members of the consolidated group. Consideration paid or received shall be recognised directly in equity.

**Warrant reserve [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WarrantReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing from issuing share purchase  warrants, other than those resulting from share-based payment arrangements.

**Warranty reserve [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WarrantyReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

---

## Notes to Financial Statements

### [710000] Notes - Corporate information

**Corporate information [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_CorporateInformationAbstract`

**Disclosure of corporate information [textblock]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfCorporateInformationExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to corporate information of the entity.An entity shall disclose the following, if not disclosed elsewhere in information published with the financial statements:a. the domicile and legal form of the entity, its country of     incorporation and the address of its registered office (or     principal place of business, if different from the registered     office);b. a description of the nature of the entity’s operations and its     principal activities;c. the name of the parent and the ultimate parent of the group;     andd. if it is a limited life entity, information regarding the length of     its life.

**Disclosure on corporate information [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOnCorporateInformationAbstract`

**Explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures [textblock]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ExplanationOfReasonsForReclassificationOfPreviousFinancialStatementsFiguresExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures of the entity.If an entity changes the presentation or classification of items in its financial statements, it shall reclassify comparative amounts unless reclassification is impracticable. When an entity reclassifies comparative amounts, it shall disclose (including as at the beginning of the preceding period):a. the nature of the reclassification;b. the amount of each item or class of items that is reclassified; andc. the reason for the reclassification.

**Explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures [textblock]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ExplanationOfReasonsForRestatementOfPreviousFinancialStatementsFiguresExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures of the entity.An entity shall disclose the following:a. the nature of the prior period error;b. for each prior period presented, to the extent practicable, the     amount of the correction:    i. for each financial statement line item affected; and   ii. if MFRS 133 applies to the entity, for basic and diluted         earnings per share;c. the amount of the correction at the beginning of the earliest    prior period presented; andd. if retrospective restatement is impracticable for a particular      prior period, the circumstances that led to the existence of that      condition and a description of how and from when the error      has been corrected.Financial statements of subsequent periods need not repeat these disclosures.

**Explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period [textblock]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ExplanationOfReasonsForUsingLongerOrShorterReportingPeriodExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period of the entity.An entity shall present a complete set of financial statements (including comparative information) at least annually. When an entity changes the end of its reporting period and presents financial statements for a period longer or shorter than one year, an entity shall disclose, in addition to the period covered by the financial statements:a. the reason for using a longer or shorter period, andb. the fact that amounts presented in the financial statements     are not entirely comparable.

**Financial reporting status [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_FinancialReportingStatusAbstract`

**Disclosure of fees for non-audit services provided by the Company's auditor and its member firms [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfFeesForNonAuditServicesProvidedByCompanysAuditorAndItsMemberFirmsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of fees for non-audit services provided by the company's auditor and its member firms.

**Disclosure of finance cost [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFinanceCostExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of finance costs.

**Disclosure of finance income [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFinanceIncomeExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of finance income.

**Disclosure of financial assets and liabilities that are measured at fair value [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfFinancialAssetsAndLiabilitiesThatAreMeasuredAtFairValueExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial assets at fair value through other comprehensive income.

**Disclosure of financial guarantees [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfFinancialGuaranteeExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial guarantees.

**Disclosure of financial instrument measured at amortised cost [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfFinancialInstrumentsMeasuredAtAmortisedCostExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial instrument (including financial assets and financial liabilities) measured at amortised cost.

**Disclosure of financial instruments [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFinancialInstrumentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial instruments including financial assets and financial liabilities.

**Disclosure of financial instruments at fair value through profit or loss [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFinancialInstrumentsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial instruments (including financial assets and financial liabilities) at fair value through profit or loss.

**Disclosure of financial instruments held for trading [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFinancialInstrumentsHeldForTradingExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial instruments held for trading.

**Disclosure of financial liabilities measured at amortised cost [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfFinancialLiabilitiesMeasuredAtAmortisedCostExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of financial liabilities measured at amortised cost.

**Disclosure of first-time adoption [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfFirstTimeAdoptionExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of first-time adoption.

**Disclosure of foreign currency translation reserve [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfForeignCurrencyTranslationReserveExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of foreign currency exchange risk.

**Disclosure of general information about financial statements [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfGeneralInformationAboutFinancialStatementsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of general information about financial statements.

**Disclosure of going concern [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfGoingConcernExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of going concern.

**Disclosure of grants and contributions [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfGrantsAndContributionsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of grants and contributions.

**Disclosure of gross profit [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfGrossProfitExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of gross profit.

**Disclosure of held to maturity investment [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfHeldToMaturityInvestmentExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of held to maturity investment.

**Disclosure of holding companies [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfHoldingCompaniesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of holding companies including the parent and the ultimate parent of the group.

**Disclosure of income tax [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfIncomeTaxExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of income tax expense including a reconciliation of tax expense.

**Disclosure of intangible assets and goodwill [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfIntangibleAssetsAndGoodwillExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of intangible assets and goodwill.

**Disclosure of interest in joint operation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfInterestInJointOperationsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of interest in joint operation.

**Disclosure of interest rate risk [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfInterestRateRiskExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of interest rate risk.

**Disclosure of interests in unconsolidated structured entities [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfInterestsInUnconsolidatedStructuredEntitiesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of interest in unconsolidated structured entities.

**Disclosure of inventories [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfInventoriesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of inventories.

**Disclosure of investment property [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfInvestmentPropertyExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of investment property.

**Disclosure of investments in associates [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfInvestmentInAssociateExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of investments in associates.

**Disclosure of investments in joint ventures [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfInvestmentInJointVentureExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of investments in joint ventures.

**Disclosure of investments in subsidiary companies [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfInvestmentInSubsidiaryCompaniesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of investments in subsidiaries.

**Disclosure of irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stocks [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfIrremedableConvertibleUnsecuredLoanStocksExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stocks.

**Disclosure of islamic financing facilities [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfIslamicFinancingFacilitiesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of islamic financing facilities.

**Disclosure of issued capital [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfIssuedCapitalExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of issued capital.

**Disclosure of key management personnel compensation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfKeyManagementPersonnelCompensationExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of key management personnel compensation including its directors.

**Disclosure of land held for development [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfLandHeldForDevelopmentExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of land held for development.

**Disclosure of lease prepayments [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfLeasePrepaymentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of lease prepayments.

**Disclosure of leases [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfLeasesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of leases such as finance lease and operating lease (both lessee and lessor).

**Disclosure of liquidity risk [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfLiquidityRiskExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of liquidity risk.

**Disclosure of list of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfListOfSubsidiariesJointVenturesAndAssociatesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of list of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates together with the details of the companies such as the name of company, place of incorporation, principal activities, effective equity interest etc.

**Disclosure of loans and advances to banks [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfLoansAndAdvancesToBanksExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of loans and advances to banks.

**Disclosure of loans and receivables [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfLoansAndReceivablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of loans and receivables.

**Disclosure of long term payables [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfLongTermPayablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of long term payables.

**Disclosure of long term receivables [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfLongTermReceivablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of long term receivables.

**Disclosure of maturity analysis under liquidity risk [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfMaturityAnalysisUnderLiquidityRiskExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of maturity analysis that form part of the disclosure requirement for liquidity risk.

**Disclosure of net asset value attributable to unit-holders [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfNetAssetValueAttributableToUnitholdersExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of net asset value attributable to unit-holders.

**Disclosure of net gains and losses arising from financial instruments [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfNetGainsAndLossesArisingFromFinancialInstrumentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of net gains and losses arising from financial instruments.

**Disclosure of non-controlling interests [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfNoncontrollingInterestsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of non-controlling interests.

**Disclosure of non-current assets held for sale and discontinued operations [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfNoncurrentAssetsHeldForSaleAndDiscontinuedOperationsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of non-current assets or disposal groups classified as held for sale.

**Disclosure of non-derivative financial instruments [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfNonderivativeFinancialInstrumentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of non-derivative financial assets/liabilities.

**Disclosure of non-executive director's fees [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfNonExecutiveDirectorsFeesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of non-executive Director's fees.

**Disclosure of notes and other explanatory information [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfNotesAndOtherExplanatoryInformationAbstract`

**Disclosure of other current assets [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherCurrentAssetsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other current assets.

- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherCurrentLiabilitiesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other current liabilities.

**Disclosure of other financial risk management [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherFinancialRiskManagementExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other financial risk management not disclosed elsewhere in the list of notes.

**Disclosure of other gains and losses [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherGainsAndLossesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other gains and losses.

**Disclosure of other guarantees [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherGuaranteesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other guarantees.

**Disclosure of other income [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherIncomeExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other income.

**Disclosure of other investments [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherInvestmentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other investments.

**Disclosure of other long term employment benefits [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherLongTermEmploymentBenefitsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other long term employment benefits.

**Disclosure of other market risk [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherMarketRiskExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other market risk not disclosed elsewhere in the list of notes.

**Disclosure of other non-current assets [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherNoncurrentAssetsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other non-current assets.

**Disclosure of other non-current liabilities [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherNoncurrentLiabilitiesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other non-current liabilities.

**Disclosure of other notes to accounts [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherNotesToAccountsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other notes to accounts not disclosed anywhere in the list of notes.

**Disclosure of other operating expense [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherOperatingExpenseExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other operating expense.

**Disclosure of other operating income [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherOperatingIncomeExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other operating income.

**Disclosure of other provisions [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfOtherProvisionsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other long term liabilities and provisions.

**Disclosure of other reserves [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfOtherReservesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other reserves including the capital reserve, translation reserve, hedging reserve, share option reserve, revaluation reserve and other non-distributable reserves.

**Disclosure of perpetual sukuk [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfPerpetualSukukExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of perpetual sukuk.

**Disclosure of post employment benefit obligation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfPostEmploymentBenefitObligationsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of post employment benefit obligation.

**Disclosure of price risk [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfPriceRiskExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of price risk.

**Disclosure of prior year adjustments [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfPriorPeriodAdjustmentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of prior year adjustments.

**Disclosure of profit after tax [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfProfitAfterTaxExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of profit after tax.

**Disclosure of profit before tax [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfProfitBeforeTaxExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of profit before tax.

**Disclosure of progress billings and others [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfProgressBillingAndOthersExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of progress billings and others.

**Disclosure of property development costs [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfPropertyDevelopmentCostsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of property development costs.

**Disclosure of property, plant and equipment [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfPropertyPlantAndEquipmentExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of property, plant and equipment.

**Disclosure of research and development expense [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfResearchAndDevelopmentExpenseExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of research and development expense.

**Disclosure of revenue from contracts with customers [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfRevenueFromContractsWithCustomersExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of revenue including the sale of goods, rendering of services, property development, construction contract and other income.

**Disclosure of service concession arrangements [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfServiceConcessionArrangementsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of service concession arrangements.

**Disclosure of share capital, reserves and other equity interest [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfShareCapitalReservesAndOtherEquityInterestExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of share capital including ordinary shares, preference shares etc.

**Disclosure of share-based payment arrangements [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfSharebasedPaymentArrangementsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of share-based payment arrangements.

**Disclosure of short term investments [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfShortTermInvestmentsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of short term investments.

**Disclosure of significant events during the financial year [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfSignificantEventsDuringFinancialYearExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of significant events during the financial year.

**Disclosure of statement of compliance [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfStatementOfComplianceExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of statement of compliance.

**Disclosure of supplementary financial information on the breakdown of realised and unrealised profits or losses [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfSupplementaryFinancialInformationOnBreakdownOfRealisedAndUnrealisedProfitOrLossesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of supplementary financial information on the breakdown of realised and unrealised profits or losses (note: this information is not prepared based on MFRS framework, and hence, should not be included as part of the financial statements).

**Disclosure of tax receivables and payables [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTaxReceivablesAndPayablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of tax receivables and payables.

**Disclosure of tax supplementary information [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfTaxSupplementaryInformationExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of tax supplementary information.

**Disclosure of the new or revised financial reporting standards not yet effective [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfNewOrRevisedFinancialReportingStandardsNotYetEffectiveExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of the new or revised financial reporting standards not yet effective.

**Disclosure of trade and other inventories [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOfTradeAndOtherInventoriesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of trade and other inventories.

**Disclosure of trade and other payables [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTradeAndOtherPayablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of trade and other payables.

**Disclosure of trade and other receivables [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTradeAndOtherReceivablesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of trade and other receivables.

**Disclosure of treasury shares [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTreasurySharesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of treasury shares.

### [740000] Notes - Issued capital

**Amount of other changes in shares issued and fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfOtherChangesInSharesIssuedAndFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued and fully paid which are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Amount of other changes in shares issued but not fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfOtherChangesInSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued but not fully paid.

**Amount of outstanding shares issued during financial year**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfOutstandingSharesIssuedDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued during the financial year.

**Amount of shares arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesArisingFromConversionOfICULSByMandatoryConversion`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion.

**Amount of shares arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesArisingFromConversionOfICULSBySurrenderOption`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option.

**Amount of shares issued and fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaidAbstract`

**Amount of shares issued and fully paid, issued during the period**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaidDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued during financial year.

**Amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaidOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares issued and fully paid.

**Amount of shares issued but not fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndNotFullyPaidAbstract`

**Amount of shares issued for cash under ESOS**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedForCashUnderESOS`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under ESOS.

**Amount of shares issued for cash under private placement**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedForCashUnderPrivatePlacement`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under private placement.

**Amount of shares outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding.

**Amount of shares outstanding [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesOutstandingAbstract`

**Classes of share capital [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ClassesOfShareCapitalAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Consolidated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the financial statements of a group in which the assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses and cash flows of the parent and its subsidiaries are presented as those of a single economic entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Consolidated and separate financial statements' axis if no other member is used.

**Consolidated and separate financial statements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedAndSeparateFinancialStatementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Disclosure of classes of share capital [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfClassesOfShareCapitalAbstract`

**Disclosure of classes of share capital [line items]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfClassesOfShareCapitalLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Disclosure of classes of share capital [table]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfClassesOfShareCapitalTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to classes of share capital.

**Disclosure of classes of share capital [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfClassesOfShareCapitalExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of ordinary share capital issued.

**Disclosure on issued capital [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOnIssuedCapitalAbstract`

**Issued capital [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_IssuedCapitalAbstract`

**Non-redeemable preference shares [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NonredeemablePreferenceSharesMember`
- Description: Non-redeemable preference shares are non-redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Number of outstanding shares issued during financial year**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NumberOfOutstandingSharesIssuedDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the number of shares issued during the financial year.

**Number of shares issued and fully paid**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NumberOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued and fully paid.

**Number of shares issued and fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NumberOfSharessIssuedAndFullyPaidAbstract`

**Number of shares issued but not fully paid**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NumberOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued but not fully paid.

**Number of shares issued but not fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NumberOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaidAbstract`

**Number of shares outstanding**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NumberOfSharesOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the Number of shares outstanding.

**Number of shares outstanding [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_NumberOfSharesOutstandingAbstract`

**Ordinary shares [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OrdinarySharesMember`
- Description: An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Other changes in amount of shares outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherChangesInAmountOfSharesOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued but not fully paid.

**Other changes in number of shares issued and fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherChangesInNumberOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in the number of shares issued and fully paid.

**Other changes in number of shares issued but not fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherChangesInNumberOfSharesIssuedAndNotFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in the number of shares issued but not fully paid.

**Other changes in number of shares outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherChangesInNumberOfSharesOutstandingDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in the number of shares outstanding which are not reported elsewhere in the category above.

**Redeemable preference shares [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RedeemablePreferenceSharesMember`
- Description: Redeemable preference shares are redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Separate [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SeparateMember`
- Description: This member stands for separate financial statements. Separate financial statements are those presented by an entity in which the entity could elect, subject to the requirements in IAS 27, to account for its investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates either at cost, in accordance with IFRS 9, or using the equity method as described in IAS 28.

**Share capital [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ClassesOfShareCapitalMember`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares.

**Shares issued and fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_SharesIssuedAndFullyPaidAbstract`

**Shares issued but not fully paid [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_SharesIssedButNotFullyPaidAbstract`

**Shares outstanding [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_SharesOutstandingAbstract`

### [750000] Notes - Related party transactions

**Amounts payable, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsPayableRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts payable to related parties.

**Amounts receivable, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsReceivableRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts receivable from related parties.

**Associates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssociatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the  associates. An associate is an entity over which the investor has significant influence.

**Balances with related parties [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_BalancesWithRelatedPartiesAbstract`

**Categories of related parties [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CategoriesOfRelatedPartiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Consolidated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the financial statements of a group in which the assets, liabilities, equity, income, expenses and cash flows of the parent and its subsidiaries are presented as those of a single economic entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Consolidated and separate financial statements' axis if no other member is used.

**Consolidated and separate financial statements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ConsolidatedAndSeparateFinancialStatementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Disclosure of transactions between related parties [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTransactionsBetweenRelatedPartiesAbstract`

**Disclosure of transactions between related parties [line items]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTransactionsBetweenRelatedPartiesLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Disclosure of transactions between related parties [table]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTransactionsBetweenRelatedPartiesTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to transactions between related parties.

**Disclosure of transactions between related parties [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DisclosureOfTransactionsBetweenRelatedPartiesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of transactions between related parties.

**Disclosure on related party transactions [abstract]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DisclosureOnRelatedPartyTransactionsAbstract`

**Dividend income related party transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DividendIncomeRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend incomes from related parties, which refers to distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

**Entities with joint control or significant influence over entity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointControlOrSignificantInfluenceMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the entities with joint control or significant influence. Joint control is the contractually agreed sharing of control of an arrangement, which exists only when decisions about the relevant activities require the unanimous consent of the parties sharing control.

**Entity's total for related parties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_EntitysTotalForRelatedPartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the sum of components of related parties.

**Interest income related party transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InterestIncomeRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income from related parties, which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

**Joint ventures where entity is venturer [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointVenturesWhereEntityIsVenturerMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of joint ventures where entity is venturer. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that havejoint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement and a joint venturer is a party to a joint venture that has joint control of that joint venture.

**Key management personnel compensation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensation`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel compensation. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelOfEntityOrParentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of key management personnel. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Other balances with related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherBalancesWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for other outstanding balances with related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherExpensesRecognisedForTransactionsWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other expenses paid to related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other related parties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherRelatedPartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component inf the form of other related parties not reported elsewhere in other categories.

**Other related parties transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherTransactionsWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for other related party transactions that are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other revenue**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherRevenueRecognisedForTransactionsWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other revenue from related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Parent [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ParentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the parent entity.

**Purchases of goods, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PurchasesOfGoodsRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of goods from related parties.

**Purchases of property and other assets, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PurchasesOfPropertyAndOtherAssetsRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of property and other assets from related parties.

**Related party transactions [abstract]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RelatedPartyTransactionsAbstract`

**Related party transactions, contribution to fund**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsContributionToFund`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the contribution to related party fund.

**Related party transactions, disposal of subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsDisposalOfSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the disposal of subsidiaries. Subsidiary is an entity that is controlled by another entity.

**Related party transactions, education and staff training services**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsEducationAndStaffTrainingServices`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for provision of education and staff training services to related parties.

**Related party transactions, issue of shares for exchangeable bonds**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsIssueOfSharesForExchangeableBonds`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for issue of shares for exchangeable bonds.

**Related party transactions, key management personnel services**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsKeyManagementPersonnelServiceFees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel personnel services fee. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Related party transactions, leasing and hire purchase facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsLeasingAndHirePurchaseFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for provision of leasing and hire purchase facilities to related parties.

**Related party transactions, management fees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsManagementFees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of management fees paid to related parties.

**Related party transactions, other key management personnel**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsOtherKeyManagementPersonnel`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other related party transactions with key management personnel not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Related party transactions, rental income**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsRentalIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of rental income from related parties. Rental income includes  any sum received from the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Related party transactions, royalty expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsRoyaltyExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of royalty expenses paid to related parties, which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

**Related party transactions, royalty income**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsRoyaltyIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of royalty revenue from related parties which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

**Related party transactions, share option recharged**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsShareOptionRecharged`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for share options recharged.

**Related party transactions, share-based payments transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsShareBasedPaymentTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for share-based payment transactions with related parties. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services from the      supplier of those goods or services      (including an employee) in a share-     based payment arrangement, orb. incurs an obligation to settle the      transaction with the supplier in a      share-based payment arrangement      when another group entity receives      those goods or services.

**Related party transactions, supplementary payments and signature bonus**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsSupplementaryPaymentsAndSignatureBonus`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for supplemental payments and signature bonus to related parties.

**Related party transactions, transactions with shareholders and governments**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RelatedPartyTransactionsTransactionsWithShareholdersAndGovernments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for transactions with shareholders and governments.

**Rental expenses related party transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RentalExpensesRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the rental expenses paid to related parties. Rental expenses  include any sum paid for the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Revenue from rendering of services, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevenueFromRenderingOfServicesRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from sale of goods to related parties.

**Revenue from sale of goods, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevenueFromSaleOfGoodsRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from rendering of services to related parties.

**Sales of property and other assets, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SalesOfPropertyAndOtherAssetsRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for sale of property and other assets to related parties.

**Separate [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SeparateMember`
- Description: This member stands for separate financial statements. Separate financial statements are those presented by an entity in which the entity could elect, subject to the requirements in IAS 27, to account for its investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates either at cost, in accordance with IFRS 9, or using the equity method as described in IAS 28.

**Services received, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ServicesReceivedRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for service received from related parties.

**Subsidiaries [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SubsidiariesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the subsidiaries. An entity that is controlled by another entity.

---

## Other

### [760000] Unknown

---

## Ungrouped Elements

These elements have documentation in the taxonomy but are not directly
referenced in any MFRS presentation linkbase role.

**12-month expected credit losses [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TwelvemonthExpectedCreditLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the portion of lifetime expected credit losses that represent the expected credit losses that result from default events on a financial instrument that are possible within the 12 months after the reporting date. [Refer: Type of measurement of expected credit losses [member]; Lifetime expected credit losses [member]]

**[Company registration number] Name of company of other directorship**
- Element: `ssmt_CompanyRegistrationNumberNameOfCompanyOfOtherDirectorship`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to other directorship details of the director.

**Abnormally large changes in asset prices or foreign exchange rates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AbnormallyLargeChangesInAssetPricesOrForeignExchangeRatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for abnormally large changes in asset prices or foreign exchange rates.

**Abnormally large changes in asset prices or foreign exchange rates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AbnormallyLargeChangesInAssetPricesOrForeignExchangeRatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for abnormally large changes in asset prices or foreign exchange rates.

**Accounting estimates [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccountingEstimatesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Accounting estimates [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccountingEstimatesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Accounting estimates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccountingEstimatesMember`
- Description: Expiry date 2023-01-01: This member stands for an asset, a liability or a periodic consumption of an asset, subject to adjustments that result from the assessment of the present status of, and expected future benefits and obligations associated with, assets and liabilities. It also represents the standard value for the 'Accounting estimates' axis if no other member is used.
Effective 2023-01-01: This member stands for monetary amounts in financial statements that are subject to measurement uncertainty. It also represents the standard value for the 'Accounting estimates' axis if no other member is used.

**Accounting estimates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccountingEstimatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for an asset, a liability or a periodic consumption of an asset, subject to adjustments that result from the assessment of the present status of, and expected future benefits and obligations associated with, assets and liabilities. It also represents the standard value for the 'Accounting estimates' axis if no other member is used.

**Accounting profit**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccountingProfit`
- Description: The amount of profit (loss) for a period before deducting tax expense. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Accruals**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Accruals`
- Description: The amount of liabilities to pay for goods or services that have been received or supplied but have not been paid, invoiced or formally agreed with the supplier, including amounts due to employees.

**Accruals**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Accruals`
- Description: The amount of liabilities to pay for goods or services that have been received or supplied but have not been paid, invoiced or formally agreed with the supplier, including amounts due to employees.

**Accruals**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeAccruals`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

**Accruals**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentNontradeAccruals`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

**Accruals and deferred income including contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccrualsAndDeferredIncomeIncludingContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of accruals and deferred income, including contract liabilities. [Refer: Accruals; Deferred income including contract liabilities]

**Accruals classified as current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccrualsClassifiedAsCurrent`
- Description: The amount of accruals classified as current. [Refer: Accruals]

**Accruals classified as current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccrualsClassifiedAsCurrent`
- Description: The amount of accruals classified as current. [Refer: Accruals]

**Accruals classified as non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccrualsClassifiedAsNoncurrent`
- Description: The amount of accruals classified as non-current. [Refer: Accruals]

**Accruals classified as non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccrualsClassifiedAsNoncurrent`
- Description: The amount of accruals classified as non-current. [Refer: Accruals]

**Accrued income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentAccruedIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current amounts of income for work that has been done but not yet invoiced.

**Accrued income including contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccruedIncomeIncludingContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of assets representing income that has been earned but is not yet a receivable, including contract assets. [Refer: Contract assets]

**Accrued income other than contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccruedIncomeOtherThanContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of assets representing income that has been earned but is not yet a receivable, other than contract assets. [Refer: Contract assets]

**Accumulated allowance for uncollectible minimum lease payments receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccumulatedAllowanceForUncollectibleMinimumLeasePaymentsReceivable`
- Description: The amount of accumulated allowance for uncollectible minimum lease payments receivable. Minimum lease payments are payments over the lease term that the lessee is or can be required to make, excluding contingent rent, costs for services and taxes to be paid by and reimbursed to the lessor, together with: (a) for a lessee, any amounts guaranteed by the lessee or by a party related to the lessee; or (b) for a lessor, any residual value guaranteed to the lessor by: (i) the lessee; (ii) a party related to the lessee; or (iii) a third party unrelated to the lessor that is financially capable of discharging the obligations under the guarantee.

**Accumulated depreciation and amortisation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedDepreciationAndAmortisationMember`
- Description: This member stands for accumulated depreciation and amortisation. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Accumulated depreciation, amortisation and impairment [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedDepreciationAmortisationAndImpairmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for accumulated depreciation, amortisation and impairment. [Refer: Impairment loss; Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Accumulated depreciation, amortisation and impairment [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AccumulatedDepreciationAmortisationAndImpairmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for accumulated depreciation, amortisation and impairment. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Accumulated fair value hedge adjustment on hedged item included in carrying amount, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedFairValueHedgeAdjustmentOnHedgedItemIncludedInCarryingAmountAssets`
- Description: The accumulated amount of fair value hedge adjustment on a hedged item that is included in the carrying amount of the hedged item, recognised in the statement of financial position as an asset. [Refer: Hedged items [member]]

**Accumulated fair value hedge adjustment on hedged item included in carrying amount, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedFairValueHedgeAdjustmentOnHedgedItemIncludedInCarryingAmountLiabilities`
- Description: The accumulated amount of fair value hedge adjustment on a hedged item that is included in the carrying amount of the hedged item, recognised in the statement of financial position as a liability. [Refer: Hedged items [member]]

**Accumulated fair value hedge adjustment remaining in statement of financial position for hedged item that ceased to be adjusted for hedging gains and losses, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedFairValueHedgeAdjustmentRemainingInStatementOfFinancialPositionForHedgedItemThatCeasedToBeAdjustedForHedgingGainsAndLossesAssets`
- Description: The accumulated amount of fair value hedge adjustment remaining in the statement of financial position for a hedged item that is a financial asset measured at amortised cost and has ceased to be adjusted for hedging gains and losses. [Refer: Financial assets at amortised cost; Hedged items [member]]

**Accumulated fair value hedge adjustment remaining in statement of financial position for hedged item that ceased to be adjusted for hedging gains and losses, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedFairValueHedgeAdjustmentRemainingInStatementOfFinancialPositionForHedgedItemThatCeasedToBeAdjustedForHedgingGainsAndLossesLiabilities`
- Description: The accumulated amount of fair value hedge adjustment remaining in the statement of financial position for a hedged item that is a financial liability measured at amortised cost and has ceased to be adjusted for hedging gains and losses. [Refer: Financial liabilities at amortised cost; Hedged items [member]]

**Accumulated Fund**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AccumulatedFund`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of accumulated fund as at the reporting date.

**Accumulated Fund**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AccumulatedFund`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the reporting entity's accumulated funds or deficit.

**Accumulated funds (deficit) [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AccumulatedFundsDeficitMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to accumulated funds (deficit).

**Accumulated funds (deficit) [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AccumulatedFundsDeficitMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of fund/equity representing the reporting entity's accumulated funds or deficit.

**Accumulated impairment [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedImpairmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for accumulated impairment. [Refer: Impairment loss]
