**Accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of credit derivatives or similar instruments related to financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedChangesInFairValueOfFinancialAssetsRelatedCreditDerivativesOrSimilarInstruments`
- Description: The accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of credit derivatives or similar instruments related to financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Derivatives [member]; Increase (decrease) in fair value of financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss related credit derivatives or similar instruments; Financial assets]

**Accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of credit derivatives or similar instruments related to loans or receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedChangesInFairValueOfLoansOrReceivablesRelatedCreditDerivativesOrSimilarInstruments`
- Description: The aggregate increase (decrease) in the fair value of credit derivatives or similar instruments related to loans or receivables. [Refer: Derivatives [member]; Increase (decrease) in fair value of loans or receivables related credit derivatives or similar instruments]

**Accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss, attributable to changes in credit risk of financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedChangesInFairValueOfFinancialAssetsAttributableToChangesInCreditRiskOfFinancialAssets`
- Description: The accumulated increase (decrease) in the fair value of financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss that is attributable to changes in the credit risk of the assets determined either: (a) as the amount of change in their fair value that is not attributable to changes in market conditions that gave rise to market risk; or (b) using an alternative method that the entity believes more faithfully represents the amount of change in its fair value that is attributable to changes in the credit risk of the asset. [Refer: Credit risk [member]; Market risk [member]; Increase (decrease) in fair value of financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss, attributable to changes in credit risk of financial assets]

**Accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of financial liability, attributable to changes in credit risk of liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedChangesInFairValueOfFinancialLiabilityAttributableToChangesInCreditRiskOfLiability`
- Description: The accumulated increase (decrease) in the fair value of financial liabilities that is attributable to changes in the credit risk of the liabilities. [Refer: Credit risk [member]; Market risk [member]; Increase (decrease) in fair value of financial liability, attributable to changes in credit risk of liability]

**Accumulated increase (decrease) in fair value of loan or receivable, attributable to changes in credit risk of financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedChangesInFairValueOfLoanOrReceivableAttributableToChangesInCreditRiskOfFinancialAssets`
- Description: The accumulated increase (decrease) in the fair value of loans or receivables that is attributable to changes in the credit risk of the assets determined either: (a) as the amount of change in their fair value that is not attributable to changes in the market conditions that gave rise to the market risk; or (b) using an alternative method the entity believes more faithfully represents the amount of change in its fair value that is attributable to changes in the credit risk of the asset. [Refer: Market risk [member]]

**Accumulated other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of accumulated items of income and expense (including reclassification adjustments) that are not recognised in profit or loss as required or permitted by other IFRSs. [Refer: IFRSs [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Accumulated other comprehensive income [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AccumulatedOtherComprehensiveIncomeMember`
- Description: This member stands for accumulated other comprehensive income. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Acquisition (dilution) of equity interest in subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncreaseDecreaseThroughAcquisitionOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of equity interest acquired (disposed) in subsidiaries.

**Acquisition and administration expense related to insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionAndAdministrationExpenseRelatedToInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The amount of acquisition and administration expense relating to insurance contracts. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Acquisition-date fair value of equity interest in acquiree held by acquirer immediately before acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitiondateFairValueOfEquityInterestInAcquireeHeldByAcquirerImmediatelyBeforeAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The acquisition-date fair value of equity interest in the acquiree held by the acquirer immediately before the acquisition date in a business combination achieved in stages. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Acquisition-related costs for transaction recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionrelatedCostsForTransactionRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amount of acquisition-related costs for transactions recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and the assumption of liabilities in business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Acquisition-related costs recognised as expense for transaction recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionrelatedCostsRecognisedAsExpenseForTransactionRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amount of acquisition-related costs recognised as an expense for transactions that are recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and the assumption of liabilities in business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The increase in biological assets resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Biological assets]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The increase in biological assets resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Biological assets]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsDeferredAcquisitionCostsArisingFromInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The increase in deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsDefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The increase in the present value of a defined benefit obligation resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsIntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: The increase in intangible assets and goodwill resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets and goodwill]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The increase in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The increase in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The increase in investment property resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The increase in investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property [member]]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The increase in investment property at fair value through profit or loss resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property [member]]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsLiabilitiesUnderInsuranceContractsAndReinsuranceContractsIssued`
- Description: The increase in liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsOtherProvisions`
- Description: The increase in other provisions resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Other provisions]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The increase in property, plant and equipment resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Property, plant and equipment]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The increase in property, plant and equipment resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Property, plant and equipment]

**Acquisitions through business combinations, reinsurance assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AcquisitionsThroughBusinessCombinationsReinsuranceAssets`
- Description: The increase in reinsurance assets resulting from acquisitions through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Reinsurance assets]

**Actual claims that arise from contracts within scope of IFRS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActualClaimsThatAriseFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17`
- Description: The amount of the actual claims that arise from contracts within the scope of IFRS 17.

**Actual return on plan assets and reimbursement right recognised as asset**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DescriptionOfActualReturnOnPlanAssetsAndReimbursementRightRecognisedAsAsset`
- Description: The actual return on plan assets, as well as the actual return on any reimbursement right recognised as an asset when it is virtually certain that another party will reimburse some or all of the expenditure required to settle a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value]

**Actuarial assumption of discount rates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfDiscountRates`
- Description: The discount rate used as the significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of discount rates**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ActuarialAssumptionOfDiscountRates`
- Description: The discount rate used as the significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Actuarial assumption of discount rates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfDiscountRatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the discount rates used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of inflation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfInflation`
- Description: The expected rate of inflation that is used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of inflation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfInflationMember`
- Description: This member stands for the expected rates of inflation used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of pension increases**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfPensionIncreases`
- Description: The expected rate of increases in pension that is used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of pension increases [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfPensionIncreasesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the expected rates of pension increases used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of return on plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfReturnOnPlanAssets`
- Description: The expected rate of return on any defined benefit plan assets used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of salary increases**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfSalaryIncreases`
- Description: The expected rate of salary increases used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of salary increases**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfSalaryIncreases`
- Description: The expected rate of salary increases used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Actuarial assumption of expected rates of salary increases [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfExpectedRatesOfSalaryIncreasesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the expected rates of salary increases used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of life expectancy after retirement**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfLifeExpectancyAfterRetirement2019`
- Description: The life expectancy after retirement used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of life expectancy after retirement [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfLifeExpectancyAfterRetirementMember`
- Description: This member stands for the life expectancy after retirement used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of medical cost trend rates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfMedicalCostTrendRates`
- Description: Medical cost trend rate used as significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of medical cost trend rates**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ActuarialAssumptionOfMedicalCostTrendRates`
- Description: Medical cost trend rate used as significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Actuarial assumption of medical cost trend rates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfMedicalCostTrendRatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the medical cost trend rates used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of mortality rates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfMortalityRates`
- Description: The mortality rate used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of mortality rates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfMortalityRatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the mortality rates used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of retirement age**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfRetirementAge2019`
- Description: The retirement age used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumption of retirement age [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionOfRetirementAgeMember`
- Description: This member stands for the retirement age used as actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Actuarial assumptions [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Actuarial assumptions [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialAssumptionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all actuarial assumptions. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Actuarial assumptions' axis if no other member is used.

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions, before tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInDemographicAssumptionsBeforeTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, before tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Demographic assumptions deal with matters such as: (a) mortality; (b) rates of employee turnover, disability and early retirement; (c) the proportion of plan members with dependants who will be eligible for benefits; (d) the proportion of plan members who will select each form of payment option available under the plan terms; and (e) claim rates under medical plans. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions]

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions, net of tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInDemographicAssumptionsNetOfTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, net of tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Demographic assumptions deal with matters such as: (a) mortality; (b) rates of employee turnover, disability and early retirement; (c) the proportion of plan members with dependants who will be eligible for benefits; (d) the proportion of plan members who will select each form of payment option available under the plan terms; and (e) claim rates under medical plans. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions]

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions, before tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInFinancialAssumptionsBeforeTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, before tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Financial assumptions deal with items such as: (a) the discount rate; (b) benefit levels, excluding any cost of the benefits to be met by employees, and future salary; (c) in the case of medical benefits, future medical costs, including claim handling costs (ie the costs that will be incurred in processing and resolving claims, including legal and adjuster's fees); and (d) taxes payable by the plan on contributions relating to service before the reporting date or on benefits resulting from that service. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions]

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions, net of tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInFinancialAssumptionsNetOfTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, net of tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Financial assumptions deal with items such as: (a) the discount rate; (b) benefit levels, excluding any cost of the benefits to be met by employees, and future salary; (c) in the case of medical benefits, future medical costs, including claim handling costs (ie the costs that will be incurred in processing and resolving claims, including legal and adjuster's fees); and (d) taxes payable by the plan on contributions relating to service before the reporting date or on benefits resulting from that service. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions]

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments, before tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromExperienceAdjustmentsBeforeTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, before tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Experience adjustments deal with the effects of differences between the previous actuarial assumptions and what has actually occurred. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments]

**Actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments, net of tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromExperienceAdjustmentsNetOfTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, net of tax, resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Experience adjustments deal with the effects of differences between the previous actuarial assumptions and what has actually occurred. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments]

**Actuarial gains (losses) recognised in profit or loss, defined benefit plan**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ActuarialGainsLossesRecognisedInProfitOrLossDefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: The amount of actuarial gains (losses) on defined benefit plans, recognised in profit or loss. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Actuarial present value of promised retirement benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialPresentValueOfPromisedRetirementBenefits`
- Description: The present value of the expected payments by a retirement benefit plan to existing and past employees, attributable to the service already rendered.

**Additional allowance recognised in profit or loss, allowance account for credit losses of financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalAllowanceRecognisedInProfitOrLossAllowanceAccountForCreditLossesOfFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of additional allowance for credit losses of financial assets recognised in profit or loss. [Refer: Allowance account for credit losses of financial assets]

**Additional information about entity exposure to risk**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalInformationAboutEntityExposureToRisk`
- Description: Additional information about the entity's exposure to risk when the quantitative data disclosed are unrepresentative.

**Additional information about insurance contracts [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalInformationAboutInsuranceContractsExplanatory`
- Description: Additional information about insurance contracts necessary to meet the objective of the disclosure requirements in IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance contracts [member]]

**Additional information about nature and financial effect of business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalInformationAboutNatureAndFinancialEffectOfBusinessCombination`
- Description: Additional information about the nature and financial effects of business combinations necessary to meet the objectives of IFRS 3. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Additional information about nature of and changes in risks associated with interests in structured entities [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalInformationAboutNatureOfAndChangesInRisksAssociatedWithInterestsInStructuredEntitiesExplanatory`
- Description: The disclosure of additional information about the nature of, and changes in, risks associated with interests in structured entities.

**Additional information about share-based payment arrangements [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalInformationAboutSharebasedPaymentArrangements`
- Description: Additional information about share-based payment arrangements necessary to satisfy the disclosure requirements of IFRS 2. [Refer: Share-based payment arrangements [member]]

**Additional liabilities, contingent liabilities recognised in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalLiabilitiesContingentLiabilitiesRecognisedInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amount of additional contingent liabilities recognised in business combinations. [Refer: Contingent liabilities recognised in business combination; Business combinations [member]; Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Additional paid-in capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalPaidinCapital`
- Description: The amount received or receivable from the issuance of the entity's shares in excess of nominal value and amounts received from other transactions involving the entity's stock or stockholders.

**Additional paid-in capital [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalPaidinCapitalMember`
- Description: This member stands for amounts received from issuance of the entity's shares in excess of nominal value and amounts received from other transactions involving the entity's stock or stockholders.

**Additional provisions, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalProvisionsOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of additional other provisions made. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Additional provisions, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionalProvisionsOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of additional other provisions made. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Additional recognition, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionalRecognitionGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of additional goodwill recognised, except goodwill included in a disposal group that, on acquisition, meets the criteria to be classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS 5. [Refer: Goodwill; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Additional recognition, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionalRecognitionGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of additional goodwill recognised. [Refer: Goodwill]

**Additions from acquisitions, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsFromAcquisitionsInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of additions to investment property resulting from acquisitions. [Refer: Investment property]

**Additions from purchases, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsFromPurchasesBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to biological assets resulting from purchases. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Additions from subsequent expenditure recognised as asset, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsFromSubsequentExpenditureRecognisedAsAssetBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to biological assets resulting from subsequent expenditure recognised as an asset. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Additions from subsequent expenditure recognised as asset, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsFromSubsequentExpenditureRecognisedAsAssetInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of additions to investment property resulting from subsequent expenditure recognised as an asset. [Refer: Investment property]

**Additions other than through business combinations, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to biological assets, other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Biological assets]

**Additions other than through business combinations, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to biological assets, other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Biological assets]

**Additions other than through business combinations, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of additions to intangible assets other than goodwill, other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Additions other than through business combinations, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of additions to intangible assets other than goodwill, other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Additions other than through business combinations, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of additions to investment property other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property]

**Additions other than through business combinations, investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The amount of additions to investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property [member]]

**Additions other than through business combinations, investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of additions to investment property at fair value through profit or loss other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Investment property [member]]

**Additions other than through business combinations, liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsLiabilitiesUnderInsuranceContractsAndReinsuranceContractsIssued`
- Description: The increase in liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued, resulting from additions other than through business combinations. [Refer: Liabilities under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued; Business combinations [member]]

**Additions other than through business combinations, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The amount of additions to property, plant and equipment other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Property, plant and equipment]

**Additions other than through business combinations, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The amount of additions to property, plant and equipment other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Property, plant and equipment]

**Additions other than through business combinations, reinsurance assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsOtherThanThroughBusinessCombinationsReinsuranceAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to reinsurance assets, other than those acquired through business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Reinsurance assets]

**Additions to non-current assets other than financial instruments, deferred tax assets, net defined benefit assets, and rights arising under insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsToNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to non-current assets other than financial instruments, deferred tax assets, net defined benefit assets and rights arising under insurance contracts. [Refer: Deferred tax assets; Financial instruments, class [member]; Non-current assets; Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Additions to right-of-use assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdditionsToRightofuseAssets`
- Description: The amount of additions to right-of-use assets. [Refer: Right-of-use assets]

**Address of audit firm**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of audit firm.

**Address of audit firm [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfAuditFirmMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of audit firm.

**Address of business of Agents [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfBusinessOfAgentsMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of business of agents.

**Address of business of Managers [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfBusinessOfManagersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of managers.

**Address of business of Secretary [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfBusinessOfSecretaryMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of business of secretary.

**Address of entity's registered office**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfEntity`
- Description: The address at which the entity's office is registered.

**Address of entity's registered office**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfEntity`
- Description: The address at which the entity's office is registered.

**Address of registered office [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfRegisteredOfficeMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of registered office in Malaysia.

**Address of registered office in place of incorporation or origin [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfRegisteredOfficeInPlaceOfIncorporationOrOriginMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of registered office in place of incorporation or origin.

**Address of residence of Agents [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfResidenceOfAgentsMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of residence of agents.

**Address of residence of directors [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfResidenceOfDirectorsMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of residence of directors.

**Address of residence of Managers [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfResidenceOfManagersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of residnece of managers.

**Address of residence of Secretary [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfResidenceOfSecretaryMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of residence of secretary.

**Address of service of directors [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfServiceOfDirectorsMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of service of directors.

**Address of shareholders or members [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_AddressOfShareholdersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of shareholder or member.

**Address where consolidated financial statements are obtainable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AddressWhereConsolidatedFinancialStatementsAreObtainable`
- Description: The address where consolidated financial statements that comply with IFRSs of the entity's ultimate or any intermediate parent are obtainable. [Refer: Consolidated [member]; IFRSs [member]]

**Adjustment for depreciation**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForDepreciationExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of depreciation recognised as expenses during the period. Depreciation is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

**Adjustment to mid-market consensus price, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentToMidmarketConsensusPriceMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for an adjustment to mid-market consensus price, used as a measurement input.

**Adjustment to profit (loss) for preference share dividends**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentToProfitLossForPreferenceShareDividends`
- Description: Adjustment to profit (loss) for non-participating preference share dividends to calculate profit (loss) attributable to ordinary equity holders of the parent entity. [Refer: Preference shares [member]; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for accrued income (expenses) not yet received (paid)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForAccruedIncomeExpensesNotYetReceivedPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the accrued expenses (income) not yet paid (received) during the period.

**Adjustments for allowance for doubtful debts**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForAllowanceForDoubtfulDebts`
- Description: Represents the amount of allowance for doubtful debts to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for allowance for doubtful debts**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AdjustmentsForAllowanceForDoubtfulDebts`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustment for allowance for doubtful debts which refer to the amount of money that a business does not expect to collect from its clients to reconcile surplus (deficit) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. .

**Adjustments for amortisation**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForAmortisationExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of amortisation recognised as expenses during the period. Amortisation is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

**Adjustments for amortisation of government grants**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForAmortisationOfGovernmentGrants`
- Description: Represents the amount of amortisation of government grants to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for amortisation of government grants**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AdjustmentsForAmortisationOfGovernmentGrants`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortisation of government grants to reconcile surplus (deficit) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for current tax of prior periods**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForCurrentTaxOfPriorPeriod`
- Description: Adjustments of tax expense (income) recognised in the period for current tax of prior periods.

**Adjustments for current tax of prior periods**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForCurrentTaxOfPriorPeriod`
- Description: Adjustments of tax expense (income) recognised in the period for current tax of prior periods.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in accrued income including contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInAccruedIncomeIncludingContractAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for the decrease (increase) in accrued income including contract assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Accrued income including contract assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in accrued income other than contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInAccruedIncomeOtherThanContractAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for the decrease (increase) in accrued income other than contract assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Accrued income other than contract assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in biological assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Biological assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInDerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in derivative financial assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Derivative financial assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in financial assets held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInFinancialAssetsHeldForTrading`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in financial assets held for trading to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Financial assets; Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInInventories`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in inventories.Inventories are assets:a. held for sale in the ordinary course of      business;b. in the process of production for such sale; orc. in the form of materials or supplies to be    consumed in the production process or in the    rendering of services.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in loans and advances to banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInLoansAndAdvancesToBanks`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in loans and advances to banks to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Loans and advances to banks; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in loans and advances to customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInLoansAndAdvancesToCustomers`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in loans and advances to customers to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Loans and advances to customers; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInOtherAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Other assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInOtherCurrentAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other current assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Other current assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInOtherOperatingReceivables`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInOtherOperatingReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in prepaid expenses**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInPrepaidExpenses`
- Description: Adjustments for the decrease (increase) in prepaid expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Current prepaid expenses; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInPropertyDevelopmentCosts`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for increase (decrease) in property development costs to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInPropertyPlantAndEquipmentWrittenOff`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property, plant and equipment written off**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInPropertyPlantAndEquipmentWrittenOff`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of write-offs of property, plant and equipment to reconcile surplus (deficit) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInReverseRepurchaseAgreementsAndCashCollateralOnSecuritiesBorrowed`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInTradeAccountReceivable`
- Description: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForDecreaseIncreaseInTradeAccountReceivable`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts receivable.

**Adjustments for deferred tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDeferredTaxExpense`
- Description: Adjustments for deferred tax expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Deferred tax expense (income); Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for deferred tax of prior periods**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDeferredTaxOfPriorPeriods`
- Description: Adjustments of tax expense (income) recognised in the period for the deferred tax of prior periods.

**Adjustments for depreciation and amortisation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDepreciationAndAmortisationExpense`
- Description: Adjustments for depreciation and amortisation expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for depreciation and amortisation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForDepreciationAndAmortisationExpense`
- Description: Adjustments for depreciation and amortisation expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for depreciation and amortisation expense and impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) recognised in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForDepreciationAndAmortisationExpenseAndImpairmentLossReversalOfImpairmentLossRecognisedInProfitOrLoss`

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForDividendIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for dividend income to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for fair value losses (gains)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForFairValueGainsLosses`
- Description: Adjustments for fair value losses (gains) to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for fair value losses (gains)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForFairValueGainsLosses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of fair value losses (gains) recognised as expenses (income) during the period.

**Adjustments for finance costs**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForFinanceCosts`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for finance cost which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for finance income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForFinanceIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for finance income which is income that were derived from the entity's financial assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for finance income (cost)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForFinanceIncomeCost`
- Description: Adjustments for net finance income or cost to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Finance income (cost); Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for gain (loss) on disposal of investment property**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForGainLossOnDisposalOfInvestmentProperty`
- Description: Represents the amount of gain (loss) on disposal of investment property to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for gain (loss) on disposal of investment property**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AdjustmentsForGainLossOnDisposalOfInvestmentProperty`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or loss on disposal of investment properties to reconcile surplus (deficit) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForGainLossOnDisposalOfInvestmentsInSubsidiariesJointVenturesAndAssociates`

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForGainsLossesOnChangeInFairValueLessCostsToSellBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for gains (losses) on changes in the fair value less costs to sell of biological assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Biological assets; Profit (loss)]

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForGainsLossesOnChangeInFairValueOfDerivatives`

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForImpairmentLossReversalOfImpairmentLossRecognisedInProfitOrLossLoansAndAdvances`

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForImpairmentLossRecognisedInProfitOrLossGoodwill`
- Description: Adjustments for impairment loss on goodwill recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Goodwill; Impairment loss; Impairment loss recognised in profit or loss]

**Adjustments for income tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncomeTaxExpense`
- Description: Adjustments for income tax expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for income tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForIncomeTaxExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to income tax expense.Income tax is all domestic and foreign taxes that are based on taxable profits. Income tax also includes taxes, such as withholding taxes, that are payable by a subsidiary, associate or joint venture on distributions to the reporting entity.

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInContractLiabilities`
- Description: Adjustments for the increase (decrease) in contract liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Contract liabilities; Profit (loss)]

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in derivative financial liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Derivative financial liabilities; Profit (loss)]

- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in employee benefit liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInFinancialLiabilitiesHeldForTrading`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in financial liabilities held for trading to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. - Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in insurance, reinsurance and investment contract liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. - Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInOtherCurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in other current liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Other current liabilities; Profit (loss)]

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInOtherLiabilities`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in other liabilities to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Other liabilities; Profit (loss)]

- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in other operating payables to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for increase (decrease) in other operating payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInOtherOperatingPayables`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period of adjustments for decrease (increase) in other operating receivables.

**Adjustments for increase (decrease) in repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInRepurchaseAgreementsAndCashCollateralOnSecuritiesLent`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade accounts payable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInTradeAccountPayable`
- Description: Adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade accounts payable to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade accounts payable**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForIncreaseDecreaseInTradeAccountPayable`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period of adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade accounts payable.

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForIncreaseInOtherProvisionsArisingFromPassageOfTime`
- Description: Adjustments for increases in other provisions arising from the passage of time to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss); Other provisions [member]]

**Adjustments for interest expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForInterestExpense`
- Description: Adjustments for interest expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Interest expense; Profit (loss)]

- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForLossesGainsOnDisposalOfNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for losses (gains) on disposal of non-current assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Non-current assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for losses (gains) on disposal of non-current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForLossesGainsOnDisposalOfNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Adjustments for losses (gains) on disposal of non-current assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Non-current assets; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for non-cash finance costs**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForNoncashFinanceCosts`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for non-cash finance costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for non-cash income tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForNoncashIncomeTaxExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for non-cash income tax expense.

**Adjustments for non-controlling interests**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Adjustments for non-controlling interests to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Non-controlling interests; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for other non-current assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForOtherNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForPerformanceBasedEmployeeShareSchemeAndOtherExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. Share-based payment arrangement is an agreement between the entity (or another group entity or any shareholder of any group entity) and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receive

**Adjustments for provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForProvisions`
- Description: Adjustments for provisions to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Provisions; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForProvisions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of provisions recognised as expenses during the period.Provision is a liability of uncertain timing or amount.

**Adjustments for share of profit of equity-accounted associates and joint ventures, net of tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForShareOfProfitOfEquityAccountedAssociatesAndJointVenturesNetOfTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share of equity-accounted associates and joint ventures post-tax profit to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.  An associate is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

**Adjustments for share of profits of joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForShareOfProfitsOfJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share of joint ventures post-tax profit to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

**Adjustments for share option expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForShareOptionExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share option expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. Share-based payment arrangement is an agreement between the entity (or another group entity or any shareholder of any group entity) and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receive

**Adjustments for share-based payments**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForSharebasedPayments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of share-based payments recognised as expenses during the period.

**Adjustments for undistributed profits of associates**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForUndistributedProfitsOfAssociates`
- Description: Adjustments for undistributed profits of associates to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Investments in associates; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for undistributed profits of investments accounted for using equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForUndistributedProfitsOfInvestmentsAccountedForUsingEquityMethod`
- Description: Adjustments for undistributed profits of investments accounted for using the equity method to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Investments accounted for using equity method; Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange gain (loss)**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AdjustmentsForUnrealisedForeignExchangeGainLoss`
- Description: Represents the amount of unrealised foreign exchange gain (loss) to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForUnrealisedForeignExchangeLossesGains`
- Description: Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains) to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. [Refer: Profit (loss)]

**Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForUnrealisedForeignExchangeLossesGains`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments related to the amount of unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains) recognised as expenses (income) during the period.

**Adjustments to deferred tax expense (income) arising from change in tax status of entity or shareholders**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsToDeferredTaxExpenseArisingFromChangeInTaxStatusOfEntityOrShareholders`
- Description: Adjustments to deferred tax expense (income) arising from a change in the tax status of the entity or its shareholders. Deferred tax is income tax payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for future reporting periods as a result of past transactions or events.

**Adjustments to profit (loss) for interest and dividends on equity instruments, other than preference shares and participating equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsToProfitLossForInterestAndDividendsOnEquityInstrumentsOtherThanPreferenceSharesAndParticipatingEquityInstruments`
- Description: The adjustment to reconcile profit (loss) attributable to the parent entity to the numerator used in calculating basic earnings (loss) resulting from interest and dividends on equity instruments other than preference shares and participating equity instruments.

**Adjustments to reconcile profit (loss)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdjustmentsForReconcileProfitLoss`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of adjustments to reconcile profit or loss.

**Adjustments to reconcile profit (loss) attributable to owners of parent to numerator used in calculating basic earnings per share**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsToReconcileProfitLossAttributableToOwnersOfParentToNumeratorUsedInCalculatingBasicEarningsPerShare`
- Description: The adjustment to reconcile profit (loss) attributable to the parent entity to the numerator used in calculating basic earnings per share. It represents the aggregate of the reconciliation amounts for all classes of instruments that affect basic earnings per share.

**Adjustments to reconcile profit (loss) other than changes in working capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsToReconcileProfitLossOtherThanChangesInWorkingCapital`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  adjustments for increase (decrease) in other working capital not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile surplus (deficit) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

**Administration costs not reflected in return on plan assets, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdministrationCostsNotReflectedInReturnOnPlanAssetsDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of administration costs in the current period related to defined benefit plans that are not reflected in the return on plan assets. [Refer: Administrative expenses; Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from administration costs not reflected in return on plan assets; Return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense, net of tax, defined benefit plans; Return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense, before tax, defined benefit plans]

**Administrative expenses**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AdministrativeExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of administrative expenses which are expenses of providing management and administration for the business.

**Advances received, representing contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied at point in time**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Advances`
- Description: The amount of advances received representing contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied at a point in time. [Refer: Contract liabilities; Performance obligations satisfied at point in time [member]]

**Advertising expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdvertisingExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of advertisement expenses. Advertisement refers to notice or announcement in a public medium promoting a product, service, or event or publicizing a job vacancy.

**Agent fees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AgentFees`
- Description: Represents the amount of expenses related to agent fees.

**Agent fees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AgentFees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of agent fees.

**Aggregate adjustment to carrying amounts of investments reported under previous GAAP**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentToCarryingAmountsReportedUnderPreviousGAAP`
- Description: The amount of aggregate adjustments to the carrying amounts reported under previous GAAP of investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures or associates in the entity's first IFRS financial statements. [Refer: Associates [member]; Carrying amount [member]; Joint ventures [member]; Previous GAAP [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates reported in separate financial statements; IFRSs [member]]

**Aggregate adjustment to carrying amounts reported under previous GAAP [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregateAdjustmentToCarryingValueReportedUnderPreviousGAAPMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregate adjustment to the carrying amounts reported under previous GAAP. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]; Previous GAAP [member]]

**Aggregate cash-generating units for which amount of goodwill or intangible assets with indefinite useful lives is not significant [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregateNotSignificantIndividualAssetsOrCashgeneratingUnitsMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregate of cash-generating units for which the amount of goodwill or intangible assets with indefinite useful lives is not significant. [Refer: Cash-generating units [member]; Goodwill; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Aggregate continuing and discontinued operations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregateContinuingAndDiscontinuedOperationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregate of continuing and discontinued operations. [Refer: Discontinued operations [member]; Continuing operations [member]]

**Aggregate deemed cost of investments for which deemed cost is fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeemedCostOfInvestmentsForWhichDeemedCostIsFairValue`
- Description: The amount of aggregate deemed cost of investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures or associates for which deemed cost is fair value in the entity's first IFRS financial statements. [Refer: Associates [member]; Joint ventures [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates reported in separate financial statements; IFRSs [member]]

**Aggregate deemed cost of investments for which deemed cost is previous GAAP carrying amount**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeemedCostOfInvestmentsForWhichDeemedCostIsPreviousGAAPCarryingAmount`
- Description: The amount of aggregate deemed cost of investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures or associates for which deemed cost is their previous GAAP carrying amount in the entity's first IFRS financial statements. [Refer: Associates [member]; Carrying amount [member]; Joint ventures [member]; Previous GAAP [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates reported in separate financial statements; IFRSs [member]]

**Aggregate difference between fair value at initial recognition and transaction price yet to be recognised in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregateDifferenceBetweenFairValueAtInitialRecognitionAndAmountDeterminedUsingValuationTechniqueYetToBeRecognised`
- Description: The aggregate difference between the fair value at initial recognition and the transaction price for financial instruments that is yet to be recognised in profit or loss. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Aggregate Indebtedness**
- Element: `ssmt_AggregateIndebtedness`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the aggregate amount of the indebtedness.

**Aggregate of fair values [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregateOfFairValuesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregate of fair values. It also represents the standard value for the 'Fair value as deemed cost' axis if no other member is used.

**Aggregate Profit (loss)**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AggregateProfitLoss`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

**Aggregate profit (loss) before tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AggregateProfitLossBeforeTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total profit or loss before tax.

**Aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncomeTaxRelatingToComponentsOfOtherComprehensiveIncomeThatWillBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss.  - Income tax - Tax expense (tax income) is the aggregate amount included in the determination of profit or loss for the period in respect of current tax and deferred tax

**Aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncomeTaxRelatingToComponentsOfOtherComprehensiveIncomeThatWillNotBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss.  - Income tax. - Tax expense (tax income) is the aggregate amount included in the determination of profit or loss for the period in respect of current tax and deferred tax.

**Aggregated individually immaterial associates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregatedIndividuallyImmaterialAssociatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregation of associates that are individually immaterial. [Refer: Associates [member]]

**Aggregated individually immaterial business combinations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregatedIndividuallyImmaterialBusinessCombinationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregation of business combinations that are individually immaterial. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Aggregated individually immaterial joint ventures [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregatedIndividuallyImmaterialJointVenturesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the aggregation of joint ventures that are individually immaterial. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]]

**Aggregated measurement [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregatedMeasurementMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of measurement. It also represents the standard value for the 'Measurement' axis if no other member is used.

**Aggregated measurement [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AggregatedMeasurementMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of measurement. It also represents the standard value for the 'Measurement' axis if no other member is used.

**Aggregated time bands [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AggregatedTimeBandsMember`
- Description: This member stands for aggregated time bands. It also represents the standard value for the 'Maturity' axis if no other member is used.

**Aggregated time bands [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AggregatedTimeBandsMember`
- Description: This member stands for aggregated time bands. It also represents the standard value for the 'Maturity' axis if no other member is used.

**Agricultural produce by group [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AgriculturalProduceByGroupAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Agricultural produce, group [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AgriculturalProduceGroupMember`
