- Description: This member stands for all agricultural produce when disaggregated by group. It also represents the standard value for the 'Agricultural produce by group' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Current agricultural produce]

**Aircraft**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Aircraft`
- Description: The amount of property, plant and equipment representing aircraft used in the entity's operations.

**Aircraft [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AircraftMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing aircraft used in entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Aircraft [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AircraftMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing aircraft used in entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Airport landing rights [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AirportLandingRightsMember`
- Description: This member stands for airport landing rights.

**All levels of fair value hierarchy [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllLevelsOfFairValueHierarchyMember`
- Description: This member stands for all levels of the fair value hierarchy. It also represents the standard value for the 'Levels of fair value hierarchy' axis if no other member is used.

**All other segments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllOtherSegmentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for business activities and operating segments that are not reportable.

**All types of depositary receipts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllTypesOfDepositaryReceiptsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of depositary receipts.

**All years of insurance claim [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllYearsOfInsuranceClaimMember`
- Description: This member stands for all years of the insurance claims. It also represents the standard value for the 'Years of insurance claim' axis if no other member is used.

**Allowance account for credit losses of financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllowanceAccountForCreditLossesOfFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of an allowance account used to record impairments to financial assets due to credit losses. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Allowance for credit losses [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AllowanceForCreditLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for an allowance account used to record impairments to financial assets due to credit losses.

**Alternate director to**
- Element: `ssmt_NameOfRegisteredDirectorOfAlternateDirector`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of registered director in the case a person appointed as an alternate director to another director (alternate to).

**Amortisation expense**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmortisationExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortisation expenses. The systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

**Amortisation method, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationMethodIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amortisation method used for intangible assets other than goodwill with finite useful lives. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill; Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Amortisation method, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmortisationMethodIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amortisation method used for intangible assets other than goodwill with finite useful lives. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill; Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Amortisation of losses (gains) arising on buying reinsurance**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationOfGainsAndLossesArisingOnBuyingReinsurance`
- Description: The amount of amortisation of deferred losses (gains) arising from the purchase of reinsurance. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Gains (losses) recognised in profit or loss on buying reinsurance]

**Amortisation rate, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationRateIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amortisation rate used for intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Amortisation, assets recognised from costs incurred to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationAssetsRecognisedFromCostsIncurredToObtainOrFulfilContractsWithCustomers`
- Description: The amount of amortisation for assets recognised from the costs incurred to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers. [Refer: Assets recognised from costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers; Amortisation expense]

**Amortisation, deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationDeferredAcquisitionCostsArisingFromInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The amount of amortisation of deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts. [Refer: Deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts; Depreciation and amortisation expense; Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Amortisation, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmortisationGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of amortisation of goodwill. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Goodwill]

**Amortisation, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmortisationIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of amortisation of intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Amortisation, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmortisationIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of amortisation of intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Amount agreed to be considered as paid on shares which have been issued as fully paid up otherwise than in cash**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountAgreedToBeConsideredAsPaidOnSharesWhichHaveBeenIssuedAsFullyPaidUpOtherwiseThanInCash`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount, if any, agreed  to be considered as paid on shares which have been issued as fully paid up otherwise than in cash.

**Amount agreed to be considered as paid on shares which have been issued as partly paid up otherwise than in cash**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountAgreedToBeConsideredAsPaidOnSharesWhichHaveBeenIssuedAsPartlyPaidUpOtherwiseThanInCash`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount, if any, agreed  to be considered as paid on shares which have been issued as partly paid up otherwise than in cash.

**Amount allowed by way of discount in respect of any debentures since the date of last return**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountAllowedByWayOfDiscountInRespectOfAnyDebenturesSinceTheDateOfLastReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of sums, if any, allowed by way of discount in respect of any debentures since the date of last return.

**Amount by which credit derivatives or similar instruments related to financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss mitigate maximum exposure to credit risk**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichFinancialAssetsRelatedCreditDerivativesOrSimilarInstrumentsMitigateMaximumExposureToCreditRisk`
- Description: The amount by which credit derivatives or similar instruments related to financial assets designated as measured at fair value through profit or loss mitigate maximum exposure to credit risk. [Refer: Loans and receivables; Credit risk [member]; Derivatives [member]; Maximum exposure to credit risk; Financial assets]

**Amount by which credit derivatives or similar instruments related to loans or receivables mitigate maximum exposure to credit risk**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichLoansOrReceivablesRelatedCreditDerivativesOrSimilarInstrumentsMitigateMaximumExposureToCreditRisk`
- Description: The amount by which credit derivatives or similar instruments related to loans or receivables mitigate maximum exposure to credit risk. [Refer: Loans and receivables; Credit risk [member]; Maximum exposure to credit risk; Derivatives [member]]

**Amount by which regulatory deferral account credit balance has been reduced because it is no longer fully reversible**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichRegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalanceHasBeenReducedBecauseItIsNoLongerFullyReversible`
- Description: The amount by which a regulatory deferral account credit balance has been reduced because it is no longer fully reversible. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances]

**Amount by which regulatory deferral account debit balance has been reduced because it is no longer fully recoverable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalanceHasBeenReducedBecauseItIsNoLongerFullyRecoverable`
- Description: The amount by which a regulatory deferral account debit balance has been reduced because it is no longer fully recoverable. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Amount by which unit's recoverable amount exceeds its carrying amount**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichUnitsRecoverableAmountExceedsItsCarryingAmount`
- Description: The amount by which a cash-generating unit's (group of units') recoverable amount exceeds its carrying amount. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]; Cash-generating units [member]]

**Amount by which value assigned to key assumption must change in order for unit's recoverable amount to be equal to carrying amount**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountByWhichValueAssignedToKeyAssumptionMustChangeInOrderForUnitsRecoverableAmountToBeEqualToCarryingAmount`
- Description: The amount by which value that has been assigned to a key assumption must change in order for a unit's recoverable amount to be equal to its carrying amount. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]]

**Amount incurred by entity for provision of key management personnel services provided by separate management entity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountIncurredByEntityForProvisionOfKeyManagementPersonnelServicesProvidedBySeparateManagementEntity`
- Description: The amount incurred by the entity for provision of key management personnel services that are provided by a separate management entity. [Refer: Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]; Separate management entities [member]]

**Amount of authorized share capital**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfAuthorizedShareCapital`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of authorized share capital

**Amount of calls received including payments on application and allotment**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfCallsReceivedIncludingPaymentsOnApplicationAndAllotment`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of calls received including payments on application and allotment include what has been received on forfeited as well as on existing shares.

**Amount of calls unpaid**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfCallsUnpaid`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of calls unpaid.

**Amount of indebtedness**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfIndebtedness`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the amount of the indebtedness.

**Amount of issued share capital**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfIssuedShareCapital`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to Amount of issued share capital

**Amount of other changes in shares issued and fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfOtherChangesInSharesIssuedAndFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued and fully paid which are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Amount of other changes in shares issued but not fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfOtherChangesInSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaid`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in the amount of shares issued but not fully paid.

**Amount of outstanding shares issued during period**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfOutstandingSharesIssuedDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the amount of shares issued during the financial year.

**Amount of reclassifications or changes in presentation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountOfReclassificationsOrChangesInPresentation`
- Description: The amount that is reclassified when the entity changes classification or presentation in its financial statements.

**Amount of reclassifications or changes in presentation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmountOfReclassificationsOrChangesInPresentation`
- Description: The amount that is reclassified when the entity changes classification or presentation in its financial statements.

**Amount of shares arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesArisingFromConversionOfICULSByMandatoryConversion`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion.

**Amount of shares arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesArisingFromConversionOfICULSBySurrenderOption`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option.

**Amount of shares has been called up**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfSharesCalledUp`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of shares has been called up.

**Amount of shares issued and fully paid, issued during the period**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaidDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares issued  during the financial year.

**Amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedAndFullyPaidOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares issued and fully paid.

**Amount of shares issued as fully paid**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfSharesIssuedAsFullyPaid`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of shares issued as fully paid.

**Amount of shares issued as partly unpaid**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfSharesIssuedAsPartlyUnpaid`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of shares issued as partly unpaid.

**Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, issued during the period**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaidDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued but not fully paid.

**Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, issued during the period**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaidDuringPeriod`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the amount of shares issued but not fully paid.

**Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AmountOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaidOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding at the beginning of the period.

**Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedButNotFullyPaidOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding at the beginning of the period.

**Amount of shares issued for cash under ESOS**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedForCashUnderESOS`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under ESOS.

**Amount of shares issued for cash under private placement**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesIssuedForCashUnderPrivatePlacement`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under private placement.

**Amount of shares outstanding**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmountOfSharesOutstanding`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the amount of shares outstanding.

**Amount of the indebtedness in foreign currency**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfIndebtednessInForeignCurrency`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of the indebtedness in foreign currency

**Amount paid by way of commission in respect of any shares or debentures since the date of last return**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountPaidByWayOfCommissionInRespectOfAnySharesOrDebenturesSinceTheDateOfLastReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of sums, if any, paid by way of commission in respect of any shares or debentures since the date of last return.

**Amount paid on shares forfeited**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountPaidOnSharesForfeited`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount paid, if any, on shares forfeited.

**Amount presented in other comprehensive income realised at derecognition of financial liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountPresentedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeRealisedAtDerecognition`
- Description: The amount presented in other comprehensive income that was realised at derecognition of financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Amount reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income applying overlay approach**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountReclassifiedFromProfitOrLossToOtherComprehensiveIncomeApplyingOverlayApproach`
- Description: The amount reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income when applying the overlay approach, presented as a separate line item in profit or loss.

**Amount reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income applying overlay approach, newly designated financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountReclassifiedFromProfitOrLossToOtherComprehensiveIncomeApplyingOverlayApproachNewlyDesignatedFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income relating to newly designated financial assets applying the overlay approach.

**Amount reclassified to other comprehensive income from profit or loss applying overlay approach, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountReclassifiedToOtherComprehensiveIncomeFromProfitOrLossApplyingOverlayApproachBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount recognised in other comprehensive income on reclassification from profit or loss when applying the overlay approach, before tax. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Amount reclassified to other comprehensive income from profit or loss applying overlay approach, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountReclassifiedToOtherComprehensiveIncomeFromProfitOrLossApplyingOverlayApproachNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount recognised in other comprehensive income on reclassification from profit or loss when applying the overlay approach, net of tax. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Amount recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity relating to non-current assets or disposal groups held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeAndAccumulatedInEquityRelatingToNoncurrentAssetsOrDisposalGroupsHeldForSale`
- Description: The amount recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity, relating to non-current assets or disposal groups held for sale. [Refer: Non-current assets or disposal groups classified as held for sale; Other reserves; Other comprehensive income; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Amount recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity relating to non-current assets or disposal groups held for sale [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeAndAccumulatedInEquityRelatingToNoncurrentAssetsOrDisposalGroupsHeldForSaleMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity resulting from amounts that are recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity that relate to non-current assets or disposal groups held for sale. [Refer: Non-current assets or disposal groups classified as held for sale; Other comprehensive income]

**Amount recognised in profit or loss for reporting period to reflect changes in lease payments that arise from rent concessions occurring as direct consequence of covid-19 pandemic to which lessee applied practical expedient in paragraph 46A of IFRS 16**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRecognisedInProfitOrLossForReportingPeriodToReflectChangesInLeasePaymentsThatAriseFromRentConcessionsOccurringAsDirectConsequenceOfCovid19PandemicToWhichLesseeAppliedPracticalExpedientInParagraph46AOfIFRS16`
- Description: The amount recognised in profit or loss for the reporting period to reflect changes in lease payments that arise from rent concessions occurring as a direct consequence of the covid-19 pandemic, to which the lessee has applied the practical expedient in paragraph 46A of IFRS 16.

**Amount removed from reserve of cash flow hedges and included in initial cost or other carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) or firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRemovedFromReserveOfCashFlowHedgesAndIncludedInInitialCostOrOtherCarryingAmountOfNonfinancialAssetLiabilityOrFirmCommitmentForWhichFairValueHedgeAccountingIsApplied`
- Description: The amount removed from reserve of cash flow hedges and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) or a firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied. [Refer: Reserve of cash flow hedges]

**Amount removed from reserve of change in value of foreign currency basis spreads and included in initial cost or other carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) or firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRemovedFromReserveOfChangeInValueOfForeignCurrencyBasisSpreadsAndIncludedInInitialCostOrOtherCarryingAmountOfNonfinancialAssetLiabilityOrFirmCommitmentForWhichFairValueHedgeAccountingIsApplied`
- Description: The amount removed from reserve of change in value of foreign currency basis spreads and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) or a firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied. [Refer: Reserve of change in value of foreign currency basis spreads]

**Amount removed from reserve of change in value of forward elements of forward contracts and included in initial cost or other carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) or firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRemovedFromReserveOfChangeInValueOfForwardElementsOfForwardContractsAndIncludedInInitialCostOrOtherCarryingAmountOfNonfinancialAssetLiabilityOrFirmCommitmentForWhichFairValueHedgeAccountingIsApplied`
- Description: The amount removed from reserve of change in value of forward elements of forward contracts and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) or a firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied. [Refer: Reserve of change in value of forward elements of forward contracts]

**Amount removed from reserve of change in value of time value of options and included in initial cost or other carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) or firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountRemovedFromReserveOfChangeInValueOfTimeValueOfOptionsAndIncludedInInitialCostOrOtherCarryingAmountOfNonfinancialAssetLiabilityOrFirmCommitmentForWhichFairValueHedgeAccountingIsApplied`
- Description: The amount removed from reserve of change in value of time value of options and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) or a firm commitment for which fair value hedge accounting is applied. [Refer: Reserve of change in value of time value of options]

**Amount reported in profit or loss applying IFRS 9, financial assets to which overlay approach is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountReportedInProfitOrLossApplyingIFRS9FinancialAssetsToWhichOverlayApproachIsApplied`
- Description: The amount reported in profit or loss applying IFRS 9 for financial assets to which the overlay approach is applied.

**Amount that would have been reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income applying overlay approach if financial assets had not been de-designated**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountThatWouldHaveBeenReclassifiedFromProfitOrLossToOtherComprehensiveIncomeApplyingOverlayApproachIfFinancialAssetsHadNotBeenDedesignated`
- Description: The amount that would have been reclassified from profit or loss to other comprehensive income if financial assets had not been de-designated from the overlay approach.

**Amount that would have been reported in profit or loss if IAS 39 had been applied, financial assets to which overlay approach is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountThatWouldHaveBeenReportedInProfitOrLossIfIAS39HadBeenAppliedFinancialAssetsToWhichOverlayApproachIsApplied`
- Description: The amount that would have been reported in profit or loss for financial assets to which the overlay approach is applied if IAS 39 had been applied.

**Amounts arising from insurance contracts [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsArisingFromInsuranceContractsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Amounts incurred, deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsIncurredDeferredAcquisitionCostsArisingFromInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The increase in deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts resulting from amounts of those costs incurred. [Refer: Deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts]

**Amounts payable on demand that arise from contracts within scope of IFRS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsPayableOnDemandThatAriseFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17`
- Description: The amounts payable on demand that arise from contracts within the scope of IFRS 17.

**Amounts payable, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmountsPayableRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts payable to related parties.

**Amounts receivable, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AmountsReceivableRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts receivable from related parties.

**Amounts recognised for transaction recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsRecognisedForTransactionRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amounts recognised for transaction recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and the assumption of liabilities in business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Amounts removed from equity and included in carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) whose acquisition or incurrence was hedged highly probable forecast transaction, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsRemovedFromEquityAndIncludedInCarryingAmountOfNonfinancialAssetLiabilityWhoseAcquisitionOrIncurrenceWasHedgedHighlyProbableForecastTransactionBeforeTax`
- Description: The amounts removed from equity and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) whose acquisition or incurrence was a hedged, highly probable forecast transaction, before tax. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]]

**Amounts removed from equity and included in carrying amount of non-financial asset (liability) whose acquisition or incurrence was hedged highly probable forecast transaction, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AdjustmentsForAmountsTransferredToInitialCarryingAmountOfHedgedItems`
- Description: The amounts removed from equity and included in the initial cost or other carrying amount of a non-financial asset (liability) whose acquisition or incurrence was a hedged, highly probable forecast transaction, net of tax. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]]

**Amounts subject to enforceable master netting arrangement or similar agreement not set off against financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsSubjectToEnforceableMasterNettingArrangementOrSimilarAgreementNotSetOffAgainstFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amounts that are subject to an enforceable master netting arrangement or similar agreement and that are not set off against financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Amounts subject to enforceable master netting arrangement or similar agreement not set off against financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AmountsSubjectToEnforceableMasterNettingArrangementOrSimilarAgreementNotSetOffAgainstFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amounts that are subject to an enforceable master netting arrangement or similar agreement and that are not set off against financial liabilities. [Refer: Financial liabilities]

**Analysis of age of financial assets that are past due but not impaired [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnalysisOfAgeOfFinancialAssetsThatArePastDueButNotImpaired`
- Description: Analysis of the age of financial assets that are past due but not impaired. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Analysis of change in deferred tax assets [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AnalysisOfChangeInDeferredTaxAssetsExplanatory`
- Description: Analysis of the change in deferred tax assets. [Refer: Deferred tax assets]

**Analysis of change in deferred tax liabilities [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AnalysisOfChangeInDeferredTaxLiabilitiesExplanatory`
- Description: Analysis of the change in deferred tax liabilities. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities]

**Analysis of credit exposures using external credit grading system [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnalysisOfCreditExposuresUsingExternalCreditGradingSystemExplanatory`
- Description: The disclosure of an analysis of credit exposures using an external credit grading system. [Refer: Credit exposure; External credit grades [member]]

**Analysis of credit exposures using internal credit grading system [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnalysisOfCreditExposuresUsingInternalCreditGradingSystemExplanatory`
- Description: The disclosure of an analysis of credit exposures using an internal credit grading system. [Refer: Credit exposure; Internal credit grades [member]]

**Analysis of financial assets that are individually determined to be impaired [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnalysisOfFinancialAssetsThatAreIndividuallyDeterminedToBeImpaired`
- Description: Analysis of financial assets that are individually determined to be impaired, including the factors that the entity considered when determining that they are impaired. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Announcement of plan to discontinue operation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnouncementOfPlanToDiscontinueOperationMember`
- Description: This member stands for the announcement of a plan to discontinue an operation.

**Announcement of plan to discontinue operation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AnnouncementOfPlanToDiscontinueOperationMember`
- Description: This member stands for the announcement of a plan to discontinue an operation.

**Announcing or commencing implementation of major restructuring [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnouncingOrCommencingImplementationOfMajorRestructuringMember`
- Description: This member stands for announcing or commencing implementation of major restructuring.

**Announcing or commencing implementation of major restructuring [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AnnouncingOrCommencingImplementationOfMajorRestructuringMember`
- Description: This member stands for announcing or commencing implementation of major restructuring.

**Annual Improvements 2018-20 Amendments to IAS 41 [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnualImprovements201820AmendmentsToIAS41Member`
- Description: This member stands for Amendments to IAS 41 issued as part of Annual Improvements to IFRS Standards 2018-20 in May 2020. Subject of the amendment is Taxation in Fair Value Measurements.

**Annual Improvements 2018-20 Amendments to IFRS 1 [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnualImprovements201820AmendmentsToIFRS1Member`
- Description: This member stands for Amendments to IFRS 1 issued as part of Annual Improvements to IFRS Standards 2018-20 in May 2020. Subject of the amendment is Subsidiary as a First-time Adopter.

**Annual Improvements 2018-20 Amendments to IFRS 9 [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnualImprovements201820AmendmentsToIFRS9Member`
- Description: This member stands for Amendments to IFRS 9 issued as part of Annual Improvements to IFRS Standards 2018-20 in May 2020. Subject of the amendment is Fees in the '10 per cent' Test for Derecognition of Financial Liabilities.

**Annual Improvements to IFRS Standards 2018-20 [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AnnualImprovementsToIFRSStandards201820Member`
- Description: This member stands for Annual Improvements to IFRS Standards 2018-20 issued in May 2020.

**Applicable tax rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ApplicableTaxRate`
- Description: The applicable income tax rate.

**Application date**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_ReportingDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the reporting date on which the exemption application is prepared.

**Application of submission**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_ApplicationOfSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the application of submission on the filing.

**Area of land used for agriculture**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AreaOfLandUsedForAgriculture`
- Description: The area of land used for agriculture by the entity.

**Arising from conversion of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stock (ICULS)**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncreaseDecreaseThroughConversionOfConvertibleInstruments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of conversion of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stock (ICULS). ICULS is a type of security that can be used to purchase underlying common shares.

**Assessment and quit rent**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AssessmentAndQuitRent`
- Description: Represents the amount of expenses related to assessment and quit rent.

**Assessment and quit rent**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AssessmentAndQuitRent`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of assessment and quit rent.

**Asset recognised for expected reimbursement, contingent liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetRecognisedForExpectedReimbursementContingentLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amount of assets that have been recognised for the expected reimbursement of contingent liabilities recognised in a business combination. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]; Expected reimbursement, contingent liabilities in business combination; Business combinations [member]]

**Asset recognised for expected reimbursement, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetRecognisedForExpectedReimbursementOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of assets that have been recognised for the expected reimbursement of other provisions. [Refer: Expected reimbursement, other provisions; Other provisions]

**Asset recognised for expected reimbursement, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetRecognisedForExpectedReimbursementOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of assets that have been recognised for the expected reimbursement of other provisions. [Refer: Expected reimbursement, other provisions; Other provisions]

**Asset-backed debt instruments held**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetbackedDebtInstrumentsHeld`
- Description: The amount of debt instruments held that are backed by underlying assets. [Refer: Debt instruments held]

**Asset-backed financings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetbackedFinancingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for asset-backed financings.

**Asset-backed securities, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetbackedSecuritiesAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount securities that are backed by underlying assets contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Asset-backed securities, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetbackedSecuritiesPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage securities that are backed by underlying assets contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]] [Contrast: Asset-backed securities, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets]

**Assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Assets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of assets held by the reporting entity. An asset is a resource controlled by the entity as a result of past events and from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity

**Assets (liabilities)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_NetAssetsLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of assets less the amount of liabilities.

**Assets (liabilities) of benefit plan**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsLiabilitiesOfBenefitPlan`
- Description: The amount of assets of a retirement benefit plan less liabilities other than the actuarial present value of promised retirement benefits.

**Assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ClassesOfAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a present economic resource controlled by the entity as a result of past events. Economic resource is a right that has the potential to produce economic benefits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of assets' axis if no other member is used.

**Assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ClassesOfAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for resources: (a) controlled by an entity as a result of past events; and (b) from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of assets' axis if no other member is used.

**Assets and liabilities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndLiabilitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Assets and liabilities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetsAndLiabilitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Assets and liabilities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndLiabilitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for assets and liabilities. It also represents the standard value for the 'Assets and liabilities' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Assets; Liabilities]

**Assets and liabilities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetsAndLiabilitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for assets and liabilities. It also represents the standard value for the 'Assets and liabilities' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Assets; Liabilities]

**Assets and liabilities classified as held for sale [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndLiabilitiesClassifiedAsHeldForSaleAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Assets and liabilities classified as held for sale [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndLiabilitiesClassifiedAsHeldForSaleMember`
- Description: This member stands for assets and liabilities that are classified as held for sale. [Refer: Non-current assets held for sale [member]; Liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Assets and liabilities not classified as held for sale [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndLiabilitiesNotClassifiedAsHeldForSaleMember`
- Description: This member stands for assets and liabilities that are not classified as held for sale. It also represents the standard value for the 'Assets and liabilities classified as held for sale' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Non-current assets held for sale [member]; Liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Assets and regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsAndRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The amount of assets and regulatory deferral account debit balances. [Refer: Assets; Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Assets arising from exploration for and evaluation of mineral resources**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsArisingFromExplorationForAndEvaluationOfMineralResources`
- Description: The amount of assets arising from the search for mineral resources, including minerals, oil, natural gas and similar non-regenerative resources after the entity has obtained legal rights to explore in a specific area, as well as the determination of the technical feasibility and commercial viability of extracting the mineral resource.

**Assets arising from insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsArisingFromInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The amount of recognised assets arising from insurance contracts. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Assets for insurance acquisition cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsForInsuranceAcquisitionCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of insurance acquisition cash flows that are assets, recognised for insurance acquisition cash flows paid (or insurance acquisition cash flows for which a liability has been recognised applying another IFRS Standard) before the related group of insurance contracts is recognised. Insurance acquisition cash flows are cash flows arising from the costs of selling, underwriting and starting a group of insurance contracts (issued or expected to be issued) that are directly attributable to the portfolio of insurance contracts to which the group belongs. Such cash flows include cash flows that are not directly attributable to individual contracts or groups of insurance contracts within the portfolio. [Refer: Assets; Insurance contracts [member]]

**Assets for which entity has binding sale agreement**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetsForWhichEntityHasBindingSaleAgreement`
- Description: The amount of assets for which the entity has a binding sale agreement.

**Assets held to hedge liabilities arising from financing activities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsHeldToHedgeLiabilitiesArisingFromFinancingActivitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for assets held to hedge liabilities arising from financing activities. [Refer: Assets; Liabilities arising from financing activities]

**Assets less current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsLessCurrentLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of assets less the amount of current liabilities.

**Assets obtained by taking possession of collateral or calling on other credit enhancements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsObtained`
- Description: The amount of assets obtained by the entity taking possession of the collateral it holds as security or calling on other credit enhancements (for example, guarantees). [Refer: Guarantees [member]]

**Assets of benefit plan**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsOfBenefitPlan`
- Description: The amount of assets held by retirement benefit plans. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_AssetsOrDisposalGroupClassifiedAsHeldForSaleOrAsHeldForDistributionToOwners`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

**Assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AssetsOrDisposalGroupClassifiedAsHeldForSaleOrAsHeldForDistributionToOwners`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

**Assets other than assets held for sale**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AssetsOtherThanAssetsHeldForSale`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to assets other than assets held for sale.

**Assets other than cash or cash equivalents in subsidiary or businesses acquired or disposed**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsOtherThanCashOrCashEquivalentsInSubsidiaryOrBusinessesAcquiredOrDisposed2013`
- Description: The amount of assets, other than cash or cash equivalents, in subsidiaries or other businesses over which control is obtained or lost. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]]

**Assets recognised from costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsRecognisedFromCostsToObtainOrFulfilContractsWithCustomers`
- Description: The amount of assets recognised from the costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers. The costs to obtain a contract with a customer are the incremental costs of obtaining the contract that the entity would not have incurred if the contract had not been obtained. The costs to fulfil a contract with a customer are the costs that relate directly to a contract or to an anticipated contract that the entity can specifically identify.

**Assets recognised in entity's financial statements in relation to structured entities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsRecognisedInEntitysFinancialStatementsInRelationToStructuredEntities`
- Description: The amount of assets recognised in the entity's financial statements relating to its interests in structured entities. [Refer: Assets; Unconsolidated structured entities [member]]

**Assets that entity continues to recognise**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsThatEntityContinuesToRecognise`
- Description: The amount of transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise in full. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Assets that entity continues to recognise**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetsThatEntityContinuesToRecognise`
- Description: The amount of transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise in full. [Refer: Financial assets, class [member]]

**Assets that entity continues to recognise to extent of continuing involvement**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsThatEntityContinuesToRecogniseToExtentOfContinuingInvolvement`
- Description: The amount of transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise to the extent of its continuing involvement. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Assets to which significant restrictions apply**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsToWhichSignificantRestrictionsApply`
- Description: The amount in the consolidated financial statements of the assets of the group to which significant restrictions (for example, statutory, contractual and regulatory restrictions) apply on the entity's ability to access or use the assets.

**Assets transferred to structured entities, at time of transfer**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsTransferredToStructuredEntitiesAtTimeOfTransfer`
- Description: The amount, at the time of transfer, of all assets transferred to structured entities. [Refer: Unconsolidated structured entities [member]]

**Assets under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsUnderInsuranceContractsAndReinsuranceContractsIssued`
- Description: The amount of assets under insurance contracts and reinsurance contracts issued. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Assets under reinsurance ceded**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsUnderReinsuranceCeded`
- Description: The amount of assets under reinsurance contracts in which the entity is the policyholder.

**Assets with significant risk of material adjustments within next financial year**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssetsWithSignificantRiskOfMaterialAdjustmentsWithinNextFinancialYear`
- Description: The amount of assets subject to assumptions that have a significant risk of resulting in a material adjustment to the amounts of those assets within the next financial year.

**Assets with significant risk of material adjustments within next financial year**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssetsWithSignificantRiskOfMaterialAdjustmentsWithinNextFinancialYear`
- Description: The amount of assets subject to assumptions that have a significant risk of resulting in a material adjustment to the amounts of those assets within the next financial year.

**Associated liabilities that entity continues to recognise**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssociatedLiabilitiesThatEntityContinuesToRecognise`
- Description: The amount of liabilities associated with transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise in full. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Associated liabilities that entity continues to recognise**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AssociatedLiabilitiesThatEntityContinuesToRecognise`
- Description: The amount of liabilities associated with transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise in full. [Refer: Financial assets, class [member]]

**Associated liabilities that entity continues to recognise to extent of continuing involvement**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AssociatedLiabilitiesThatEntityContinuesToRecogniseToExtentOfContinuingInvolvement`
- Description: The amount of liabilities associated with transferred financial assets that the entity continues to recognise to the extent of its continuing involvement. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Associates [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantInvestmentsInAssociatesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Associates [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AssociatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the  associates. An associate is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.

**At cost [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AtCostMember`
- Description: This member stands for measurement based on cost. Cost is the amount of cash or cash equivalents paid or the fair value of the other consideration given to acquire an asset at the time of its acquisition or construction, or, when applicable, the amount attributed to that asset when initially recognised in accordance with the specific requirements of other IFRSs.

**At cost [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AtCostMember`
- Description: This member stands for measurement based on cost. Cost is the amount of cash or cash equivalents paid or the fair value of the other consideration given to acquire an asset at the time of its acquisition or construction, or, when applicable, the amount attributed to that asset when initially recognised in accordance with the specific requirements of other sections of IFRS for SMEs.

**At cost or in accordance with IFRS 16 within fair value model [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AtCostOrInAccordanceWithIFRS16WithinFairValueModelMember`
- Description: This member stands for measurement based on cost or IFRS 16 when the fair value model is generally used by the entity to measure a class of assets. [Refer: At cost [member]]

**At fair value [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AtFairValueMember`
- Description: This member stands for measurement based on fair value. Fair value is the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date.

**At fair value [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_AtFairValueMember`
- Description: This member stands for measurement based on fair value. Fair value is the amount for which an asset could be exchanged, a liability settled, or an equity instrument granted could be exchanged, between knowledgeable, willing parties in an arm's length transaction.

**Attribution of expenses by nature to their function [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AttributionOfExpensesByNatureToTheirFunctionAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Audit exemption category**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_AuditExemptionCategory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of private company covered under audit exemption.

**Audit firm number**
- Element: `ssmt_AuditFirmNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to audit firm number.

**Auditor's remuneration**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AuditorsRemuneration`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of auditor's remuneration.

**Auditor's remuneration for audit services**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AuditorsRemunerationForAuditServices`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for audit services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

**Auditor's remuneration for other services**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AuditorsRemunerationForOtherServices`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for other services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

**Auditor's remuneration for tax services**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AuditorsRemunerationForTaxServices`
- Description: The amount of fees paid or payable to the entity's auditors for tax services.

**Authorised capital commitments but not contracted for**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AuthorisedCapitalCommitmentsButNotContractedFor`
- Description: The amount of capital commitments that have been authorised by the entity, but for which the entity has not entered into a contract. [Refer: Capital commitments]

**Average effective tax rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AverageEffectiveTaxRate`
- Description: The tax expense (income) divided by the accounting profit. [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Average foreign exchange rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AverageForeignExchangeRate`
- Description: The average exchange rate used by the entity. Exchange rate is the ratio of exchange for two currencies.

**Average number of employees**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AverageNumberOfEmployees`
- Description: The average number of personnel employed by the entity during a period.

**Average price of hedging instrument**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AveragePriceOfHedgingInstrument`
- Description: The average price of a hedging instrument. [Refer: Hedging instruments [member]]

**Average rate of hedging instrument**
- Element: `ifrs-full_AverageRateOfHedgingInstrument`
- Description: The average rate of a hedging instrument. [Refer: Hedging instruments [member]]

**Bad debts recovered**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BadDebtsRecovered`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bad debts recovered. A debt incurred from a loan, a credit line, or an accounts receivable that is recovered either in whole or in part after it had been written off or classified by the entity as a bad debt.

**Balances on current accounts from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BalancesOnCurrentAccountsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of balances in customers' current accounts held by the entity.

**Balances on demand deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BalancesOnDemandDepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of balances in customers' demand deposits held by the entity.

**Balances on other deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BalancesOnOtherDepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of balances in customers' deposit accounts held by the entity that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note.

**Balances on term deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BalancesOnTermDepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of balances in customers' term deposits held by the entity.

**Balances with banks**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BalancesWithBanks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money held in a bank account at a given moment.

**Bank acceptance assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankAcceptanceAssets`
- Description: The amount of bank acceptances recognised as assets.

**Bank acceptance liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankAcceptanceLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of bank acceptances recognised as liabilities.

**Bank and similar charges**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankAndSimilarCharges`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bank charges.

**Bank balances at central banks other than mandatory reserve deposits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankBalancesAtCentralBanksOtherThanMandatoryReserveDeposits`
- Description: The amount of bank balances held at central banks other than mandatory reserve deposits. [Refer: Mandatory reserve deposits at central banks]

**Bank borrowings, undiscounted cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankBorrowingsUndiscountedCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of contractual undiscounted cash flows in relation to bank borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Bank debt instruments held**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BankDebtInstrumentsHeld`
- Description: The amount of debt instruments held by the entity that were issued by a bank. [Refer: Debt instruments held]

**Bank overdrafts**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BankOverdraftsClassifiedAsCashEquivalents`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured debit balances of the current account.

**Basic earnings (loss) per instrument from continuing operations, participating equity instruments other than ordinary shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerInstrumentFromContinuingOperationsParticipatingEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOrdinaryShares`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per instrument from continuing operations for an equity instrument that participates in profit with ordinary shares according to a predetermined formula. [Refer: Basic earnings (loss) per instrument, participating equity instruments other than ordinary shares; Continuing operations [member]]

**Basic earnings (loss) per instrument from discontinued operations, participating equity instruments other than ordinary shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerInstrumentFromDiscontinuedOperationsParticipatingEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOrdinaryShares`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per instrument from discontinued operations for an equity instrument that participates in profit with ordinary shares according to a predetermined formula. [Refer: Basic earnings (loss) per instrument, participating equity instruments other than ordinary shares; Discontinued operations [member]]

**Basic earnings (loss) per instrument, participating equity instruments other than ordinary shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerInstrumentParticipatingEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOrdinaryShares`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per share for an equity instrument that participates in profit with ordinary shares according to a predetermined formula.

**Basic earnings (loss) per share from continuing operations, including net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and net movement in related deferred tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerShareFromContinuingOperationsIncludingNetMovementInRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesAndNetMovementInRelatedDeferredTax`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per share from continuing operations that include the net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and the net movement in related deferred tax. [Refer: Basic earnings (loss) per share; Net movement in regulatory deferral account balances related to profit or loss and net movement in related deferred tax; Continuing operations [member]]

**Basic earnings (loss) per share from discontinued operations, including net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and net movement in related deferred tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerShareFromDiscontinuedOperationsIncludingNetMovementInRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesAndNetMovementInRelatedDeferredTax`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per share from discontinued operations that include the net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and the net movement in related deferred tax. [Refer: Basic earnings (loss) per share; Net movement in regulatory deferral account balances related to profit or loss and net movement in related deferred tax; Discontinued operations [member]]

**Basic earnings (loss) per share, including net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and net movement in related deferred tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BasicEarningsLossPerShareIncludingNetMovementInRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesAndNetMovementInRelatedDeferredTax`
- Description: Basic earnings (loss) per share that include the net movement in regulatory deferral account balances and the net movement in related deferred tax. [Refer: Basic earnings (loss) per share; Net movement in regulatory deferral account balances related to profit or loss and net movement in related deferred tax]

**Basis of accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_BasisOfAccountingStandardsAppliedToPrepareFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to basis of accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements.

**Bearer biological assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BearerBiologicalAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for bearer biological assets. Bearer biological assets are those other than consumable biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets; Consumable biological assets [member]]

**Bearer plants [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BearerPlantsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing bearer plants. Bearer plant is a living plant that (a) is used in the production or supply of agricultural produce; (b) is expected to bear produce for more than one period; and (c) has a remote likelihood of being sold as agricultural produce, except for incidental scrap sales. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Benefits paid or payable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BenefitsPaidOrPayable`
- Description: The amount of benefits paid or payable for retirement benefit plans.

**Benefits-in-kind**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BenefitsInKindExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of benefits in kind which are allowances or additional compensation that are not included in the paycheck as wages, but carry financial value.

**Best estimate at acquisition date of contractual cash flows not expected to be collected for acquired receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BestEstimateAtAcquisitionDateOfContractualCashFlowsNotExpectedToBeCollectedForAcquiredReceivables`
- Description: The best estimate at acquisition date of contractual cash flows not expected to be collected for receivables acquired in business combinations. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of a biological asset which consist of living animal or plant.

**Biological assets [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Biological assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for living animals or plants. It also represents the standard value for the 'Biological assets' axis if no other member is used.

**Biological assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BiologicalAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for living animals or plants.

**Biological assets by age [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsByAgeAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Biological assets by group [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsByGroupAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Biological assets by type [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsByTypeAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Biological assets pledged as security for liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsPledgedAsSecurityForLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of biological assets pledged as security for liabilities. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Biological assets whose title is restricted**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsWhoseTitleIsRestricted`
- Description: The amount of biological assets whose title is restricted. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Biological assets, age [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsAgeMember`
- Description: This member stands for all biological assets when disaggregated by age. It also represents the standard value for the 'Biological assets by age' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Biological assets, at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The amount of biological assets carried at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: At cost [member]; Biological assets]

**Biological assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BiologicalAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of biological assets carried at fair value. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Biological assets]

**Biological assets, group [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsGroupMember`
- Description: This member stands for all biological assets when disaggregated by group. It also represents the standard value for the 'Biological assets by group' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Biological assets, type [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BiologicalAssetsTypeMember`
- Description: This member stands for all biological assets when disaggregated by type. It also represents the standard value for the 'Biological assets by type' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Bodies corporate controlled by citizens who are Malays and natives [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BodiesCorporateControlledByCitizensWhoAreMalaysAndNativesMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to bodies corporate controlled by citizens who are Malays and natives.

**Bodies corporate controlled by citizens who are non-Malays and non-natives [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BodiesCorporateControlledByCitizensWhoAreNonMalaysAndNonNativesMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to bodies corporate controlled by citizens who are non-Malays and non-natives.

**Bodies corporate controlled by non-citizens [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_BodiesCorporateControlledByNonCitizensMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to bodies corporate controlled by non-citizens.

**Bonds issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BondsIssued`
- Description: The amount of bonds issued by the entity.

**Bonds issued, undiscounted cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BondsIssuedUndiscountedCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of contractual undiscounted cash flows in relation to bonds issued. [Refer: Bonds issued]

**Bonus**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BonusExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of wages, salaries, paid annual leave and sick leave, bonuses and non-monetary benefits which are accrued in the period in which the services are rendered by employees.

**Bonus**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BonusToDirectors`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bonus which are additional compensation given to directors above their normal salaries.

**Borrowing costs capitalised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingCostsCapitalised`
- Description: The amount of interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds that are directly attributable to the acquisition, construction or production of a qualifying asset and which form part of the cost of that asset.

**Borrowing costs incurred**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingCostsIncurred`
- Description: The amount of interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

**Borrowing costs recognised as expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingCostsRecognisedAsExpense`
- Description: The amount of interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds that are recognised as an expense.

**Borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Borrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the entity is obligated to repay.

**Borrowings by name [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsByNameAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Borrowings by name [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsByNameMember`
- Description: This member stands for all borrowings when disaggregated by name. It also represents the standard value for the 'Borrowings by name' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Borrowings recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for borrowings assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Borrowings; Business combinations [member]]

**Borrowings, adjustment to interest rate basis**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsAdjustmentToInterestRateBasis`
- Description: The adjustment to the basis (reference rate) used for calculation of the interest rate on borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Borrowings, interest rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsInterestRate`
- Description: The interest rate on borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Borrowings, interest rate basis**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsInterestRateBasis`
- Description: The basis (reference rate) used for calculation of the interest rate on borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Borrowings, maturity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsMaturity`
- Description: The maturity of borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Borrowings, original currency**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BorrowingsOriginalCurrency`
- Description: The currency in which the borrowings are denominated. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Bottom of range [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BottomOfRangeMember`
- Description: This member stands for the bottom of a range.

**Branches and places of business count [axis]**
- Element: `ssmt_BranchesAndPlacesOfBusinessCountAxis`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of branches of the company.

**Brand names**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BrandNames`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets representing rights to a group of complementary assets such as a trademark (or service mark) and its related trade name, formulas, recipes and technological expertise. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Brand names [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BrandNamesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing rights to a group of complementary assets such as a trademark (or service mark) and its related trade name, formulas, recipes and technological expertise. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Brand names [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BrandNamesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing rights to a group of complementary assets such as a trademark (or service mark) and its related trade name, formulas, recipes and technological expertise. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Broadcasting rights [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BroadcastingRightsMember`
- Description: This member stands for broadcasting rights.

**Brokerage fee expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BrokerageFeeExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense recognised for brokerage fees charged to the entity.

**Brokerage fee income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BrokerageFeeIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from gross brokerage and other charges, which are the amount of commissions generated by brokers or registered representatives over a specific period.

**Building on freehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BuildingOnFreeholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on permanent and absolute tenure of land with freedom to dispose of it at will.

**Building on long term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BuildingOnLongtermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

**Building on short term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_BuildingOnShorttermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

**Building under construction**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentPropertyBuildingUnderConstruction`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of permanent and absolute tenure of property with freedom to dispose of it at will.

**Buildings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Buildings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of building.

**Buildings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BuildingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of plant, property and equipment representing depreciable buildings and similar structures for use in operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Buildings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BuildingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of plant, property and equipment representing depreciable buildings and similar structures for use in operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Business combinations [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BusinessCombinationsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Business combinations [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BusinessCombinationsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Business combinations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_BusinessCombinationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for transactions or other events in which an acquirer obtains control of one or more businesses. Transactions sometimes referred to as 'true mergers' or 'mergers of equals' are also business combinations as that term is used in IFRS 3.

**Business combinations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_BusinessCombinationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for the bringing together of separate entities or businesses into one reporting entity.

**Business occupation**
- Element: `ssmt_BusinessOccupation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to business occupation of the director.

**Calendar year of annual return**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_CalendarYearOfAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the calendar year of annual return.

**Calendar year of annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_YearOfAnnualReturnForCurrentSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the current year for annual return submission.

**Cancellation of treasury shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CancellationOfTreasuryShares`
- Description: The amount of treasury stock cancelled during the period. [Refer: Treasury shares]

**Capital commitments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CapitalCommitments`
- Description: The amount of future capital expenditures that the entity is committed to make.

**Capital from non-redeemable preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CapitalFromNonredeemablePreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Capital from ordinary shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CapitalFromOrdinaryShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Capital from redeemable preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CapitalFromRedeemablePreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Capital redemption reserve**
