- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfInventoriesRecognisedAsExpenseDuringPeriod`
- Description: The amount of inventories recognised as an expense during the period. [Refer: Inventories]

**Cost of inventories recognised as expense during period**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CostOfInventoriesRecognisedAsExpenseDuringPeriod`
- Description: The amount of inventories recognised as an expense during the period. [Refer: Inventories]

**Cost of merchandise sold**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfMerchandiseSold`
- Description: The amount of merchandise that was sold during the period and recognised as an expense.

**Cost of purchased energy sold**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfPurchasedEnergySold`
- Description: The amount of purchased energy that was sold during the period and recognised as an expense.

**Cost of sales**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CostOfSales`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of when inventories are sold, the entity shall recognise the carrying amount of those inventories as an expense in the period in which the related revenue is recognised.

**Cost of sales [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfSalesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the amount of all expenses directly or indirectly attributed to goods or services sold. This member is used to attribute an expense by nature to a functional line item in the statement of profit or loss.

**Cost of sales, food and beverage**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfSalesFoodAndBeverage`
- Description: The amount of cost of sales attributed to food and beverage. [Refer: Cost of sales]

**Cost of sales, hotel operations**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfSalesHotelOperations`
- Description: The amount of cost of sales attributed to hotel operations. [Refer: Cost of sales]

**Cost of sales, room occupancy services**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostOfSalesRoomOccupancyServices`
- Description: The amount of cost of sales attributed to room occupancy services. [Refer: Cost of sales]

**Cost relating to defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CostRelatingToDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The cost relating to defined benefit plans, comprising cost recognised in profit or loss as an expense, cost recognised as an item of other comprehensive income and cost included in the cost of an asset. [Refer: Other comprehensive income; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Cost relating to defined benefit plans for period included in cost of assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CostRelatingToDefinedBenefitPlansForPeriodIncludedInCostOfAssets`
- Description: The amount of cost relating to defined benefit plans for period included in cost of assets. [Refer: Cost relating to defined benefit plans; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Costs to obtain contracts with customers [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CostsToObtainContractsWithCustomersMember`
- Description: This member stands for a category of assets recognised from the costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers representing the costs to obtain contracts with customers. [Refer: Assets recognised from costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers]

**Counterparties [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CounterpartiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Counterparties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CounterpartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for the parties to the transaction other than the entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Counterparties' axis if no other member is used.

**Country**
- Element: `ssmt_Country`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to country of the residential address in the case of an individual or in the case of a corporation the address of its registered office.

**Country of domicile [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfDomicileMember`
- Description: This member stands for the country in which the entity is registered and where it has its legal address or registered office.

**Country of incorporation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporation`
- Description: The country in which the entity is incorporated.

**Country of incorporation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CountryOfIncorporation`
- Description: The country in which the entity is incorporated.

**Country of incorporation of associate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporationOrResidenceOfAssociate`
- Description: The country in which an associate of the entity is incorporated. [Refer: Associates [member]]

**Country of incorporation of entity whose consolidated financial statements have been produced for public use**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporationOfEntityWhoseConsolidatedFinancialStatementsHaveBeenProducedForPublicUse`
- Description: The country in which the entity's ultimate, or any intermediate, parent, whose consolidated financial statements that comply with IFRSs have been produced for public use, has been incorporated. [Refer: Consolidated [member]; IFRSs [member]]

**Country of incorporation of foreign subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt_CountryOfIncorporationOfForeignSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to country of incorporation of foreign subsidiary.

**Country of incorporation of joint operation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporationOfJointOperation`
- Description: The country in which a joint operation of the entity is incorporated. [Refer: Joint operations [member]]

**Country of incorporation of joint venture**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporationOfJointVenture`
- Description: The country in which a joint venture of the entity is incorporated. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]]

**Country of incorporation of subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CountryOfIncorporationOrResidenceOfSubsidiary`
- Description: The country in which a subsidiary of the entity is incorporated. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]]

**Court Order reference number**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_CourtOrderReferenceNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to court order reference number

**Creation date [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreationDateAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Creation date [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CreationDateAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Credit derivative, fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditDerivativeFairValue`
- Description: The fair value of a credit derivative. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Derivatives [member]]

**Credit derivative, nominal amount**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditDerivativeNominalAmount`
- Description: The nominal amount of a credit derivative. [Refer: Derivatives [member]]

**Credit exposure**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditExposure`
- Description: The amount of exposure to loss resulting from credit risk. [Refer: Credit risk [member]]

**Credit impairment of financial instruments [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditImpairmentOfFinancialInstrumentsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Credit impairment of financial instruments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditImpairmentOfFinancialInstrumentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all statuses of credit impairment of financial instruments. A financial instrument is credit-impaired when one or more events that have a detrimental impact on the estimated future cash flows of that financial instrument have occurred. This member also represents the standard value for the 'Credit impairment of financial instruments' axis if no other member is used.

**Credit risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for the risk that one party to a financial instrument will cause a financial loss for the other party by failing to discharge an obligation. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Credit spread, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditSpreadMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for the credit spread used as a measurement input.

**Credit-related fee and commission income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CreditrelatedFeeAndCommissionIncome`
- Description: The amount of income recognised from credit-related fees and commissions. [Refer: Fee and commission income]

**Cumulative change in fair value recognised in profit or loss on sales of investment property between pools of assets measured using different models**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeChangeInFairValueRecognisedInProfitOrLossOnSalesOfInvestmentPropertyBetweenPoolsOfAssetsMeasuredUsingDifferentModels`
- Description: The cumulative change in fair value recognised in profit or loss on sales of investment property from a pool of assets in which the cost model is used into a pool in which the fair value model is used. [Refer: Fair value model [member]; Investment property]

**Cumulative effect at date of initial application [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeEffectAtDateOfInitialApplicationAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Cumulative gain (loss) on disposal of investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeGainLossOnDisposalOfInvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsDesignatedAsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The cumulative gain (loss) on disposal of investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Cumulative gain (loss) previously recognised in other comprehensive income arising from reclassification of financial assets out of fair value through other comprehensive income into fair value through profit or loss measurement category**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeGainLossPreviouslyRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeArisingFromReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeIntoFairValueThroughProfitOrLossMeasurementCategory`
- Description: The cumulative gain (loss) previously recognised in other comprehensive income arising from the reclassification of financial assets out of the fair value through other comprehensive income into the fair value through profit or loss measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income; Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss; Other comprehensive income]

**Cumulative preference dividends not recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativePreferenceDividendsNotRecognised`
- Description: The amount of cumulative preference dividends not recognised.

**Cumulative unrecognised share of losses of associates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeUnrecognisedShareOfLossesOfAssociates`
- Description: The cumulative amount of the unrecognised share of losses of associates if the entity has stopped recognising its share of losses when applying the equity method. [Refer: Associates [member]; Unrecognised share of losses of associates]

**Cumulative unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeUnrecognisedShareOfLossesOfJointVentures`
- Description: The cumulative amount of the unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures if the entity has stopped recognising its share of losses when applying the equity method. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]; Unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures]

**Cumulative unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures, transition from proportionate consolidation to equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CumulativeUnrecognisedShareOfLossesOfJointVenturesTransitionFromProportionateConsolidationToEquityMethod`
- Description: The entity's cumulative unrecognised share of losses of its joint ventures for which transition from proportionate consolidation to the equity method was performed. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]; Cumulative unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures]

**Currency in which information is displayed [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrencyInWhichInformationIsDisplayedAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Currency in which supplementary information is displayed [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrencyInWhichSupplementaryInformationIsDisplayedMember`
- Description: This member indicates information displayed in a currency that is different from either the entity’s functional currency or its presentation currency.

**Currency risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrencyRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for a type of market risk representing the risk that the fair value or future cash flows of a financial instrument will fluctuate because of changes in foreign exchange rates. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Currency swap contract [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrencySwapContractMember`
- Description: This member stands for a currency swap contract. [Refer: Swap contract [member]]

**Currency used for reporting amount of shares**
- Element: `ssmt_CurrencyUsedForReportingAmountOfShares`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of currency of amount of shares.

**Current [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a current time band.

**Current accruals and current deferred income including current contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAccrualsAndCurrentDeferredIncomeIncludingCurrentContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current accruals and current deferred income including current contract liabilities. [Refer: Accruals; Deferred income including contract liabilities]

**Current accrued expenses and other current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAccruedExpensesAndOtherCurrentLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current accrued expenses and other current liabilities. [Refer: Accruals; Other current liabilities]

**Current accrued income including current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAccruedIncomeIncludingCurrentContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of current accrued income including current contract assets. [Refer: Accrued income including contract assets]

**Current accrued income other than current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAccruedIncomeOtherThanCurrentContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of current accrued income other than current contract assets. [Refer: Accrued income other than contract assets]

**Current advances received, representing current contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied at point in time**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAdvances`
- Description: The amount of current advances received representing current contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied at a point in time. [Refer: Advances received, representing contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied at point in time]

**Current advances to suppliers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAdvancesToSuppliers`
- Description: The amount of current advances made to suppliers before goods or services are received.

**Current agricultural produce**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAgriculturalProduce`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of harvested produce of the entity's biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets; Inventories]

**Current and deferred tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAndDeferredTaxRelatingToItemsChargedOrCreditedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The aggregate current and deferred tax relating to particular items that are charged or credited directly to equity, for example: (a) an adjustment to the opening balance of retained earnings resulting from either a change in accounting policy that is applied retrospectively or the correction of an error; and (b) amounts arising on initial recognition of the equity component of a compound financial instrument. [Refer: Deferred tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity; Retained earnings; Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Current and deferred tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentAndDeferredTaxRelatingToItemsCreditedChargedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The aggregate current and deferred tax relating to particular items that are charged or credited directly to equity.

**Current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify an asset as current when: a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in the entity's normal operating cycle; b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting date; or d. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent, unless it is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting date.

**Current assets (liabilities)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAssetsLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current assets less the amount of current liabilities.

**Current assets recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentAssetsRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for current assets acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Current assets; Business combinations [member]]

**Current biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of current biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Current biological assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentBiologicalAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current portion of biological asset which consist of living animal or plant.

**Current biological assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentBiologicalAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for current biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Current biological assets, at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The amount of current biological assets measured at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: Biological assets, at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment]

**Current biological assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentBiologicalAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of current biological assets measured at fair value. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Biological assets, at fair value]

**Current bonds issued and current portion of non-current bonds issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentBondsIssuedAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentBondsIssued`
- Description: The amount of current bonds issued and the current portion of non-current bonds issued. [Refer: Bonds issued]

**Current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay to repay within a period of 12 months.

**Current borrowings and current portion of non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentBorrowingsAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentBorrowings`
- Description: The amount of current borrowings and current portion of non-current borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Current cash-settled share-based payment liability**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentCashSettledShareBasedPaymentLiability`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a share-based payment transaction in which the entity acquires goods or services by incurring a liability to transfer cash or other assets to the supplier of those goods or services for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity.

**Current commercial papers issued and current portion of non-current commercial papers issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentCommercialPapersIssuedAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentCommercialPapersIssued`
- Description: The amount of current commercial paper issued and the current portion of non-current commercial paper issued. [Refer: Commercial papers issued]

**Current contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied over time**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentContractLiabilitiesForPerformanceObligationsSatisfiedOverTime`
- Description: The amount of current contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied over time. [Refer: Contract liabilities for performance obligations satisfied over time]

**Current crude oil**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentCrudeOil`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of unrefined, unprocessed oil. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current debt instruments issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDebtInstrumentsIssued`
- Description: The amount of current debt instruments issued. [Refer: Debt instruments issued]

**Current deferred income including current contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDeferredIncomeIncludingCurrentContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current deferred income including current contract liabilities. [Refer: Deferred income including contract liabilities]

**Current deferred income other than current contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDeferredIncomeOtherThanCurrentContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current deferred income other than current contract liabilities. [Refer: Deferred income other than contract liabilities]

**Current defined benefit plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

**Current defined contribution plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDefinedContributionPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Current deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of current deposits from customers. [Refer: Deposits from customers]

**Current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial assets forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments, typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial assets options**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial assets others**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsOthers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current derivatives financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial assets swaps**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssetsSwaps`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of assets between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities forward contract used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContractUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date used for hedging.

**Current derivative financial liabilities options**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities options used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptionsUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time used for hedging.

**Current derivative financial liabilities others**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial liabilities others used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthersUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other derivatives used for hedging not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current derivative financial liabilities swap**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesSwap`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Current derivative financial liabilities swap used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesSwapUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate used for hedging.

**Current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives used for hedging.

**Current dividend payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentDividendPayables`
- Description: The amount of current dividend payables. [Refer: Dividend payables]

**Current employment termination benefits**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentEmploymentTerminationBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of employee benefits payable as a result of either: a. an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment before the normal retirement date; or b. an employee’s decision to accept voluntary redundancy in exchange for those benefits.

**Current estimate of future cash outflows to be paid to fulfil obligation, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentEstimateOfFutureCashOutflowsToBePaidToFulfilObligationMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for the current estimate of future cash outflows to be paid to fulfil obligation, used as a measurement input.

**Current excise tax payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentExciseTaxPayables`
- Description: The amount of current excise tax payables. [Refer: Excise tax payables]

**Current finance lease receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinanceLeaseReceivables`
- Description: The amount of current finance lease receivables. [Refer: Finance lease receivables]

**Current financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Current financial assets at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at amortised cost. [Refer: Financial assets at amortised cost]

**Current financial assets at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through other comprehensive income]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossClassifiedAsHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at fair value through profit or loss classified as held for trading. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossDesignatedUponInitialRecognition`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at fair value through profit or loss that were designated as such upon initial recognition or subsequently. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, mandatorily measured at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossMandatorilyMeasuredAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets mandatorily measured at fair value through profit or loss in accordance with IFRS 9. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, mandatorily measured at fair value]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, measured as such in accordance with exemption for reacquisition of own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossMeasuredAsSuchInAccordanceWithExemptionForReacquisitionOfOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss measured as such in accordance with the exemption for reacquisition of own equity instruments. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, measured as such in accordance with exemption for reacquisition of own equity instruments]

**Current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, measured as such in accordance with exemption for repurchase of own financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossMeasuredAsSuchInAccordanceWithExemptionForRepurchaseOfOwnFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets at fair value through profit or loss measured as such in accordance with the exemption for repurchase of own financial liabilities. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, measured as such in accordance with exemption for repurchase of own financial liabilities]

**Current financial assets available-for-sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsAvailableforsale`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets available-for-sale. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale; Current financial assets]

**Current financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income]

**Current financial assets that are debt instruments, at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentFinancialAssetsThatAreDebtInstrumentsAtCost`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets that are debt instruments measured at amortised cost. [Refer: Financial assets that are debt instruments, at amortised cost]

**Current financial assets that are equity instruments, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentFinancialAssetsThatAreEquityInstrumentsAtCost`
- Description: The amount of current financial assets that are equity instruments measured at cost less impairment. [Refer: Financial assets that are equity instruments, at cost]

**Current financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities. [Refer: Financial liabilities]

**Current financial liabilities at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities measured at amortised cost. [Refer: Financial liabilities at amortised cost]

**Current financial liabilities at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities measured at amortised cost. [Refer: Financial liabilities at amortised cost]

**Current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities measured at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss]

**Current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities measured at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss]

**Current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossClassifiedAsHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss that meet the definition of held for trading. [Refer: Current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss]

**Current financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossDesignatedUponInitialRecognition`
- Description: The amount of current financial liabilities measured at fair value through profit or loss that were designated as such upon initial recognition or subsequently. [Refer: Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently]

**Current food and beverage**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFoodAndBeverage`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of food and beverage. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current fuel**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentFuel`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of fuel. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current government grants**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentGovernmentGrants`
- Description: The amount of current government grants recognised in the statement of financial position as deferred income. [Refer: Government [member]; Government grants]

**Current held-to-maturity investments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentHeldtomaturityInvestments`
- Description: The amount of current held-to-maturity investments. [Refer: Held-to-maturity investments]

**Current interest payable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInterestPayable`
- Description: The amount of current interest payable. [Refer: Interest payable]

**Current interest receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInterestReceivable`
- Description: The amount of current interest receivable. [Refer: Interest receivable]

**Current inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Inventories`
- Description: The amount of current inventories. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Inventories`
- Description: The amount of current inventories. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current inventories held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInventoriesHeldForSale`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of inventories held for sale in the ordinary course of business. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current inventories held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoriesHeldForSale`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of inventories held for sale in the ordinary course of business. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current inventories in transit**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInventoriesInTransit`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of inventories in transit. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentInvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsDesignatedAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of current investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income]

**Current lease liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of current lease liabilities. [Refer: Lease liabilities]

**Current legal proceedings provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermLegalProceedingsProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

**Current liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities held by the reporting entity. An entity shall classify a liability as current when: a. it expects to settle the liability in the entity’s normal operating cycle; b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading; c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting date; or d. the entity does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after reporting date.

**Current liabilities recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLiabilitiesRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for current liabilities assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Current liabilities; Business combinations [member]]

**Current loan commitments, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentLoanCommitmentsAtCost`
- Description: The amount of current loan commitments measured at cost less impairment. [Refer: At cost [member]; Loan commitments, at cost]

**Current loans and receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLoansAndReceivables`
- Description: The amount of current loans and receivables. [Refer: Loans and receivables]

**Current loans received and current portion of non-current loans received**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentLoansReceivedAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentLoansReceived`
- Description: The amount of current loans received and the current portion of non-current loans received. [Refer: Loans received]

**Current materials and supplies to be consumed in production process or rendering services**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentMaterialsAndSuppliesToBeConsumedInProductionProcessOrRenderingServices`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of materials and supplies to be consumed in a production process or while rendering services. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current materials and supplies to be consumed in production process or rendering services**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_MaterialsAndSuppliesToBeConsumedInProductionProcessOrRenderingServices`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of materials and supplies to be consumed in a production process or while rendering services. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current merchandise**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Merchandise`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of goods acquired for resale. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current miscellaneous other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermMiscellaneousOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of miscellaneous current other provisions. [Refer: Miscellaneous other provisions]

**Current miscellaneous other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermMiscellaneousOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount of miscellaneous current other provisions. [Refer: Miscellaneous other provisions]

**Current natural gas**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentNaturalGas`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of a naturally occurring hydrocarbon gas mixture. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current net defined benefit asset**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentRecognisedAssetsDefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: The amount of current net defined benefit asset. [Refer: Net defined benefit asset]

**Current net defined benefit liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentRecognisedLiabilitiesDefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: The amount of current net defined benefit liability. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability]

**Current non-cash assets pledged as collateral for which transferee has right by contract or custom to sell or repledge collateral**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentNoncashAssetsPledgedAsCollateralForWhichTransfereeHasRightByContractOrCustomToSellOrRepledgeCollateral`
- Description: The amount of current non-cash collateral assets (such as debt or equity instruments) provided to a transferee, for which the transferee has the right by contract or custom to sell or repledge the collateral.

**Current non-cash assets pledged as collateral for which transferee has right by contract or custom to sell or repledge collateral**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentNoncashAssetsPledgedAsCollateralForWhichTransfereeHasRightByContractOrCustomToSellOrRepledgeCollateral`
- Description: The amount of current non-cash collateral assets (such as debt or equity instruments) provided to a transferee, for which the transferee has the right by contract or custom to sell or repledge the collateral.

**Current non-trade financing costs**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeFinancingCosts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of borrowing costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

**Current non-trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current non-trade payables.

**Current notes and debentures issued and current portion of non-current notes and debentures issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentNotesAndDebenturesIssuedAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentNotesAndDebenturesIssued`
- Description: The amount of current notes and debentures issued and the current portion of non-current notes and debentures issued. [Refer: Notes and debentures issued]

**Current onerous contracts provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermOnerousContractsProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a contract in which the unavoidable costs of meeting the obligations under the contract exceed the economic benefits expected to be received under it.

**Current ore stockpiles**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentOreStockpiles`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of ore stockpiles. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current other derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentOtherDerivativeFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Current packaging and storage materials**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPackagingAndStorageMaterials`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of packaging and storage materials. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current payables due to related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentPayablesDueToRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other current payables due to related parties.

**Current payables for purchase of energy**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPayablesForPurchaseOfEnergy`
- Description: The amount of current payables for the purchase of energy. [Refer: Payables for purchase of energy]

**Current payables for purchase of non-current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPayablesForPurchaseOfNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: The amount of current payables for the purchase of non-current assets. [Refer: Payables for purchase of non-current assets]

**Current payables on social security and taxes other than income tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPayablesOnSocialSecurityAndTaxesOtherThanIncomeTax`
- Description: The amount of current payables on social security and taxes other than incomes tax. [Refer: Payables on social security and taxes other than income tax]

**Current payables to related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherCurrentPayablesToRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of current payables due to related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]; Payables to related parties]

**Current payables to related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentPayablesToRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of current payables due to related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]; Payables to related parties]

**Current petroleum and petrochemical products**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPetroleumAndPetrochemicalProducts`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of products derived from crude oil and natural gas. [Refer: Current crude oil; Current natural gas]

**Current portion of non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentPortionOfLongtermBorrowings`
- Description: The current portion of non-current borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Current portion of non-current secured bank overdrafts**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredBankOverdrafts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current secured bank overdrafts.

**Current portion of non-current secured bankers acceptance**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredBankersAcceptance`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured bills of exchange drawn on and accepted by a bank in Malaysia.

**Current portion of non-current secured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredHirePurchaseAndFinanceLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities.

**Current portion of non-current secured islamic financing facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredIslamicFinancingFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured Islamic financing facilities.

**Current portion of non-current secured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredSukuk`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Current portion of non-current secured term loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredTermLoans`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured loan from a bank for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Current portion of non-current secured trade financing facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredTradeFinancingFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured trade financing facilities.

**Current portion of non-current unsecured block discounting payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredBlockDiscountingPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured block discounting payables.

**Current portion of non-current unsecured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredHirePurchaseAndFinanceLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities.

**Current portion of non-current unsecured irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredIrredeemableConvertibleUnsecuredLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS).

**Current portion of non-current unsecured islamic financing facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredIslamicFinancingFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured Islamic financing facilities.

**Current portion of non-current unsecured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredSukuk`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Current portion of non-current unsecured term loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredTermLoans`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured term loan from a bank for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Current portion of secured bonds**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredBonds`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured bonds.

**Current portion of secured bonds/sukuk/loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredBondsSukukAndLoanStocks`
- Description: Represents the amount of current portion of secured bonds, sukuk and loan stock.

**Current portion of secured loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured loan stocks.

**Current portion of secured medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured medium term notes.

**Current portion of secured preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredPreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Current portion of secured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfSecuredSukukAsPerShariahCommittee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Current portion of unsecured bonds**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredBonds`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured bonds.

**Current portion of unsecured bonds/sukuk/loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredBondsSukukAndLoanStock`
- Description: Represents the amount of current portion of unsecured bonds, sukuk and loan stock.

**Current portion of unsecured loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured loan stocks.

**Current portion of unsecured medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured medium term notes.

**Current portion of unsecured preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredPreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Current portion of unsecured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredSukukAsPerShariahCommittee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of unsecured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Current prepaid expenses**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPrepaidExpenses`
- Description: The amount recognised as a current asset for expenditures made prior to the period when the economic benefit will be realised.

**Current prepayments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPrepayments`
- Description: The amount of current prepayments. [Refer: Prepayments]

**Current prepayments and current accrued income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentPrepaymentsAndCurrentAccruedIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current prepayments and current accrued income.

**Current prepayments and current accrued income including current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPrepaymentsAndCurrentAccruedIncomeIncludingCurrentContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of current prepayments and current accrued income including current contract assets. [Refer: Prepayments; Accrued income including contract assets]

**Current prepayments and current accrued income other than current contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPrepaymentsAndCurrentAccruedIncomeOtherThanCurrentContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of current prepayments and current accrued income, other than current contract assets. [Refer: Prepayments; Accrued income other than contract assets]

**Current prepayments and other current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentPrepaymentsAndOtherCurrentAssets`
- Description: The amount of current prepayments and other current assets. [Refer: Other current assets; Current prepayments]

**Current production supplies**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProductionSupplies`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of supplies to be used for the production process. [Refer: Inventories]

**Current programming assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentProgrammingAssets`
- Description: The amount of current programming assets. [Refer: Programming assets]

**Current provision for unconsumed leave**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentProvisionForUnconsumedLeave`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the expected cost of accumulating compensated absences when the employees render service that increases their entitlement to future compensated absences.

**Current provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentProvisions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of provision only when:a. the entity has an obligation at the reporting date as a result of a past event;b. it is probable (i.e. more likely than not) that the entity will be required to transfer economic benefits in settlement; andc. the amount of the obligation can be estimated reliably.

**Current provisions for employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentProvisionsForEmployeeBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

**Current raw materials and current production supplies**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentRawMaterialsAndCurrentProductionSupplies`
- Description: A classification of current inventory representing the amount of current raw materials and current production supplies. [Refer: Current production supplies; Current raw materials]

**Current receivables arising from accrued income not yet billed**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivablesArisingFromAccruedIncomeNotYetBilled`
- Description: The amount of current receivables arising from accrued income not yet billed.

**Current receivables due from associates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesDueFromAssociates`
- Description: The amount of current receivables due from associates. [Refer: Associates [member]]

**Current receivables due from joint ventures**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesDueFromJointVentures`
- Description: The amount of current receivables due from joint ventures. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]]

**Current receivables due from other parties**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromOtherParties`
- Description: The amount of current receivables due from parties other than related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Current receivables due from related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of current receivables due from related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Current receivables due from related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of current receivables due from related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Current receivables from contracts with customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesFromContractsWithCustomers`
- Description: The amount of current receivables from contracts with customers. [Refer: Receivables from contracts with customers]

**Current receivables from rental of properties**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesFromRentalOfProperties`
- Description: The amount of current receivables from rental of properties. [Refer: Receivables from rental of properties]

**Current receivables from sale of properties**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesFromSaleOfProperties`
- Description: The amount of current receivables from sale of properties. [Refer: Receivables from sale of properties]

**Current receivables from taxes other than income tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentReceivablesFromTaxesOtherThanIncomeTax`
- Description: The amount of current receivables from taxes other than income tax. [Refer: Receivables from taxes other than income tax]

**Current refunds provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentRefundsProvision`
- Description: The amount of current provision for refunds. [Refer: Refunds provision]

**Current restricted cash and cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentRestrictedCashAndCashEquivalents`
- Description: The amount of current restricted cash and cash equivalents. [Refer: Restricted cash and cash equivalents]

**Current restructuring provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermRestructuringProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a programme that is planned and controlled by management and materially changes either the scope of a business undertaken by an entity or the manner in which that business is conducted.

**Current retention payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentRetentionPayables`
- Description: The amount of current retention payables. [Refer: Retention payables]

**Current retirement benefits**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentRetirementBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of post-employment benefit plans are formal or informal arrangements under which an entity provides post-employment benefits for one or more employees.

**Current service cost, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentServiceCostDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The expense of employee service in the current period arising from defined benefit plans. [Refer: Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from current service cost]

**Current tax assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income tax recoverable in respect of the tax loss for the current period or past periods.

**Current tax assets not offset against current tax liabilities because undue cost or effort exemption is used**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxAssetsNotOffsetAgainstCurrentTaxLiabilitiesBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsUsed`
- Description: The amount of current tax assets that have not been offset against current tax liabilities because the undue cost or effort exemption is used.

**Current tax assets, current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxAssetsCurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income tax recoverable in respect of the tax loss for the current period or past periods.

**Current tax assets, non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxAssetsNoncurrent`
- Description: The non-current amount of current tax assets. [Refer: Current tax assets]

**Current tax assets, non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxAssetsNoncurrent`
- Description: The non-current amount of current tax assets. [Refer: Current tax assets]

**Current tax expense (income)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxExpenseIncome`
- Description: The amount of income taxes payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for a period.

**Current tax expense (income)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxExpenseIncome`
- Description: The amount of income taxes payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for a period.

**Current tax expense (income) and adjustments for current tax of prior periods**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxExpenseIncomeAndAdjustmentsForCurrentTaxOfPriorPeriods`
- Description: The amount of current tax expense (income) and adjustments for the current tax of prior periods. [Refer: Current tax expense (income); Adjustments for current tax of prior periods]

**Current tax liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  the amount of current income tax payable in respect of the taxable profit for the current period or past periods.

**Current tax liabilities not offset against current tax assets because undue cost or effort exemption is used**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxLiabilitiesNotOffsetAgainstCurrentTaxAssetsBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsUsed`
- Description: The amount of current tax liabilities that have not been offset against current tax assets because the undue cost or effort exemption is used.

**Current tax liabilities, current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxLiabilitiesCurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  the amount of current income tax payable in respect of the taxable profit for the current period or past periods.

**Current tax liabilities, non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxLiabilitiesNoncurrent`
- Description: The non-current amount of current tax liabilities. [Refer: Current tax liabilities]

**Current tax liabilities, non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxLiabilitiesNoncurrent`
- Description: The non-current amount of current tax liabilities. [Refer: Current tax liabilities]

**Current tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentTaxRelatingToItemsChargedOrCreditedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The amount of current tax relating to particular items that are charged or credited directly to equity, for example: (a) an adjustment to the opening balance of retained earnings resulting from either a change in accounting policy that is applied retrospectively or the correction of an error; and (b) amounts arising on initial recognition of the equity component of a compound financial instrument. [Refer: Retained earnings; Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Current tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_CurrentTaxRelatingToItemsCreditedChargedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The amount of current tax relating to particular items that are charged or credited directly to equity.

**Current trade payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentPayablesToTradeSuppliers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current trade payables.

**Current trade payables due to associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayablesDueToAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its associates for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade payables due to contract suppliers**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayableDueToContractCustomer`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current gross amount due to customers for contract work.

**Current trade payables due to holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayablesDueToHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its holding company for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade payables due to joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayablesDueToJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its joint ventures for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade payables due to subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayablesDueToSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its subsidiaries for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current trade receivables.

**Current trade receivables due from associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current amounts billed by the reporting entity to its associates when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade receivables due from contract customers**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromContractCustomers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current gross amount due from customers for contract work.

**Current trade receivables due from holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current amounts billed by the reporting entity to its holding company when it delivers goods or services in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade receivables due from joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current amounts billed by the reporting entity to its joint ventures when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade receivables due from related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current amounts billed by the reporting entity to its other related parties when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Current trade receivables due from subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradeReceivablesDueFromSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current amounts billed by the reporting entity to its subsidiaries when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Current value added tax payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentValueAddedTaxPayables`
- Description: The amount of current value added tax payables. [Refer: Value added tax payables]

**Current value added tax receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentValueAddedTaxReceivables`
- Description: The amount of current value added tax receivables. [Refer: Value added tax receivables]

**Current warrant liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CurrentWarrantLiability`
- Description: The amount of current warrant liabilities. [Refer: Warrant liability]

**Current warranty provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermWarrantyProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

**Current work in progress**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_WorkInProgress`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the total value of the materials and labor for unfinished projects.

**Currently stated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RestatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the information currently stated in the financial statements. It also represents the standard value for the 'Retrospective application and retrospective restatement' and 'Departure from requirement of IFRS' axes if no other member is used.

**Currently stated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RestatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the information currently stated in the financial statements. It also represents the standard value for the 'Retrospective application and retrospective restatement' axis if no other member is used.

**Customer relationships**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CustomerRelationships`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to customer relationships.

**Customer-related intangible assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_CustomerrelatedIntangibleAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing assets related to customers. Such assets may include customer lists, order or production backlog, customer contracts and related customer relationships as well as non-contractual customer relationships.

**Customers [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_MajorCustomersMember`
- Description: This member stands for customers. It also represents the standard value for the 'Major customers' axis if no other member is used.

**Date as at which entity plans to apply new IFRS initially**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateAsAtWhichEntityPlansToApplyNewIFRSInitially`
- Description: The date on which the entity plans to apply a new IFRS that has been issued but is not yet effective.

**Date by which application of new IFRS is required**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateByWhichApplicationOfNewIFRSIsRequired`
- Description: The date by which the entity is required to apply a new IFRS that has been issued but is not yet effective.

**Date for the lodgement of financial statements and reports due to extension of circulation**
- Element: `ssmt_DateForTheLodgmentOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsDueToExtensionOfCirculation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date for the lodgement of financial statements and reports due to extension of circulation.

**Date of acquisition**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfAcquisition2013`
- Description: The date on which the acquirer obtains control of the acquiree in a business combination.

**Date of acquisition**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DateOfAcquisition2013`
- Description: The date on which the acquirer obtains control of the acquiree in a business combination.

**Date of annual general meeting**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfAnnualGeneralMeeting`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to annual general meeting

**Date of annual return**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_DateOfAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date made up to anniversary date of incorporation/registration of the company.

**Date of annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_CompanyAnniversaryDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the anniversary date of the company.

**Date of authorisation for issue of financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfAuthorisationForIssueOfFinancialStatements2013`
- Description: The date on which financial statements are authorised for issue.

**Date of authorisation for issue of financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DateOfAuthorisationForIssueOfFinancialStatements2013`
- Description: The date on which financial statements are authorised for issue.

**Date of birth**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfBirth`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date of birth of the shareholder.

**Date of end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriod2013`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period.

**Date of end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriod2013`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period.

**Date of end of reporting period of financial statements of associate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriodOfFinancialStatementsOfAssociate`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period of the financial statements of an associate.

**Date of end of reporting period of financial statements of joint venture**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriodOfFinancialStatementsOfJointVenture2013`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period of the financial statements of a joint venture.

**Date of end of reporting period of financial statements of subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriodOfFinancialStatementsOfSubsidiary`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period of the financial statements of a subsidiary.

**Date of end of reporting period of financial statements of subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DateOfEndOfReportingPeriodOfFinancialStatementsOfSubsidiary`
- Description: The date of the end of the reporting period of the financial statements of a subsidiary.

**Date of grant of share-based payment arrangement**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfGrantOfSharebasedPaymentArrangement`
- Description: The date on which share-based payment arrangements are granted. [Refer: Share-based payment arrangements [member]]

**Date of holding company acquire foreign subsidiary company**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfHoldingCompanyAcquireForeignSubsidiaryCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the acquisition date of foreign subsidiary company.

**Date of last year when annual general meeting was held**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfLastYearWhenAnnualGeneralMeetingWasHeld`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date of last year when annual general meeting was held by the company.

**Date of most recent comprehensive actuarial valuation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DateOfMostRecentComprehensiveActuarialValuation2013`
- Description: The date of the most recent comprehensive actuarial valuation for defined benefit plans.

**Date of previous annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfPreviousAnnualReturn`
