- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date of last preceding annual return made up to anniversary date of incorporation or registration of the company.

**Date of reclassification of financial assets due to change in business model**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOfReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsDueToChangeInBusinessModel`
- Description: The date of the reclassification of financial assets due to a change in the entity's business model for managing financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Date of registration**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfRegistration`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date of registration of indebtedness.

**Date of the exempt private company certificate**
- Element: `ssmt_DateOfExemptPrivateCompanyCertificate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to date on which company is certified as exempt private company.

**Date on which change in activities occurred that permitted insurer to reassess whether its activities are predominantly connected with insurance**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOnWhichChangeInActivitiesOccurredThatPermittedInsurerToReassessWhetherItsActivitiesArePredominantlyConnectedWithInsurance`
- Description: The date on which the change in activities occurred that permitted an insurer to reassess whether its activities are predominantly connected with insurance.

**Date on which change in activities occurred that resulted in insurer no longer qualifying to apply temporary exemption from IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DateOnWhichChangeInActivitiesOccurredThatResultedInInsurerNoLongerQualifyingToApplyTemporaryExemptionFromIFRS9`
- Description: The date on which the change in activities occurred that resulted in an insurer no longer qualifying to apply the temporary exemption from IFRS 9.

**Dated subordinated liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DatedSubordinatedLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of subordinated liabilities that have a specified repayment date. [Refer: Subordinated liabilities]

**Debt instruments held**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtInstrumentsHeld`
- Description: The amount of instruments representing indebtedness held by the entity.

**Debt instruments issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtSecurities`
- Description: The amount of instruments issued by the entity that represent indebtedness.

**Debt instruments issued that are included in insurer's regulatory capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtInstrumentsIssuedThatAreIncludedInInsurersRegulatoryCapital`
- Description: The amount of debt instruments issued that are included in the insurer's regulatory capital.

**Debt instruments, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtInstrumentsAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount instruments representing debt (rather than equity) contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Debt instruments, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DebtInstrumentsAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount that instruments representing debt (rather than equity) constitute of the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Debt instruments, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtInstrumentsPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage instruments representing debt (rather than equity) contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]] [Contrast: Debt instruments, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets]

**Debt instruments, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DebtInstrumentsPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage that instruments representing debt (rather than equity) constitute of the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Debt securities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DebtSecuritiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for instruments held by the entity that represent indebtedness.

**Decrease (increase) in inventories of finished goods and work in progress**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ChangesInInventoriesOfFinishedGoodsAndWorkInProgress`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, the changes in inventories of finished goods and work in progress. Changes in inventories are measured by the value of the entries into inventories less the value of withdrawals and less the value of any recurrent losses of goods held in inventories during the accounting period. Some of these acquisitions and disposals are attributable to actual purchases or sales, but others reflect transactions that are internal to the enterprise.Changes in inventories (including work-in- progress) consist of changes in: a. stocks of outputs that are still held by the units that     produced them prior to their being further processed, sold,     delivered to other units or used in other ways; and b. stocks of products acquired from other units that are     intended to be used for intermediate consumption or for     resale without further processing; they are measured by     the value of the entries into inventories less the value of     withdrawals and the value of any recurrent losses of goods     held in inventories.

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInDemographicAssumptionsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in a net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in demographic assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Demographic assumptions deal with matters such as: (a) mortality; (b) rates of employee turnover, disability and early retirement; (c) the proportion of plan members with dependants who will be eligible for benefits; (d) the proportion of plan members who will select each form of payment option available under the plan terms; and (e) claim rates under medical plans. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromChangesInFinancialAssumptionsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in a net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from changes in financial assumptions that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Financial assumptions deal with items such as: (a) the discount rate; (b) benefit levels, excluding any cost of the benefits to be met by employees, and future salary; (c) in the case of medical benefits, future medical costs, including claim handling costs (ie the costs that will be incurred in processing and resolving claims, including legal and adjuster's fees); and (d) taxes payable by the plan on contributions relating to service before the reporting date or on benefits resulting from that service. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ActuarialGainsLossesArisingFromExperienceAdjustmentsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in a net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from actuarial gains (losses) arising from experience adjustments that result in remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset). Experience adjustments deal with the effects of differences between the previous actuarial assumptions and what has actually occurred. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from contributions to plan**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ContributionsToPlanNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from contributions to a defined benefit plan. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset); Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from contributions to plan by plan participants**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ContributionsToPlanByPlanParticipantsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from contributions to a defined benefit plan by plan participants. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset); Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from gain (loss) on changes in effect of limiting net defined benefit asset to asset ceiling excluding interest income or expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_GainLossOnChangesInEffectOfLimitingNetDefinedBenefitAssetToAssetCeiling`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from the gain (loss) on changes in the effect of limiting a net defined benefit asset to the asset ceiling, excluding amounts included in interest income or expense. [Refer: Interest income (expense); Net defined benefit liability (asset); Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from interest expense (income)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from gain (loss) on remeasurement in other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_GainLossOnRemeasurementOfNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in a net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from the remeasurement of that net defined benefit liability (asset). [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from gains (losses) arising from settlements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_GainsLossesArisingFromSettlementsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from settlements. Settlements are transactions that eliminate all further legal or constructive obligations for part or all of the benefits provided under a defined benefit plan, other than a payment of benefits to, or on behalf of, employees that is set out in the terms of the plan and included in the actuarial assumptions. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset); Defined benefit plans [member]; Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from payments from plan**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsFromPlanNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from payments from the plan. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset)]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from payments in respect of settlements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsInRespectOfSettlementsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from payments from the plan in respect of settlements. [Refer: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from gains (losses) arising from settlements; Net defined benefit liability (asset); Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from resulting from contributions to plan by employer**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ContributionsToPlanByEmployerNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from contributions to a defined benefit plan by the employer. [Refer: Net defined benefit liability (asset); Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReturnOnPlanAssetsNetDefinedBenefitLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from the return on plan assets, excluding amounts included in interest income or expense. The return on plan assets is interest, dividends and other revenue derived from the plan assets, together with realised and unrealised gains or losses on the plan assets, less any costs of managing plan assets and less any tax payable by the plan itself, other than tax included in the actuarial assumptions used to measure the present value of the defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Plan assets [member]; Net defined benefit liability (asset); Actuarial assumptions [member]; Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from interest expense (income)]

**Decrease (increase) through actuarial gains (losses), defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseIncreaseThroughActuarialGainsLossesDefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the present value of a defined benefit obligation resulting from actuarial gains (losses). [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Decrease (increase) through curtailments, defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseIncreaseThroughCurtailmentsDefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the present value of a defined benefit obligation resulting from curtailments. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Decrease (increase) through settlements, defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseIncreaseThroughSettlementsDefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the present value of a defined benefit obligation resulting from settlements. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Decrease (increase) through settlements, plan assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseIncreaseThroughSettlementsPlanAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the fair value of defined benefit plan assets resulting from settlements. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease (increase) through settlements, reimbursement rights, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseIncreaseThroughSettlementsReimbursementRightsAtFairValue`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in the fair value of reimbursement rights resulting from settlements. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Reimbursement rights, at fair value]

**Decrease (increase) through tax on share-based payment transactions, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseIncreaseThroughTaxOnSharebasedPaymentTransactions`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in equity resulting from tax on transactions in which the entity: (a) receives goods or services from the supplier of those goods or services (including an employee) in a share-based payment arrangement; or (b) incurs an obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier in a share-based payment arrangement when another group entity receives those goods or services. [Refer: Share-based payment arrangements [member]]

**Decrease due to harvest, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseDueToHarvestBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The decrease in biological assets due to the detachment of produce from the assets or the cessation of the assets' life processes. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Decrease due to harvest, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseDueToHarvestBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The decrease in biological assets due to the detachment of produce from the assets or the cessation of the assets' life processes. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsAssets`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of assets due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions.

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions.

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of liabilities due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions.

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, after tax, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeAfterTaxAssets`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of assets, recognised in other comprehensive income after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, after tax, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeAfterTaxEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments, recognised in other comprehensive income after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, after tax, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeAfterTaxLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of liabilities, recognised in other comprehensive income after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, before tax, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeBeforeTaxAssets`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of assets, recognised in other comprehensive income before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, before tax, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeBeforeTaxEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments, recognised in other comprehensive income before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in other comprehensive income, before tax, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInOtherComprehensiveIncomeBeforeTaxLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of liabilities, recognised in other comprehensive income before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, after tax, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossAfterTaxAssets`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of assets, recognised in profit or loss after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, after tax, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossAfterTaxEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments, recognised in profit or loss after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, after tax, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossAfterTaxLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of liabilities, recognised in profit or loss after tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, before tax, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossBeforeTaxAssets`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of assets, recognised in profit or loss before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, before tax, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossBeforeTaxEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments, recognised in profit or loss before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in fair value measurement due to change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions, recognised in profit or loss, before tax, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseInFairValueMeasurementDueToChangeInMultipleUnobservableInputsToReflectReasonablyPossibleAlternativeAssumptionsRecognisedInProfitOrLossBeforeTaxLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of decrease in the fair value measurement of liabilities, recognised in profit or loss before tax, due to a change in multiple unobservable inputs to reflect reasonably possible alternative assumptions. [Refer: Tax income (expense)]

**Decrease in reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, resulting from benefits paid**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughBenefitsPaidReimbursementRightsAtFairValue`
- Description: The decrease in reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, resulting from benefits paid. [Refer: Reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, at fair value]

**Decrease in reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, resulting from payments in respect of settlements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsInRespectOfSettlementsReimbursementRights`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, resulting from payments in respect of settlements. [Refer: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from gains (losses) arising from settlements; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease through balances recovered in current period, regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughBalancesRecoveredInCurrentPeriodRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The decrease in regulatory deferral account debit balances resulting from balances recovered in the current period. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Decrease through balances reversed in current period, regulatory deferral account credit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughBalancesReversedInCurrentPeriodRegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalances`
- Description: The decrease in regulatory deferral account credit balances resulting from balances reversed in the current period. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances]

**Decrease through benefits paid, defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseThroughBenefitsPaidDefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The decrease in the present value of a defined benefit obligation resulting from benefits paid. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Decrease through benefits paid, plan assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseThroughBenefitsPaidPlanAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The decrease in the fair value of defined benefit plan assets resulting from benefits paid. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Decrease through benefits paid, reimbursement rights, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseThroughBenefitsPaidReimbursementRightsAtFairValue`
- Description: The decrease in the fair value of reimbursement rights resulting from benefits paid. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Reimbursement rights, at fair value]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSaleBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The decrease in biological assets through classification as held for sale or inclusion in a disposal group classified as held for sale. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Biological assets]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSaleGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in goodwill due to classification as held for sale. [Refer: Goodwill; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSaleIntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets and goodwill resulting from classification as held for sale or inclusion in a disposal group classified as held for sale. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Intangible assets and goodwill]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSaleIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from classification as held for sale or inclusion in a disposal group classified as held for sale. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSaleInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The decrease in investment property through classification as held for sale or inclusion in a disposal group classified as held for sale. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Property, plant and equipment; Investment property; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Decrease through classified as held for sale, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughClassifiedAsHeldForSalePropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The decrease in property, plant and equipment through classification as held for sale or inclusion in a disposal group classified as held for sale. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Property, plant and equipment; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Decrease through derecognition, exposure to credit risk on loan commitments and financial guarantee contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughDerecognitionExposureToCreditRiskOnLoanCommitmentsAndFinancialGuaranteeContracts`
- Description: The decrease in exposure to credit risk on loan commitments and financial guarantee contracts resulting from derecognition. [Refer: Exposure to credit risk on loan commitments and financial guarantee contracts]

**Decrease through derecognition, financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughDerecognitionFinancialAssets`
- Description: The decrease in financial assets resulting from derecognition. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Decrease through disposal of previously acquired businesses, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DecreaseThroughDisposalOfPreviouslyAcquiredBusinessesGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in goodwill through the disposal of previously acquired businesses. [Refer: Goodwill]

**Decrease through disposals, regulatory deferral account credit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughDisposalsRegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalances`
- Description: The decrease in regulatory deferral account credit balances resulting from disposals. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances]

**Decrease through disposals, regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughDisposalsRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The decrease in regulatory deferral account debit balances resulting from disposals. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Decrease through impairment losses, assets for insurance acquisition cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughImpairmentLossesAssetsForInsuranceAcquisitionCashFlows`
- Description: The decrease in assets for insurance acquisition cash flows resulting from impairment losses recognised in the period. [Refer: Insurance contracts [member]; Assets for insurance acquisition cash flows]

**Decrease through impairment, contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughImpairmentContractAssets`
- Description: The decrease in contract assets resulting from impairment. [Refer: Contract assets; Impairment loss]

**Decrease through impairments, regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughImpairmentsRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The decrease in regulatory deferral account debit balances resulting from impairments. [Refer: Impairment loss; Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Decrease through loss of control of subsidiary, intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughLossOfControlOfSubsidiaryIntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets and goodwill resulting from the loss of control of a subsidiary. [Refer: Intangible assets and goodwill]

**Decrease through loss of control of subsidiary, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughLossOfControlOfSubsidiaryIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from the loss of control of a subsidiary. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Decrease through loss of control of subsidiary, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughLossOfControlOfSubsidiaryOtherProvisions`
- Description: The decrease in other provisions resulting from the loss of control of a subsidiary. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Decrease through loss of control of subsidiary, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughLossOfControlOfSubsidiaryPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The decrease in property, plant and equipment resulting from the loss of control of a subsidiary. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Decrease through other distributions to owners, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IncreaseDecreaseThroughOtherDistributionsToOwners`
- Description: The decrease in equity through distributions to owners that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note.

**Decrease through other distributions to owners, equity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IncreaseDecreaseThroughOtherDistributionsToOwners`
- Description: The decrease in equity through distributions to owners that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note.

**Decrease through performance obligation being satisfied, contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughPerformanceObligationBeingSatisfiedContractLiabilities`
- Description: The decrease in contract liabilities resulting from the performance obligation being satisfied. [Refer: Contract liabilities; Performance obligations [member]]

**Decrease through right to consideration becoming unconditional, contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughRightToConsiderationBecomingUnconditionalContractAssets`
- Description: The decrease in contract assets resulting from the right to consideration becoming unconditional. [Refer: Contract assets]

**Decrease through transfer to liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughTransferToLiabilitiesIncludedInDisposalGroupsClassifiedAsHeldForSaleOtherProvisions`
- Description: The decrease in other provisions resulting from the transfer of those provisions to liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale. [Refer: Other provisions; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Decrease through write-off, financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DecreaseThroughWriteoffFinancialAssets`
- Description: The decrease in financial assets resulting from write-off. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Deductible temporary differences for which no deferred tax asset is recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeductibleTemporaryDifferencesForWhichNoDeferredTaxAssetIsRecognised`
- Description: The amount of deductible temporary differences for which no deferred tax asset is recognised in the statement of financial position. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]]

**Deductible temporary differences, unused tax losses and unused tax credits for which no deferred tax asset is recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeductibleTemporaryDifferencesUnusedTaxLossesAndUnusedTaxCreditsForWhichNoDeferredTaxAssetIsRecognised`
- Description: The amount of deductible temporary differences, unused tax losses and unused tax credits for which no deferred tax asset is recognised in the statement of financial position. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax credits [member]; Unused tax losses [member]]

**Default financial statements date [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefaultFinancialStatementsDateMember`
- Description: This member stands for the standard value for the 'Creation date' axis if no other member is used.

**Default financial statements date [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DefaultFinancialStatementsDateMember`
- Description: This member stands for the standard value for the 'Creation date' axis if no other member is used.

**Deferred acquisition costs arising from insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredAcquisitionCostsArisingFromInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The amount of costs that an insurer incurs to sell, underwrite and initiate a new insurance contract whose recognition as an expense has been deferred. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Deferred expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentDeferredExpenses`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current deferred expenses.

**Deferred expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentDeferredExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of deferred expenses.

**Deferred income**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredIncome`
- Description: The amount of liability representing income that has been received but is not yet earned. [Refer: Revenue]

**Deferred income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_AmortisationOfDeferredIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortization of deferred income such as grants. Grants which are related to income, are presented as part of profit or loss, either separately or under a general heading such as ‘Other income’; alternatively, they are deducted in reporting the related expense.

**Deferred income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeDeferredIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

**Deferred income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentNontradeDeferredIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

**Deferred income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DeferredIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of deferred income.

**Deferred income classified as current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredIncomeClassifiedAsCurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of deferred income.

**Deferred income classified as non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredIncomeClassifiedAsNoncurrent`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

**Deferred income including contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredIncomeIncludingContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of liabilities representing income that has been received (or the amount is due) but is not yet earned, including contract liabilities. [Refer: Contract liabilities]

**Deferred income including contract liabilities recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredIncomeIncludingContractLiabilitiesRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for deferred income including contract liabilities assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Deferred income including contract liabilities; Business combinations [member]]

**Deferred income other than contract liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredIncomeOtherThanContractLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of liabilities representing income that has been received (or the amount is due) but is not yet earned, other than contract liabilities. [Refer: Contract liabilities]

**Deferred income other than contract liabilities recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredIncomeOtherThanContractLiabilitiesRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for deferred income other than contract liabilities assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Deferred income other than contract liabilities; Business combinations [member]]

**Deferred tax asset associated with regulatory deferral account balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxAssetAssociatedWithRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalances`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax asset associated with regulatory deferral account balances. [Refer: Deferred tax assets; Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Deferred tax asset when utilisation is dependent on future taxable profits in excess of profits from reversal of taxable temporary differences and entity has suffered loss in jurisdiction to which deferred tax asset relates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxAssetWhenUtilisationIsDependentOnFutureTaxableProfitsInExcessOfProfitsFromReversalOfTaxableTemporaryDifferencesAndEntityHasSufferedLossInJurisdictionToWhichDeferredTaxAssetRelates`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax asset when: (a) the utilisation of the deferred tax asset is dependent on future taxable profits in excess of the profits arising from the reversal of existing taxable temporary differences; and (b) the entity has suffered a loss in either the current or preceding period in the tax jurisdiction to which the deferred tax asset relates. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]]

**Deferred tax assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of income tax recoverable in future periods in respect of:a. deductible temporary differences;b. the carryforward of unused tax losses; andc. the carryforward of unused tax credits.

**Deferred tax assets not offset against deferred tax liabilities because undue cost or effort exemption is used**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxAssetsNotOffsetAgainstDeferredTaxLiabilitiesBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsUsed`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax assets that have not been offset against deferred tax liabilities because the undue cost or effort exemption is used.

**Deferred tax assets recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxAssetsRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for deferred tax assets acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Deferred tax assets; Business combinations [member]]

**Deferred tax expense (income)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxExpenseIncome`
- Description: The amount of tax expense (income) relating to changes in deferred tax liabilities and deferred tax assets. [Refer: Deferred tax assets; Deferred tax liabilities]

**Deferred tax expense (income) arising from write-down or reversal of write-down of deferred tax asset**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxExpenseArisingFromWritedownOrReversalOfWritedownOfDeferredTaxAsset`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense (income) arising from the write-down, or reversal of a previous write-down, of a deferred tax asset. [Refer: Deferred tax assets]

**Deferred tax expense (income) recognised in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxExpenseIncomeRecognisedInProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of tax expense or income relating to changes in deferred tax liabilities and deferred tax assets, recognised in profit or loss. [Refer: Deferred tax assets; Deferred tax expense (income); Deferred tax liabilities]

**Deferred tax expense (income) relating to origination and reversal of temporary differences**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToOriginationAndReversalOfTemporaryDifferences`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense or income relating to the creation or reversal of temporary differences. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Deferred tax expense (income)]

**Deferred tax expense (income) relating to origination and reversal of temporary differences**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToOriginationAndReversalOfTemporaryDifferences`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense or income relating to the creation or reversal of temporary differences. Deferred tax is income tax payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for future reporting periods as a result of past transactions or events.

**Deferred tax expense (income) relating to tax rate changes or imposition of new taxes**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToTaxRateChangesOrImpositionOfNewTaxes`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense or income relating to tax rate changes or the imposition of new taxes. [Refer: Deferred tax expense (income)]

**Deferred tax expense (income) relating to tax rate changes or imposition of new taxes**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToTaxRateChangesOrImpositionOfNewTaxes`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense or income relating to tax rate changes or the imposition of new taxes. Deferred tax is income tax payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for future reporting periods as a result of past transactions or events.

**Deferred tax expense arising from write-down or reversal of write-down of deferred tax asset**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxExpenseArisingFromWritedownOrReversalOfWritedownOfDeferredTaxAsset`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax expense arising from the write-down, or reversal of a previous write-down, of a deferred tax asset. [Refer: Deferred tax assets]

**Deferred tax liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of income tax payable in future periods in respect of taxable temporary differences.

**Deferred tax liabilities not offset against deferred tax assets because undue cost or effort exemption is used**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxLiabilitiesNotOffsetAgainstDeferredTaxAssetsBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsUsed`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax liabilities that have not been offset against deferred tax assets because the undue cost or effort exemption is used.

**Deferred tax liabilities on liabilities arising from contracts within scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxLiabilitiesOnLiabilitiesArisingFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS4AndNonderivativeInvestmentContracts`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax liabilities on liabilities arising from the contracts within the scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities]

**Deferred tax liabilities recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxLiabilitiesRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for deferred tax liabilities assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities; Business combinations [member]]

**Deferred tax liability (asset)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax liabilities or assets. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities; Deferred tax assets]

**Deferred tax liability (asset)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxLiabilityAsset`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax liabilities or assets. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities; Deferred tax assets]

**Deferred tax liability associated with regulatory deferral account balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxLiabilityAssociatedWithRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalances`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax liability associated with regulatory deferral account balances. [Refer: Deferred tax liabilities; Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Deferred tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DeferredTaxRelatingToItemsChargedOrCreditedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax related to items credited (charged) directly to equity. [Refer: Deferred tax expense (income)]

**Deferred tax relating to items credited (charged) directly to equity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DeferredTaxRelatingToItemsCreditedChargedDirectlyToEquity`
- Description: The amount of deferred tax relating to particular items that are charged or credited directly to equity.

**Defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The present value, without deducting any plan assets, of expected future payments required to settle the obligation resulting from employee service in the current and prior periods. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value]

**Defined benefit obligation, at present value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DefinedBenefitObligationAtPresentValue`
- Description: The present value, without deducting any plan assets, of expected future payments required to settle the obligation resulting from employee service in the current and prior periods. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value]

**Defined benefit plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DefinedBenefitPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

**Defined benefit plans [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefinedBenefitPlansAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Defined benefit plans [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DefinedBenefitPlansAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods. It also represents the standard value for the 'Defined benefit plans' axis if no other member is used.

**Defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods. It also represents the standard value for the 'Defined benefit plans' axis if no other member is used.

**Defined benefit plans other than multi-employer plans, state plans and plans that share risks between entities under common control [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefinedBenefitPlansOtherThanMultiemployerPlansStatePlansAndPlansThatShareRisksBetweenEntitiesUnderCommonControlMember`
- Description: This member stands for defined benefit plans other than multi-employer plans, state plans and plans that share risks between entities under common control. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Defined benefit plans that share risks between entities under common control [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DefinedBenefitPlansThatShareRisksBetweenEntitiesUnderCommonControlMember`
- Description: This member stands for defined benefit plans that share risks between entities under common control such as a parent and its subsidiaries. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Parent [member]]

**Defined contribution plan**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DefinedContributionPlan`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Departure from requirement of IFRS [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepartureFromRequirementOfIFRSAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Deposit placed with investment brokers**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DepositPlacedWithInvestmentBrokers`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows of deposit placements with investment brokers which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

**Deposit placed with other corporations**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DepositsPlacedWithOtherCorporations`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of deposits placed with other corporations.Deposit is the sum of money paid into a bank or building society account.

**Deposits**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentNontradeDeposits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current non-trade deposits which are returnable sums payable on the rental of something, to cover any possible loss or damage.

**Deposits and advanced billings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeDepositsAndAdvancedBillings`
- Description: Represents the amount of current non-trade deposits and advanced billings.

**Deposits and advanced billings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentNontradeDepositsAndAdvancedBillings`
- Description: Represents the amount of non-current non-trade deposits and advanced billings.

**Deposits and placements with licensed banks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DepositsAndPlacementsWithLicensedBanks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of deposits placed with licensed banks. Deposit is the sum of money paid into a bank or building society account.

**Deposits from banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepositsFromBanks`
- Description: The amount of deposit liabilities from banks held by the entity.

**Deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of deposit liabilities from customers held by the entity.

**Depreciation and amortisation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationAndAmortisationExpense`
- Description: The amount of depreciation and amortisation expense. Depreciation and amortisation are the systematic allocations of depreciable amounts of assets over their useful lives.

**Depreciation and amortisation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationAndAmortisationExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation and amortisation expense which is the systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

**Depreciation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationExpense`
- Description: The amount of depreciation expense. Depreciation is the systematic allocation of depreciable amounts of tangible assets over their useful lives.

**Depreciation method, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationMethodBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The depreciation method used for biological assets measured at their cost less any accumulated depreciation and accumulated impairment losses. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Depreciation method, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationMethodBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The depreciation method used for biological assets measured at their cost less any accumulated depreciation and accumulated impairment losses. [Refer: Biological assets, at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment]

**Depreciation method, investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationMethodInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The depreciation method used for investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Depreciation method, investment property, cost model**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationMethodInvestmentPropertyCostModel`
- Description: The depreciation method used for investment property measured using the cost model. [Refer: Investment property]

**Depreciation method, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationMethodPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The depreciation method used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Depreciation method, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationMethodPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The depreciation method used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Depreciation rate, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationRateBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The depreciation rate used for biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Depreciation rate, investment property, cost model**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationRateInvestmentPropertyCostModel`
- Description: The depreciation rate used for investment property. [Refer: Investment property]

**Depreciation rate, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationRatePropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The depreciation rate used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Depreciation, biological assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationBiologicalAssets`
- Description: The amount of depreciation recognised on biological assets. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Biological assets]

**Depreciation, impairment and amortisation**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DepreciationImpairmentAndAmortisation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to depreciation, impairment and amortisation during the reporting period.

**Depreciation, impairment and amortisation**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DepreciationImpairmentAndAmortisation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to depreciation, impairment and amortisation during the reporting period.

**Depreciation, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationInvestmentProperty`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation expenses. Depreciation is the systematic allocation of depreciable amounts of tangible assets over their useful lives.

**Depreciation, investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The amount of depreciation of investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Investment property [member]]

**Depreciation, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_DepreciationPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation of property, plant and equipment. The systematic allocation of the depreciable amount of an asset over its useful life.

**Depreciation, right-of-use assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DepreciationRightofuseAssets`
- Description: The amount of depreciation of right-of-use assets. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense; Right-of-use assets]

**Derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

**Derivative financial assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

**Derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial assets forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssetsForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments, typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial assets held for hedging**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeFinancialAssetsHeldForHedging`
- Description: The amount of derivative financial assets held for hedging. [Refer: Derivative financial assets]

**Derivative financial assets held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeFinancialAssetsHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of derivative financial assets held for trading. [Refer: Derivative financial assets; Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading]

**Derivative financial assets options**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssetsOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial assets others at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssetsOthersAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Derivative financial assets swap**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialAssetsSwap`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

**Derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

**Derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial liabilities forward contract**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContract`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial liabilities forward contract used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesForwardContractUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of informal agreements traded through a broker-dealer network to buy and sell derivative instruments typically currency, at a specified price at a certain future date used for hedging.

**Derivative financial liabilities held for hedging**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesHeldForHedging`
- Description: The amount of derivative financial liabilities held for hedging. [Refer: Derivative financial liabilities]

**Derivative financial liabilities held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of derivative financial liabilities held for trading. [Refer: Derivative financial liabilities; Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss that meet definition of held for trading]

**Derivative financial liabilities options**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial liabilities options used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOptionsUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of rights to buy or sell derivative instruments at a specified price within a set time used for hedging.

**Derivative financial liabilities others**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other derivatives liabilities at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Derivative financial liabilities others used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesOthersUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other derivatives liabilities used for hedging not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Derivative financial liabilities swaps**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesSwaps`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate that are classified at fair value through profit or loss.

**Derivative financial liabilities swaps used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabiltiesSwapsUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of exchange of liabilities between two borrowers, either so that each acquires access to funds in a currency they need or so that a fixed interest rate is exchanged for a floating rate used for hedging.

**Derivative financial liabilities used for hedging**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesUsedForHedging`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of derivatives used for hedging.

**Derivative financial liabilities, undiscounted cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeFinancialLiabilitiesUndiscountedCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of contractual undiscounted cash flows in relation to derivative financial liabilities. [Refer: Derivative financial liabilities]

**Derivative liabilities used to mitigate risks arising from assets backing contracts within scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeLiabilitiesUsedToMitigateRisksArisingFromAssetsBackingContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS4AndNonderivativeInvestmentContracts`
- Description: The amount of derivative liabilities used to mitigate risks arising from the assets backing the contracts within the scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts. [Refer: Derivatives [member]]

**Derivative liabilities used to mitigate risks arising from contracts within scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativeLiabilitiesUsedToMitigateRisksArisingFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS4AndNonderivativeInvestmentContracts`
- Description: The amount of derivative liabilities used to mitigate risks arising from the contracts within the scope of IFRS 4 and non-derivative investment contracts. [Refer: Derivatives [member]]

**Derivatives [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativesMember`
- Description: This member stands for financial instruments or other contracts within the scope of IFRS 9 with all three of the following characteristics: (a) Their value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non-financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’); (b) They require no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors; (c) They are settled at a future date. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Derivatives, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativesAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount derivatives contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]; Derivatives [member]]

**Derivatives, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DerivativesPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage derivatives contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]] [Contrast: Derivatives, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets]

**Description of accounting for transaction recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingForTransactionRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The description of how the acquirer accounted for a transaction recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in a business combination. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Description of accounting policies and methods of computation followed in interim financial statements [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ExplanationOfAccountingPoliciesAndMethodsOfComputationFollowedInInterimFinancialStatements`
- Description: The disclosure of a statement that the same accounting policies and methods of computation are followed in the interim financial statements as compared with the most recent annual financial statements or, if those policies or methods have been changed, a description of the nature and effect of the changes.

**Description of accounting policy decision to use exception in IFRS 13.48, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyDecisionToUseExceptionInIFRS1348Assets`
- Description: The description of the fact that the entity made an accounting policy decision to use the exception in paragraph 48 of IFRS 13 for assets.

**Description of accounting policy decision to use exception in IFRS 13.48, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyDecisionToUseExceptionInIFRS1348Liabilities`
- Description: The description of the fact that the entity made an accounting policy decision to use the exception in paragraph 48 of IFRS 13 for liabilities.

**Description of accounting policy for administrative fees and other incidental fees [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAdministrativeFeesAndOtherIncidentalFeesExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for administrative fees and other indicental fees.

**Description of accounting policy for administrative fees and other incidental fees [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAdministrativeFeesAndOtherIncidentalFeesExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to administrative fees and other indicental fees.

**Description of accounting policy for amortisation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAmortisationExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to amortisation.

**Description of accounting policy for assessment income [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAssessmentOfIncomeExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for assessment income.

**Description of accounting policy for assessment income [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAssessmentOfIncomeExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to assessment income.

**Description of accounting policy for available-for-sale financial assets [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForAvailableforsaleFinancialAssetsExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for available-for-sale financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Description of accounting policy for basis of accounting [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfAccountingExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for basis of accounting.

- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfAccountingExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to basis of accounting.

**Description of accounting policy for basis of consolidation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfConsolidationExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for basis of consolidation.

**Description of accounting policy for basis of consolidation [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfConsolidationExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the basis of consolidation.

**Description of accounting policy for basis of preparation of financial statements [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfPresentationOfFinancialStatementsExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for basis of preparation of financial statements.

**Description of accounting policy for basis of preparation of financial statements [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBasisOfPresentationOfFinancialStatementsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the basis of preparation of financial statements, which includes statement of compliance, basis of measurement, use of estimates and judgement and other basis of preparation information.

**Description of accounting policy for biological assets [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBiologicalAssetsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to biological assets.

- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForBusinessCombinationsAndGoodwillExplanatory`
- Description: Expiry date 2023-01-01: The description of the entity's accounting policy for business combinations and goodwill. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Goodwill]
Effective 2023-01-01: The description of the entity's material accounting policy information for business combinations and goodwill. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Goodwill]

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForCashFlowsExplanatory`

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForCommodityFutureAndForwardContractsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to commodity future and forward contracts.

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForCompoundFinancialInstrumentExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to compound financial instrument.

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForConstructionContractExplanatory`

- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForContributionsExplanatory`
- Description: The description of the entity's accounting policy for contributions.

**Description of accounting policy for contributions [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForContributionsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to contributions.

**Description of accounting policy for customer acquisition costs [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForCustomerAcquisitionCostsExplanatory`
- Description: Expiry date 2023-01-01: The description of the entity's accounting policy for costs related to acquisition of customers.
Effective 2023-01-01: The description of the entity's material accounting policy information for costs related to acquisition of customers.

**Description of accounting policy for decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation provisions [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DescriptionOfAccountingPolicyForDecommissioningRestorationAndRehabilitationProvisionsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation provisions.
