Insurance revenue shall depict the provision of services arising from the group of insurance contracts at an amount that reflects the consideration to which the entity expects to be entitled in exchange for those services. [Refer: Insurance contracts issued [member]; Revenue]

**Insurance revenue, allocation of portion of premiums that relate to recovery of insurance acquisition cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueAllocationOfPortionOfPremiumsThatRelateToRecoveryOfInsuranceAcquisitionCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to the allocation of the portion of the premiums that relate to the recovery of insurance acquisition cash flows. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Increase (decrease) through insurance acquisition cash flows, insurance contracts liability (asset)]

**Insurance revenue, amounts relating to changes in liability for remaining coverage**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueAmountsRelatingToChangesInLiabilityForRemainingCoverage`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to the changes in the liability for remaining coverage. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Net liabilities or assets for remaining coverage excluding loss component [member]]

**Insurance revenue, change in risk adjustment for non-financial risk**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueChangeInRiskAdjustmentForNonfinancialRisk`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to the change in the risk adjustment for non-financial risk, as specified in paragraph B124(b) of IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Risk adjustment for non-financial risk [member]]

**Insurance revenue, contractual service margin recognised in profit or loss because of transfer of insurance contract services**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueContractualServiceMarginRecognisedInProfitOrLossBecauseOfTransferOfServices`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to the contractual service margin recognised in profit or loss because of the transfer of insurance contract services in the period, as specified in paragraph B124(c) of IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Contractual service margin [member]]

**Insurance revenue, insurance service expenses incurred during period measured at amounts expected at beginning of period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueInsuranceServiceExpensesIncurredDuringPeriodMeasuredAtAmountsExpectedAtBeginningOfPeriod`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to the insurance service expenses incurred during the period measured at the amounts expected at the beginning of the period, as specified in paragraph B124(a) of IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Insurance service expenses from insurance contracts issued]

**Insurance revenue, other amounts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRevenueOtherAmounts`
- Description: The amount of insurance revenue recognised in the period related to other amounts, if any, for example experience adjustments for premium receipts other than those that relate to future service, as specified in paragraph B124(d) of IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance revenue]

**Insurance risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for risk, other than financial risk, transferred from the holder of a contract to the issuer. [Refer: Financial risk [member]]

**Insurance service expenses from insurance contracts issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceServiceExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssued`
- Description: The amount of expenses arising from a group of insurance contracts issued, comprising incurred claims (excluding repayments of investment components), other incurred insurance service expenses, amortisation of insurance acquisition cash flows, changes that relate to past service and changes that relate to future service. [Refer: Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Insurance service result**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceServiceResult`
- Description: The amount comprising insurance revenue and insurance service expenses. [Refer: Insurance revenue; Insurance service expenses from insurance contracts issued; Income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held, other than finance income (expenses)]

**Intangible asset fair value used as deemed cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetFairValueUsedAsDeemedCost`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets for which fair value was used as their deemed cost in the opening IFRS statement of financial position. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets acquired by way of government grant**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsAcquiredByWayOfGovernmentGrant`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets acquired through government grants. [Refer: Government grants; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets acquired by way of government grant**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsAcquiredByWayOfGovernmentGrant`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets acquired through government grants. [Refer: Government grants; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets acquired by way of government grant, fair value initially recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsAcquiredByWayOfGovernmentGrantAtFairValue`
- Description: The initial fair value of intangible assets acquired through government grants. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Government grants; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets acquired by way of government grant, fair value initially recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsAcquiredByWayOfGovernmentGrantAtFairValue`
- Description: The initial fair value of intangible assets acquired through government grants. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Government grants; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of intangible assets and goodwill.

**Intangible assets and goodwill [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsAndGoodwillMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets and goodwill. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of intangible assets and goodwill' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Goodwill; Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets material to entity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntity`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets that are material to the entity’s financial statements. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets material to entity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntity`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets that are material to the entity’s financial statements. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets material to entity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Intangible assets material to entity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Intangible assets material to entity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntityMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets material to the entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Intangible assets material to entity' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Intangible assets material to entity]

**Intangible assets material to entity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntityMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets material to the entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Intangible assets material to entity' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Intangible assets material to entity]

**Intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of intangible assets other than goodwill.

**Intangible assets other than goodwill [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwillMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets other than goodwill. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of intangible assets other than goodwill' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets other than goodwill [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwillMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets other than goodwill. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of intangible assets other than goodwill' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets other than goodwill, revaluation surplus**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwillRevaluationSurplus`
- Description: The amount of revaluation surplus that relates to intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill; Revaluation surplus]

**Intangible assets other than goodwill, revalued assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwillCarryingAmountOfRevaluedAssets`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets other than goodwill that are accounted for at revalued amounts. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets other than goodwill, revalued assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwillCarryingAmountAtCostOfRevaluedAssets`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets other than goodwill that would have been recognised had the revalued intangible assets been measured using the cost model after recognition. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets pledged as security for liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsPledgedAsSecurityForLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets pledged as security for liabilities. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets pledged as security for liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsPledgedAsSecurityForLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets pledged as security for liabilities. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets relating to insurance contracts acquired in business combinations or portfolio transfers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsRelatingToInsuranceContractsAcquiredInBusinessCombinationsOrPortfolioTransfers`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets relating to insurance contracts acquired in business combinations or portfolio transfers. [Refer: Business combinations [member]; Intangible assets other than goodwill; Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Intangible assets under development**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsUnderDevelopment`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets representing such assets under development. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets under development [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsUnderDevelopmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing such assets under development. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets under development [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsUnderDevelopmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing such assets under development. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets whose title is restricted**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsWhoseTitleIsRestricted`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets whose title is restricted. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets whose title is restricted**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleAssetsWhoseTitleIsRestricted`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets whose title is restricted. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets with indefinite useful life**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsWithIndefiniteUsefulLife`
- Description: The amount of intangible assets assessed as having an indefinite useful life. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Intangible assets with indefinite useful life [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsWithIndefiniteUsefulLifeAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Intangible assets with indefinite useful life [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleAssetsWithIndefiniteUsefulLifeMember`
- Description: This member stands for intangible assets with an indefinite useful life. It also represents the standard value for the 'Intangible assets with indefinite useful life' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Intangible assets with indefinite useful life]

**Intangible exploration and evaluation assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssets`
- Description: The amount of exploration and evaluation expenditures recognised as intangible assets in accordance with the entity's accounting policy. Exploration and evaluation expenditures are expenditures incurred by an entity in connection with the exploration for, and evaluation of, mineral resources before the technical feasibility and commercial viability of extracting a mineral resource are demonstrable.

**Intangible exploration and evaluation assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing intangible exploration and evaluation assets. [Refer: Exploration and evaluation assets [member]]

**Intangible exploration and evaluation assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IntangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing intangible exploration and evaluation assets. [Refer: Intangible exploration and evaluation assets]

**Interest costs capitalised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestCostsCapitalised`
- Description: The amount of interest costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds that are directly attributable to the acquisition, construction or production of a qualifying asset and which form part of the cost of that asset.

**Interest costs incurred**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestCostsIncurred`
- Description: The amount of interest costs that an entity incurs.

**Interest expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense arising from interest.

**Interest expense (income), defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseIncomeDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of interest expense (income) arising from defined benefit plans. [Refer: Interest income (expense); Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from interest expense (income)]

**Interest expense for financial liabilities not at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseForFinancialLiabilitiesNotAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of interest expense for financial liabilities that are not at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Interest expense; Financial liabilities]

**Interest expense for financial liabilities not at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestExpenseForFinancialLiabilitiesNotAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of expense arising from interest for financial liabilities that are not at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Interest expense on bank loans and overdrafts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnBankLoansAndOverdrafts`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on bank loans and overdrafts. [Refer: Interest expense; Bank overdrafts]

**Interest expense on bonds**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnBonds`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on bonds issued. [Refer: Interest expense; Bonds issued]

**Interest expense on borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnBorrowings`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on borrowings. [Refer: Interest expense; Borrowings]

**Interest expense on debt instruments issued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnDebtInstrumentsIssued`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on debt instruments issued. [Refer: Interest expense; Debt instruments issued]

**Interest expense on deposits from banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnDepositsFromBanks`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on deposits from banks. [Refer: Interest expense; Deposits from banks]

**Interest expense on deposits from customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnDepositsFromCustomers`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on deposits from customers. [Refer: Interest expense; Deposits from customers]

**Interest expense on financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnFinancialLiabilitiesDesignatedAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on financial liabilities designated at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Interest expense; Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently]

**Interest expense on financial liabilities held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnFinancialLiabilitiesHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on financial liabilities held for trading. [Refer: Interest expense; Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss that meet definition of held for trading]

**Interest expense on lease liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on lease liabilities. [Refer: Lease liabilities]

**Interest expense on liabilities due to central banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnLiabilitiesDueToCentralBanks`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on liabilities due to central banks. [Refer: Interest expense; Liabilities due to central banks]

**Interest expense on other financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnOtherFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on other financial liabilities. [Refer: Interest expense; Other financial liabilities]

**Interest expense on repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseOnRepurchaseAgreementsAndCashCollateralOnSecuritiesLent`
- Description: The amount of interest expense on repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent. [Refer: Interest expense; Repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent]

**Interest expense, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestExpenseDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of interest expense arising from defined benefit plans. [Refer: Interest expense; Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from interest expense (income)]

**Interest from trust account**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestFromTrustAccount`
- Description: Represents the amount of interest income from trust account.

**Interest from trust account**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InterestFromTrustAccount`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income from trust account which are interest earned from trustees.

**Interest income**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RevenueFromInterest`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of revenue from interest income received.

**Interest income (expense)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRevenueExpense`
- Description: The amount of income or expense arising from interest. [Refer: Interest expense; Interest income]

**Interest income due from related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestIncomeDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance income due from related parties which are interest earned from related parties.  A related party is a person or entity that is related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements.

**Interest income for financial assets not at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeForFinancialAssetsNotAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of income arising from interest for financial assets that are not at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Interest income]

**Interest income for financial assets not at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestIncomeForFinancialAssetsNotAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of income arising from interest for financial assets that are not at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Interest income]

**Interest income on available-for-sale financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnAvailableforsaleFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of interest income on available-for-sale financial assets. [Refer: Interest income; Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Interest income on cash and bank balances at central banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnCashAndBankBalancesAtCentralBanks`
- Description: The amount of interest income on cash and bank balances at central banks. [Refer: Interest income; Cash and bank balances at central banks]

**Interest income on cash and cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnCashAndCashEquivalents`
- Description: The amount of interest income on cash and cash equivalents. [Refer: Interest income; Cash and cash equivalents]

**Interest income on debt instruments held**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnDebtInstrumentsHeld`
- Description: The amount of interest income on debt instruments held. [Refer: Interest income; Debt instruments held]

**Interest income on deposits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnDeposits`
- Description: The amount of interest income on deposits. [Refer: Interest income]

**Interest income on financial assets designated at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnFinancialAssetsDesignatedAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of interest income on financial assets designated at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Interest income; Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, designated upon initial recognition or subsequently]

**Interest income on financial assets held for trading**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnFinancialAssetsHeldForTrading`
- Description: The amount of interest income on financial assets held for trading. [Refer: Interest income; Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss, classified as held for trading]

**Interest income on held-to-maturity investments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnHeldtomaturityInvestments`
- Description: The amount of interest income on held-to-maturity investments. [Refer: Interest income; Held-to-maturity investments]

**Interest income on impaired financial assets accrued**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnImpairedFinancialAssetsAccrued`
- Description: The amount of income arising from interest on impaired financial assets accrued after impairment using the rate of interest used to discount the future cash flows for the purpose of measuring the impairment loss. [Refer: Interest income]

**Interest income on loans and advances to banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnLoansAndAdvancesToBanks`
- Description: The amount of interest income on loans and advances to banks. [Refer: Interest income; Loans and advances to banks]

**Interest income on loans and advances to customers**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnLoansAndAdvancesToCustomers`
- Description: The amount of interest income on loans and advances to customers. [Refer: Interest income; Loans and advances to customers]

**Interest income on loans and receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestIncomeOnLoansAndReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income on loans and receivables which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

**Interest income on other financial assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestIncomeOnOtherFinancialAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from interest income on other financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Interest income on reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeOnReverseRepurchaseAgreementsAndCashCollateralOnSecuritiesBorrowed`
- Description: The amount of interest income on reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed. [Refer: Interest income; Reverse repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities borrowed]

**Interest income related party transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestIncomeRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income from related parties, which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

**Interest income, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of interest income arising from defined benefit plans. [Refer: Interest income; Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from interest expense (income)]

**Interest paid, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestPaidClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Interest paid, classified as investing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestPaidClassifiedAsInvestingActivities`
- Description: The cash outflow for interest paid, classified as investing activities.

**Interest paid, classified as investing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestPaidClassifiedAsInvestingActivities`
- Description: The cash outflow for interest paid, classified as investing activities.

**Interest paid, classified as operating activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestPaidClassifiedAsOperatingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

**Interest payable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestPayable`
- Description: The amount of interest recognised as a liability.

**Interest payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeInterestPayable`
- Description: Represents the amount of current non-trade interest payables.

**Interest Rate Benchmark Reform-Phase 2 [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateBenchmarkReformPhase2Member`
- Description: This member stands for Interest Rate Benchmark Reform-Phase 2 (Amendments to IFRS 9, IAS 39, IFRS 7, IFRS 4 and IFRS 16) issued in August 2020.

**Interest rate benchmarks [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateBenchmarksAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Interest rate benchmarks [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateBenchmarksMember`
- Description: This member stands for all interest rate benchmarks. It also represents the standard value for the 'Interest rate benchmarks' axis if no other member is used.

**Interest rate risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for the type of risk that the fair value or future cash flows of a financial instrument will fluctuate because of changes in market interest rates. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Interest rate risks of debt instruments measured at amortised cost [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestRateRisksOfDebtInstrumentsMeasuredAtAmortisedCostMember`
- Description: This member stands for interest rate risks of debt instruments measured at amortised cost. Interest rate risk is a type of risk that the fair value or future cash flows of a financial instrument will fluctuate because of changes in market interest rates.

**Interest rate swap contract [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateSwapContractMember`
- Description: This member stands for an interest rate swap contract. [Refer: Swap contract [member]]

**Interest rate types [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateTypesMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of interest rates. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of interest rates' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Interest rate risk [member]]

**Interest rate, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRateMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for an interest rate used as a measurement input.

**Interest receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestReceivable`
- Description: The amount of interest recognised as a receivable.

**Interest receivable**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentNontradeFinanceIncomeReceivable`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current non-trade interest receivables.  Interest is the money paid regularly at a particular rate for the use of money lent, or for delaying the repayment of a debt.

**Interest received, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InterestReceivedClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Interest received, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InterestReceivedClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Interest received, classified as investing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestReceivedClassifiedAsInvestingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

**Interest received, classified as operating activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InterestReceivedClassifiedAsOperatingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

**Interest revenue (expense) recognised for financial assets reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category, initial application of IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeExpenseRecognisedForFinancialAssetsReclassifiedIntoMeasuredAtAmortisedCostFirstApplicationOfIFRS9`
- Description: The amount of interest revenue (expense) recognised for financial assets that have been reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category as a result of the transition to IFRS 9. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Interest revenue (expense) recognised for financial liabilities reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category, initial application of IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeExpenseRecognisedForFinancialLiabilitiesReclassifiedIntoMeasuredAtAmortisedCostFirstApplicationOfIFRS9`
- Description: The amount of interest revenue (expense) recognised for financial liabilities that have been reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category as a result of the transition to IFRS 9. [Refer: Financial liabilities]

**Interest revenue calculated using effective interest method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRevenueCalculatedUsingEffectiveInterestMethod`
- Description: The amount of interest revenue calculated using the effective interest method. Effective interest method is the method that is used in the calculation of the amortised cost of a financial asset or a financial liability and in the allocation and recognition of the interest revenue or interest expense in profit or loss over the relevant period. [Refer: Revenue]

**Interest revenue for financial assets measured at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeForFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of revenue arising from interest for financial assets that are measured at amortised cost. [Refer: Interest income; Financial assets at amortised cost]

**Interest revenue for financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestRevenueForFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of interest revenue arising on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Revenue; Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income]

**Interest revenue recognised for assets reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category into amortised cost or fair value through other comprehensive income category**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InterestIncomeExpenseRecognisedForAssetsReclassifiedIntoMeasuredAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of revenue arising from interest recognised for assets reclassified out of fair value through profit or loss category into amortised cost or fair value through other comprehensive income category. [Refer: Interest income (expense); Financial assets at amortised cost]

**Internal credit grades [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InternalCreditGradesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Internal credit grades [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InternalCreditGradesMember`
- Description: This member stands for credit grades that have been developed by the entity itself.

**Internally generated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InternallyGeneratedMember`
- Description: This member stands for items that have been internally generated by the entity.

**Intrinsic value of liabilities from share-based payment transactions for which counterparty's right to cash or other assets vested**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IntrinsicValueOfLiabilitiesFromSharebasedPaymentTransactionsForWhichCounterpartysRightToCashOrOtherAssetsVested2011`
- Description: The intrinsic value of liabilities arising from share-based transactions for which the counterparty's right to cash or other assets had vested by the end of the period (for example, vested share appreciation rights). The intrinsic value is the difference between the fair value of the shares to which the counterparty has the (conditional or unconditional) right to subscribe, or which it has the right to receive, and the price (if any) that the counterparty is (or will be) required to pay for those shares. Share-based payment transactions are transactions in which the entity: (a) receives goods or services from the supplier of those goods or services (including an employee) in a share-based payment arrangement; or (b) incurs an obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier in a share-based payment arrangement when another group entity receives those goods or services, for which the counterparty's right to cash or other assets had vested by the end of the period (for example, vested share appreciation rights).

**Inventories**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoriesTotal`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of inventories which are:a. held for sale in the ordinary course of business;b. in the process of production for such sale; orc. in the form of materials or supplies to be consumed in the production process or in the rendering of services.

**Inventories [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoriesMember`
- Description: This member stands for inventories. [Refer: Inventories]

**Inventories pledged as security for liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoriesPledgedAsSecurityForLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of inventories pledged as security for liabilities. [Refer: Inventories]

**Inventories pledged as security for liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoriesPledgedAsSecurityForLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of inventories pledged as security for liabilities. [Refer: Inventories]

**Inventories, at fair value less costs to sell**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoriesAtFairValueLessCostsToSell`
- Description: The amount of inventories carried at fair value less costs to sell. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Inventories, at net realisable value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoriesAtNetRealisableValue`
- Description: The amount of inventories carried at net realisable value. [Refer: Inventories]

**Inventory recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoryRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for inventory acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Inventories; Business combinations [member]]

**Inventory recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoryRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for inventory acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Inventories; Business combinations [member]]

**Inventory write-down**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InventoryWritedown2011`
- Description: The amount of expense recognised related to the write-down of inventories to net realisable value. [Refer: Inventories]

**Inventory write-down**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InventoryWritedown2011`
- Description: The amount of expense recognised related to the impairment of inventories to the selling price less costs to complete and sell. [Refer: Inventories]

**Investment contracts liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentContractsLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of liabilities relating to investment contracts that fall within the scope of IAS 39 or IFRS 9.

**Investment funds [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentFundsMember`
- Description: This member stands for investment funds.

**Investment funds, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentFundsAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount investment funds contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]; Investment funds [member]]

**Investment funds, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentFundsPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage investment funds contribute to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]; Investment funds [member]] [Contrast: Investment funds, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets]

**Investment in associates fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesFairValueAdjustmentsOnLoansAndAdvancesAndFinancialGuarantee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates related to fair value adjustments on shareholder’s loans and advances.

**Investment in associates quoted shares in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesQuotedSharesInMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on Malaysian stock market.

**Investment in associates quoted shares outside Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesQuotedSharesOutsideMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on a particular stock market outside Malaysia.

**Investment in associates unquoted shares in Malaysia, net of impairment**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesUnquotedSharesInMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

**Investment in associates unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInAssociatesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment in associates unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment in associates unrealised profit on transactions with associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInAssociatesUnrealisedProfitOnTransactionsWithAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates related to the investor’s share of profit or loss of the investee after the date of acquisition.

**Investment in joint ventures fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInJointVenturesFairValueAdjustmentsOnLoansAdvancesAndFinancialGuarantee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures related to fair value adjustments on shareholder’s loans and advances.

**Investment in joint ventures quoted shares in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInJointVenturesQuotedSharesInMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on Malaysian stock market.

**Investment in joint ventures quoted shares outside Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInJointVenturesQuotedSharesOutsideMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on a particular stock market outside Malaysia.

**Investment in joint ventures unquoted shares in Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInJointVenturesUnquotedSharesInMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

**Investment in joint ventures unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInJointVenturesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment in joint ventures unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInJointVenturesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment in subsidiaries fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesFairValueAdjustmentsOnLoansAndAdvancesAndFinancialGuarantee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries related to fair value adjustments on shareholder’s loans and advances.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted other financial assets in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedOtherFinancialAssetsInMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted other financial assets in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedOtherFinancialAssetsInMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted other financial assets outside Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedOtherFinancialAssetsOutsideMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted other financial assets outside Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedOtherFinancialAssetsOutsideMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted shares in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedSharesInMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on Malaysian stock market.

**Investment in subsidiaries quoted shares outside Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesQuotedSharesOutsideMalaysia`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares that can be bought and sold on a particular stock market outside Malaysia.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted other financial assets in Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedOtherFinancialAssetsInMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted other financial assets in Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedOtherFinancialAssetsInMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted other financial assets outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedOtherFinancialAssetsOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted other financial assets outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedOtherFinancialAssetsOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted shares in Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedSharesInMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment in subsidiaries unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubsidiariesUnquotedSharesOutsideMalaysiaNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

**Investment income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentIncome`
- Description: The amount of investment income, such as interest and dividends.

**Investment property [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentPropertyMember`
- Description: This member stands for investment property. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of investment property' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Investment property]

**Investment property [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentPropertyMember`
- Description: This member stands for property (land or a building - or part of a building - or both) held (by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease) to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, rather than for: (a) use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; or (b) sale in the ordinary course of business.

**Investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentPropertyWhoseFairValueCannotBeMeasuredReliablyWithoutUndueCostOrEffortOnOngoingBasis`
- Description: The amount of investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment, because the fair value cannot be measured reliably without undue cost or effort on an ongoing basis. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentProperty`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  properties (land or a building, or part of a building, or both) held by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, instead of for:a. use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; orb. sale in the ordinary course of business.

**Investment property carried at cost or in accordance with IFRS 16 within fair value model, at time of sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentPropertyCarriedAtCostOrInAccordanceWithIFRS16WithinFairValueModelAtTimeOfSale`
- Description: The amount at the time of the sale of investment property carried at cost or in accordance with IFRS 16 within fair value model. [Refer: At cost or in accordance with IFRS 16 within fair value model [member]; Investment property]

**Investment property completed [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentPropertyCompletedMember`
- Description: This member stands for completed investment property. [Refer: Investment property completed]

**Investment property fair value used as deemed cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentPropertyFairValueUsedAsDeemedCost`
- Description: The amount of investment property, for which fair value was used as deemed cost in the opening IFRS statement of financial position. [Refer: Investment property]

**Investment property long-term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentPropertyLongtermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

**Investment property short-term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentPropertyShorttermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of land held on lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

**Investment property under construction or development [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentPropertyUnderConstructionOrDevelopmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for investment property under construction or development. [Refer: Investment property under construction or development]

**Investments accounted for using equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentAccountedForUsingEquityMethod`
- Description: The amount of investments accounted for using the equity method. The equity method is a method of accounting whereby the investment is initially recognised at cost and adjusted thereafter for the post-acquisition change in the investor's share of net assets of the investee. The investor's profit or loss includes its share of the profit or loss of the investee. The investor's other comprehensive income includes its share of the other comprehensive income of the investee. [Refer: At cost [member]]

**Investments accounted for using equity method [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsAccountedForUsingEquityMethodMember`
- Description: This member stands for investments accounted for using the equity method. [Refer: Investments accounted for using equity method]

**Investments for risk of policyholders**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsForRiskOfPolicyholders`
- Description: The amount of investments against insurance liabilities where all risk is borne by the policyholders.

**Investments in associates**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.

**Investments in associates [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInAssociatesMember`
- Description: This member stands for investments in associates. [Refer: Investments in associates]

**Investments in associates accounted for under cost model because undue cost or effort exemption is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInAssociatesAccountedForUnderCostModelBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsApplied`
- Description: The amount of investments in associates accounted for under the cost model because the undue cost or effort exemption is applied. [Refer: Investments in associates]

**Investments in associates accounted for using equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInAssociatesAccountedForUsingEquityMethod`
- Description: The amount of investments in associates accounted for using the equity method. [Refer: Associates [member]; Investments accounted for using equity method]

**Investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_FairValueOfInvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsDesignatedAsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeMember`
- Description: This member stands for investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income. It also represents the standard value for the 'Investments in equity instruments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Investments in joint ventures**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets or jointly controlled entities.

**Investments in joint ventures [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInJointVenturesMember`
- Description: This member stands for investments in joint ventures. [Refer: Investments in joint ventures]

**Investments in joint ventures accounted for using equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInJointVenturesAccountedForUsingEquityMethod`
- Description: The amount of investments in joint ventures accounted for using the equity method. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]; Investments accounted for using equity method]

**Investments in jointly controlled entities accounted for under cost model because undue cost or effort exemption is applied**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInJointlyControlledEntitiesAccountedForUnderCostModelBecauseUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsApplied`
- Description: The amount of investments in jointly controlled entities accounted for under the cost model because the undue cost or effort exemption is applied. A jointly controlled entity is a joint venture that involves the establishment of a corporation, partnership or other entity in which each venturer has an interest.

**Investments in subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentInSubisidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, that is controlled by another entity (known as the parent).

**Investments in subsidiaries not consolidated at reporting date**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_InvestmentsInSubsidiariesNotConsolidatedAtReportingDate`
- Description: The amount of investments in subsidiaries that are not consolidated at the reporting date. A subsidiary is an entity that is controlled by another entity.

**Investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates reported in separate financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InvestmentsInSubsidiariesJointVenturesAndAssociates`
- Description: The amount of investments in subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates in an entity's separate financial statements. [Refer: Associates [member]; Joint ventures [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Investments in subsidiaries reported in separate financial statements]

**Islamic medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredIslamicMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Represents the amount of current portion of non-current secured islamic medium term notes.

**Islamic medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredIslamicMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Represents the amount of current portion of non-current unsecured islamic medium term notes.

**Islamic medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentPortionOfSecuredIslamicMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Represents the amount of non-current portion of secured islamic medium term notes.

**Islamic medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentPortionOfUnsecuredIslamicMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Represents the amount of non-current portion of unsecured islamic medium term notes.

**Issue costs not recognised as expense for transaction recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssueCostsNotRecognisedAsExpenseForTransactionRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombination`
- Description: The amount of issue costs not recognised as an expense for transactions recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in a business combination. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Issue of convertible notes, net of tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IssueOfConvertibleInstruments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of convertible notes (or bonds or debts) which is a type of debt security that can be converted into a predetermined amount of the underlying company's equity at certain times during the bond's life, usually at the discretion of the bondholder.

**Issue of equity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IssueOfEquity`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of shares which refers to the new allotment of shares during the reporting period.

**Issued capital**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IssuedCapital`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Issued capital [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IssuedCapitalMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of ordinary shares issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**Issued capital, ordinary shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuedCapitalOrdinaryShares`
- Description: The nominal value of capital arising from issuing ordinary shares. [Refer: Issued capital]

**Issued capital, preference shares**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuedCapitalPreferenceShares`
- Description: The nominal value of capital arising from issuing preference shares. [Refer: Issued capital]

**Issues or repurchases of entity's debt or equity instruments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IssuesOrRepurchasesOfEntitysDebtOrEquityInstrumentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for issues or repurchases of entity's debt or equity instruments.

**Issues, fair value measurement, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuesFairValueMeasurementAssets`
- Description: The increase in the fair value measurement of assets resulting from issues of those assets. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Issues, fair value measurement, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuesFairValueMeasurementEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The increase in the fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments resulting from issues of those equity instruments. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Entity's own equity instruments [member]]

**Issues, fair value measurement, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_IssuesFairValueMeasurementLiabilities`
- Description: The increase in fair value measurement of liabilities resulting from issues of those liabilities. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Items in course of collection from other banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ItemsInCourseOfCollectionFromOtherBanks`
- Description: The amount of items that have been transmitted from other banks but not yet been received and processed by the entity.

**Items in course of transmission to other banks**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ItemsInCourseOfTransmissionToOtherBanks`
- Description: The amount of items that have been transmitted to but not yet received and processed by other banks.

**Items of contingent liabilities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ItemsOfContingentLiabilitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Items of contingent liabilities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ItemsOfContingentLiabilitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for aggregated individual items of contingent liabilities. It also represents the standard value for the 'Items of contingent liabilities' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Joint operations [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointOperationsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Joint operations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointOperationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for joint arrangements whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the assets, and obligations for the liabilities, relating to the arrangement.

**Joint ventures [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointVenturesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Joint ventures [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_JointVenturesMember`
- Description: This member stands for joint arrangements whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

**Joint ventures where entity is venturer [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_JointVenturesWhereEntityIsVenturerMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of joint ventures where entity is venturer. A joint venture is a contractual arrangement whereby two or more parties undertake an economic activity that is subject to joint control. Joint ventures can take the form of jointly controlled operations, jointly controlled assets, or jointly controlled entities.

**Key management personnel compensation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensation`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel compensation. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Key management personnel compensation, other long-term employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensationOtherLongtermBenefits`
- Description: The amount of compensation to key management personnel in the form of other long-term employee benefits. [Refer: Other long-term employee benefits; Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Key management personnel compensation, post-employment benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensationPostemploymentBenefits`
- Description: The amount of compensation to key management personnel in the form of post-employment benefits. [Refer: Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Key management personnel compensation, short-term employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensationShorttermEmployeeBenefits`
- Description: The amount of compensation to key management personnel in the form of short-term employee benefits. [Refer: Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Key management personnel compensation, termination benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_KeyManagementPersonnelCompensationTerminationBenefits`
- Description: The amount of compensation to key management personnel in the form of termination benefits. [Refer: Termination benefits expense; Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_KeyManagementPersonnelOfEntityOrParentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of key management personnel. Key management personnel are those persons having authority andresponsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Land**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Land`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land.

**Land [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LandMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing land held by the entity for use in operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Land [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LandMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing land held by the entity for use in operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Land and buildings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LandAndBuildings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land and building.

**Land and buildings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LandAndBuildingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing land and depreciable buildings and similar structures for use in operations. [Refer: Buildings; Land; Property, plant and equipment]

**Land and buildings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LandAndBuildingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing land and depreciable buildings and similar structures for use in operations. [Refer: Buildings; Land; Property, plant and equipment]

**Last date of lodgement of financial statements**
- Element: `ssmt_LastDateOfLodgementOfFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the last date of lodgement of financial statements

**Last date on which financial statements and reports are circulated**
- Element: `ssmt_LastDateOnWhichFinancialStatementsAndReportsAreCirculated`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date on which financial statement and reports are circulated to the members and shareholders of the company after finalization of accounts.

**Later than fifteen years and not later than twenty years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFifteenYearsAndNotLaterThanTwentyYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than fifteen years and not later than twenty years.

**Later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than five years.

**Later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than five years.

**Later than five years and not later than seven years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFiveYearsAndNotLaterThanSevenYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than five years and not later than seven years.

**Later than five years and not later than ten years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFiveYearsAndNotLaterThanTenYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than five years and not later than ten years.

**Later than four months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFourMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than four months.

**Later than four years and not later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanFourYearsAndNotLaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than four years and not later than five years.

**Later than one month and not later than six months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneMonthAndNotLaterThanSixMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one month and not later than six months.

**Later than one month and not later than three months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneMonthAndNotLaterThanThreeMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one month and not later than three months.

**Later than one month and not later than two months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneMonthAndNotLaterThanTwoMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one month and not later than two months.

**Later than one year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one year.

**Later than one year and not later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneYearAndNotLaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one year and not later than five years.

**Later than one year and not later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LaterThanOneYearAndNotLaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one year and not later than five years.

**Later than one year and not later than three years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneYearAndNotLaterThanThreeYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one year and not later than three years.

**Later than one year and not later than two years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanOneYearAndNotLaterThanTwoYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than one year and not later than two years.

**Later than seven years and not later than ten years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanSevenYearsAndNotLaterThanTenYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than seven years and not later than ten years.

**Later than six months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanSixMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than six months.

**Later than six months and not later than one year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanSixMonthsAndNotLaterThanOneYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than six months and not later than one year.

**Later than ten years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTenYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than ten years.

**Later than ten years and not later than fifteen years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTenYearsAndNotLaterThanFifteenYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than ten years and not later than fifteen years.

**Later than three months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three months.

**Later than three months and not later than four months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeMonthsAndNotLaterThanFourMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three months and not later than four months.

**Later than three months and not later than one year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeMonthsAndNotLaterThanOneYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three months and not later than one year.

**Later than three months and not later than six months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeMonthsAndNotLaterThanSixMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three months and not later than six months.

**Later than three years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three years.

**Later than three years and not later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeYearsAndNotLaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three years and not later than five years.

**Later than three years and not later than four years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanThreeYearsAndNotLaterThanFourYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than three years and not later than four years.

**Later than twenty years and not later than twenty-five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTwentyYearsAndNotLaterThanTwentyfiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than twenty years and not later than twenty-five years.

**Later than two months and not later than three months [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTwoMonthsAndNotLaterThanThreeMonthsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than two months and not later than three months.

**Later than two years and not later than five years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTwoYearsAndNotLaterThanFiveYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than two years and not later than five years.

**Later than two years and not later than three years [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LaterThanTwoYearsAndNotLaterThanThreeYearsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a time band of later than two years and not later than three years.

**Lease and hire purchase receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentNontradeLeaseAndHirePurchaseReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of an agreement whereby the lessor conveys to the lessee in return for a payment or series of payments the right to use an asset for an agreed period of time.

**Lease and hire purchase receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentNontradeLeaseAndHirePurchaseReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of an agreement whereby the lessor conveys to the lessee in return for a payment or series of payments the right to use an asset for an agreed period of time.

**Lease and sublease payments recognised as expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_LeaseAndSubleasePaymentsRecognisedAsExpense`
- Description: The amount of payments on leases and subleases recognised as an expense by the lessee.

**Lease commitments for short-term leases for which recognition exemption has been used**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LeaseCommitmentsForShorttermLeasesForWhichRecognitionExemptionHasBeenUsed`
- Description: The amount of the lease commitments for short-term leases accounted for applying paragraph 6 of IFRS 16. Short-term lease is a lease that, at the commencement date, has a lease term of 12 months or less. A lease that contains a purchase option is not a short-term lease.

**Lease liabilities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LeaseLiabilitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for lease liabilities. [Refer: Lease liabilities]

**Lease receivables [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LeaseReceivablesMember`
- Description: This member stands for receivables related to leases.

**Leased properties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_LeasedProperties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contracts which is, or contains, a lease if the contract conveys the right to control the use of an identified asset for a period of time in exchange for consideration.

**Leasehold improvements [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_LeaseholdImprovementsMember`
