- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherLongtermBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other long-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Other long-term employee benefits generally include, for example:a. long-term compensated absences such as long-service or sabbatical leave;b. long-service benefits;c. long-term disability benefits;d. profit-sharing and bonuses payable twelve months or more after the end of the period in which the employees render the related service; ande. deferred compensation paid twelve months or more after the end of the period in which it is earned.

**Other long-term employee benefits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherLongtermBenefitsMember`
- Description: This member stands for other long-term employee benefits, which are employee benefits (other than post-employment benefits and termination benefits) that are not wholly due within twelve months after the end of the period in which the employees render the related service. Such benefits may include long-term paid absences, jubilee or other long-service benefits, long-term disability benefits, long-term profit-sharing and bonuses and long-term deferred remuneration. It also represents the standard value for the 'Categories of other long-term employee benefits' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Employee benefits expense]

**Other losses recognised in profit or loss, fair value measurement, assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherLossesRecognisedInProfitOrLossFairValueMeasurementAssets`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other losses recognized arising from fair value measurement not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other material actuarial assumptions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherMaterialActuarialAssumptions`
- Description: Any other material assumption used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]; Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Other material actuarial assumptions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherMaterialActuarialAssumptions`
- Description: Any other material assumption used as a significant actuarial assumption to determine the present value of a defined benefit obligation. Actuarial assumptions are the entity’s unbiased and mutually compatible best estimates of the demographic and financial variables that will determine the ultimate cost of providing post-employment benefits. [Refer: Defined benefit obligation, at present value]

**Other material actuarial assumptions [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherMaterialActuarialAssumptionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for material actuarial assumptions that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Other material non-cash items**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherMaterialNoncashItems`
- Description: The amount of material non-cash items other than depreciation and amortisation.

**Other miscellaneous borrowings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherMiscellaneousBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other borrowings not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other miscellaneous expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherMiscellaneousExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other miscellaneous expenses not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other miscellaneous income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_MiscellaneousOtherIncome`
- Description: Represents the amount of miscellaneous other income.

**Other miscellaneous income**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_MiscellaneousOtherIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of miscellaneous other income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other miscellaneous income**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherMiscellaneousIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other miscellaneous income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other miscellaneous income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherMiscellaneousIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of miscellaneous other operating income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other miscellaneous non-trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherMiscellaneousNontradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-trade payables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement. An entity shall classify an asset as current when: a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in the entity's normal operating cycle; b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading; c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting date; or d. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent, unless it is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting date. An entity shall classify all other assets as non-current.

**Other non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentPortionOfOtherNoncurrentBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other non-current borrowings not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current derivative financial liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentDerivativeFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current derivative financial liabilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current dividend payable to non-controlling interest**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentDividendPayablesDueToNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of dividend payable to non-controlling interests.

**Other non-current employee benefit liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentOtherEmployeeBenefitLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current employee benefit liabilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-current financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial assets]

**Other non-current financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNoncurrentFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-current financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial assets]

**Other non-current financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-current financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-current financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNoncurrentFinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-current financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-current liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement. An entity shall classify a liability as current when: a. it expects to settle the liability in the entity’s normal operating cycle; b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading; c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting date; or d. the entity does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after reporting date. An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

**Other non-current loans from non-controlling interest**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentLoansFromNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of loan from non-controlling interests for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Other non-current miscellaneous payables due to non-controlling interests**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentMiscellaneousPayablesDueToNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of miscellaneous payables due to non-controlling interests not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current non-financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentNonfinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-current non-financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Other non-current non-financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNoncurrentNonfinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-current non-financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Financial assets, class [member]]

**Other non-current non-financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNoncurrentNonfinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-current non-financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-current non-financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNoncurrentNonfinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-current non-financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-current non-trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentNontradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current non-trade payables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current non-trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentNontradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current non-trade receivables.

**Other non-current other payables due to non-controlling interests**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other payables due to non-controlling interests.

**Other non-current payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current payables.

**Other non-current portion of loan from associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPortionOfLoanFromAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of loan from associates for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Other non-current portion of loan from joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPortionOfLoanFromJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of loan from joint ventures for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Other non-current portion of loan from subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPortionOfLoanFromSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of loan from subsidiaries for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Other non-current portion of miscellaneous borrowings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPortionOfMiscellaneousBorrowings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current borrowings not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current portion of redeemable preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPortionOfRedeemablePreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the salient features of the redeemable preference shares are as follows: a. They do not carry the right to vote, except for variation of holders' rights to the class of shares, b. They rank equally with other shares with regard to the entity's residual assets, except that holders of redeemable preference shares participate only to the extent of the par value of the shares, c. The holders are entitled to receive dividends, d. They are not convertible to ordinary shares, e. They are redeemable at the option of the holder f. The Group is obliged to pay holders of redeemable preference shares.

**Other non-current provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherLongtermProvisions`
- Description: The amount of non-current provisions other than provisions for employee benefits. [Refer: Non-current provisions]

**Other non-current receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current receivables.

**Other non-current receivables due from associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from associates which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current receivables due from holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from holding company which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current receivables due from joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from joint ventures which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current receivables due from other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from related parties which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.A related party is a person or entity that is related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (in this Standard referred to as the ‘reporting entity’).a. A person or a close member of that person’s family is related to a reporting entity if that person:I. has control or joint control of the reporting entity;ii. has significant influence over the reporting entity; oriii. is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity or of a parent of the reporting entity.b. An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the following conditions applies:I. The entity and the reporting entity are members of the same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary and fellow subsidiary is related to the others).ii. One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of a group of which the other entity is a member).iii. Both entities are joint ventures of the same third party.iv. One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the other entity is an associate of the third entity.v. The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or an entity related to the reporting entity. If the reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring employers are also related to the reporting entity.vi. The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a person identified in (a).vii. A person identified in (a)(I) has significant influence over the entity or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or of a parent of the entity).viii. The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to the parent of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current receivables due from other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amounts billed by a business to its other related parties when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Other non-current receivables due from related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current receivables due from related parties.

**Other non-current receivables due from subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from subsidiaries which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current receivables due from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromTrustees`
- Description: Represents the amount of other non-current receivables due from trustees.

**Other non-current receivables due from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherNoncurrentReceivablesDueFromTrustees`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other non-current receivables due from trustees which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other non-current secured bank loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentSecuredBankLoans`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other secured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current trade payables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current trade payables due to associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradePayablesDueToAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to associates.

**Other non-current trade payables due to holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradePayablesDueToHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to holding company.

**Other non-current trade payables due to joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradePayablesDueToJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to joint ventures.

**Other non-current trade payables due to subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradePayablesDueToSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to subsidiaries.

**Other non-current trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentTradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current trade receivables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-current unsecured bank loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentUnsecuredBankLoans`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other unsecured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-distributable reserves**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNondistributableReserves`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-distributable reserves not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-distributable reserves [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_OtherNonDistributableReservesMember`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-distributable reserves not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-distributable reserves [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNondistributableReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of other non-distributable reserves apart from those reported in this section.

**Other non-financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNonfinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Other non-financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNonfinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of non-financial assets that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Financial assets, class [member]]

**Other non-financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherNonfinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-financial liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherNonfinancialLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of non-financial liabilities that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Other financial liabilities]

**Other non-trade accruals**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeAccruals`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

**Other non-trade deferred income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeDeferredIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

**Other non-trade deposit and advanced billings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeDepositAndAdvancedBillings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of returnable sums payable on the hire or rental of something, to cover possible loss or damage.

**Other non-trade dividend payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeDividendPayable`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of dividend payable.

**Other non-trade financing costs**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeFinancingCosts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of borrowing costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

**Other non-trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-trade payables.

**Other non-trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-trade receivables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other non-trade retention payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeRetentionPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of payment for a service or product that is withheld pending the completion of some specified condition.

**Other nontrade interest payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNontradeInterestPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of interest payable.

**Other occupation**
- Element: `ssmt_OtherOccupation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to other occupation of the person.

**Other operating income (expense)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherOperatingIncomeExpense`
- Description: The amount of operating income (expense) that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note.

**Other payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other payables.

**Other payables due to a director of a subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToDirectorOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other non-current payables due to director of subsidiary.

**Other payables due to a director of a subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToDirectorOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other non-current payables due to director of subsidiary.

**Other payables due to associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to associates.

**Other payables due to directors of subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentPayablesDueToDirectorsOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current payables due to directors of subsidiary.

**Other payables due to directors of subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentPayablesDueToDirectorsOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current payables due to directors of subsidiary.

**Other payables due to from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentPayablesDueToTrustees`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current payables due to trustees.

**Other payables due to from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentPayablesDueToTrustees`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to trustees.

**Other payables due to holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to holding company.

**Other payables due to joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to joint ventures.

**Other payables due to non-controlling interest**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToNoncontrollingInterest`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other payables due to non-controlling interests.

**Other payables due to other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other payables due to related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToRelatedCompanies`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of other payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other payables due to related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other payables due to related parties.

**Other payables due to subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPayablesDueToSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to subsidiaries.

**Other payables due to trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToTrustees`
- Description: Represents the amount of other non-current payables due to trustees.

**Other payables due to trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherNoncurrentPayablesDueToTrustees`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses due to trustees.

**Other prepayments**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPrepayments`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amounts paid for goods and services before they have been delivered or received.

**Other price risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherPriceRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for a type of market risk representing the risk that the fair value or future cash flows of a financial instrument will fluctuate because of changes in market prices (other than those arising from interest rate risk or currency risk), whether those changes are caused by factors specific to the individual financial instrument or its issuer, or by factors affecting all similar financial instruments traded in the market. [Refer: Currency risk [member]; Interest rate risk [member]; Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Other prior period adjustments**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherPriorPeriodAdjustments`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to other prior period adjustments during the period.

**Other prior period adjustments**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherPriorPeriodAdjustments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other prior period adjustments not reported elsewhere in the category above.

**Other property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other property, plant and equipment not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other property, plant and equipment [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherPropertyPlantAndEquipmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing property, plant and equipment that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Other property, plant and equipment [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherPropertyPlantAndEquipmentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing property, plant and equipment that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherProvisions`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other provisions [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherProvisionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for provisions other than provisions for employee benefits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of other provisions' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Provisions]

**Other provisions [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherProvisionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for provisions other than provisions for employee benefits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Classes of other provisions' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Provisions]

**Other receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other receivables.

**Other receivables due from a director of a subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromDirectorOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current receivables due from a director of a subsidiary.

**Other receivables due from a director of a subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromDirectorOfSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current receivables due from a director of a subsidiary.

**Other receivables due from associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other receivables due from associates which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other receivables due from holding company which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other receivables due from joint ventures which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of various forms of non-trade receivables to its other related parties which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of various forms of non-trade receivables to its other related  parties which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other receivables due from related parties.

**Other receivables due from subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherReceivablesDueFromSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other receivables due from subsidiaries which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other receivables due from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromTrustees`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current receivables due from trustees.

**Other receivables due from trustees**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentReceivablesDueFromTrustees`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of other current receivables due from trustees which do not generally result from the operations of the reporting entity.

**Other regulatory deferral account credit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherRegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalances`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account credit balances that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances]

**Other regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account debit balances that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Other related parties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherRelatedPartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of other related parties not reported elsewhere in the other categories.

**Other related parties transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherTransactionsWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for other related party transactions that are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other rental income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherRentalIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other rental income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other rental income on land and buildings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherRentalIncomeOnLandAndBuildings`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of rental income. Rental income includes  any sum received from the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Other reserves [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherReservesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the total amount of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

**Other revenue**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherRevenue`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other revenue not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other revenue**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherRevenueRecognisedForTransactionsWithRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other revenue from related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other reversals of provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherReversalsOfProvisions`
- Description: The amount of reversals of provisions that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Provisions]

**Other royalty income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherRoyaltyIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from royalties which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

**Other secured bank loans received**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentSecuredOtherBankLoanReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other secured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other secured bank loans received**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherSecuredBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other secured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other short-term employee benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherShorttermEmployeeBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other short-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Short-term employee benefits generally include items such as:a. wages, salaries and social security contributions;b. short-term compensated absences (such as paid annual leave and paid sick leave) when the absences are expected to occur within twelve months after the end of the period in which the employees render the related employee service;c. profit-sharing and bonuses payable within twelve months after the end of the period in which the employees render the related service; andd. non-monetary benefits (such as medical care, housing, cars and free or subsidised goods or services) for current employees.

**Other street**
- Element: `ssmt_OtherStreetLocationOfImmovablePropertyInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the other street location of immovable property sitiuated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**Other tangible or intangible assets transferred**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherTangibleOrIntangibleAssetsTransferred`
- Description: The fair value, at acquisition date, of other tangible or intangible assets (including a business or subsidiary of the acquirer) transferred as consideration in a business combination, that the entity does not separately disclose in the same note. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill; Business combinations [member]; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Other tax effects for reconciliation between accounting profit and tax expense (income)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherTaxEffectsForReconciliationBetweenAccountingProfitAndTaxExpenseIncome`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Accounting profit; Applicable tax rate]

**Other tax rate effects for reconciliation between accounting profit and tax expense (income)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherTaxRateEffectsForReconciliationBetweenAccountingProfitAndTaxExpenseIncome`
- Description: Tax rate effects, in aggregate, on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate that the entity does not separately disclose in the reconciliation. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Other temporary differences [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherTemporaryDifferencesMember`
- Description: This member stands for temporary differences that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]]

**Other trade payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherTradePayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other trade payables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherTradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current trade receivables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other trading income (expense)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OtherTradingIncomeExpense`
- Description: The amount of trading income (expense) that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note. [Refer: Trading income (expense)]

**Other transactions with owners**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTransactionsWithOwners`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other transactions with owners not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**Other transactions, change in fund and reserves**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTransfersAndOtherChangesInFund`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to increase (decrease) through transfers and other changes in fund during the reporting period.

**Other transactions, change in fund and reserves**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_IncreaseDecreaseThroughTransfersAndOtherChangesInFund`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to increase (decrease) through transfers and other changes in fund during the reporting period.

**Other unsecured bank loans received**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredOtherBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other unsecured bank facilities not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Other vehicles**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherVehicles`
- Description: Represents the amount of property, plant and equipment representing other vehicles used in the entity's operations.

**Other work performed by entity and capitalised**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherWorkPerformedByEntityAndCapitalised`
- Description: The amount of the entity's own work capitalised from items originally classified as costs that the entity does not separately disclose in the same statement or note.

**Others**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherComprehensiveIncomeNetOfTaxOtherEquityInstrumentsThatWillBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLoss`
- Description: Represents the amount of other comprehensive income, net of tax other equity instruments that will be reclassified to profit or loss.

**Others matters that relates to Director's report**
- Element: `ssmt_OthersMattersThatRelatesToDirectorsReport`
- Description: Description of the other matters that relates to Director's report.

**Outflows of cash from investing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OutflowsOfCashFromInvestingActivities`
- Description: The cash outflow for investing activities.

**Output of agricultural produce**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OutputOfAgriculturalProduce`
- Description: The output of entity's agricultural produce.

**Outstanding commitments made by entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OutstandingCommitmentsMadeByEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of outstanding commitments made by the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Outstanding commitments made on behalf of entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OutstandingCommitmentsMadeOnBehalfOfEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of outstanding commitments made on behalf of the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Owner-occupied property measured using investment property fair value model**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OwneroccupiedPropertyMeasuredUsingInvestmentPropertyFairValueModel`
- Description: The amount of property, plant and equipment representing owner-occupied property measured using the investment property fair value model applying paragraph 29A of IAS 16. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Owner-occupied property measured using investment property fair value model [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_OwneroccupiedPropertyMeasuredUsingInvestmentPropertyFairValueModelMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing owner-occupied property measured using the investment property fair value model applying paragraph 29A of IAS 16. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Par value per share**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ParValuePerShare`
- Description: The nominal value per share.

**Par value per share**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ParValuePerShare`
- Description: The nominal value per share.

**Parent [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ParentMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing an entity that has one or more subsidiaries.

**Participation in defined benefit plan that shares risks between group entities, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ParticipationInDefinedBenefitPlanThatSharesRisksBetweenGroupEntitiesRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of participation by the entity in a defined benefit plan that shares risks between group entities. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Related parties [member]]

**Participation in defined benefit plan that shares risks between group entities, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ParticipationInDefinedBenefitPlanThatSharesRisksBetweenGroupEntitiesRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of participation by the entity in a defined benefit plan that shares risks between group entities. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]; Related parties [member]]

**Particulars of company [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ParticularsOfCompanyMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of address of company.

**Passport expiry date**
- Element: `ssmt_PassportExpiryDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to passport expiry date of the shareholder or member.

**Passport number**
- Element: `ssmt_PassportNumberOfDirectors`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to passport number of directors.

**Past due status [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PastDueStatusAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Past due status [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PastDueStatusMember`
- Description: This member stands for all past-due statuses. It also represents the standard value for the 'Past due status' axis if no other member is used.

**Past service cost and losses (gains) arising from settlements, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PastServiceCostAndLossesGainsArisingFromSettlementsDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of expense (income) resulting from past service cost and losses (gains) arising from settlements. [Refer: Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans; Past service cost, defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from past service cost and losses (gains) arising from settlements]

**Past service cost, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PastServiceCostDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of expense (income) resulting from past service cost. Past service cost is the change in the present value of the defined benefit obligation for employee service in prior periods, resulting from a plan amendment (the introduction or withdrawal of, or changes to, a defined benefit plan) or a curtailment (a significant reduction by the entity in the number of employees covered by a plan). [Refer: Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss, defined benefit plans; Defined benefit plans [member]] [Contrast: Increase (decrease) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from past service cost]

**Payables for purchase of energy**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PayablesForPurchaseOfEnergy`
- Description: The amount of payables for the purchase of energy.

**Payables for purchase of non-current assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PayablesForPurchaseOfNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: The amount of payables for the purchase of non-current assets. [Refer: Non-current assets]

**Payables on social security and taxes other than income tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PayablesOnSocialSecurityAndTaxesOtherThanIncomeTax`
- Description: The amount of payment due on social security and taxes other than income tax. Income taxes include all domestic and foreign taxes that are based on taxable profits. Income taxes also include taxes, such as withholding taxes, that are payable by a subsidiary, associate or joint arrangement on distributions to the reporting entity.

**Payables to related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherPayablesToRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of payables due to related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Payables to related parties**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherPayablesToRelatedParties`
- Description: The amount of payables due to related parties. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Payments for debt issue costs**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsForDebtIssueCosts`
- Description: The cash outflow for debt issue costs.

**Payments for exploration and evaluation expenses**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsForExplorationAndEvaluationExpenses`
- Description: The cash outflow for expenses incurred by an entity in connection with the exploration for, and evaluation of, mineral resources before the technical feasibility and commercial viability of extracting a mineral resource are demonstrable.

**Payments for interest portion of lease liability**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PaymentsForInterestPortionOfLeaseLiability`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the interest portion of the lease liability applying the requirements in MFRS 107 Statement of Cash Flows for interest paid which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Payments for premiums and claims, annuities and other policy benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsForPremiumsAndClaimsAnnuitiesAndOtherPolicyBenefits`
- Description: The cash outflow for premiums and claims, annuities and other policy benefits.

**Payments for premiums and claims, annuities and other policy benefits**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsForPremiumsAndClaimsAnnuitiesAndOtherPolicyBenefits`
- Description: The cash outflow for premiums and claims, annuities and other policy benefits.

**Payments for principal portion of lease liability**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PaymentsForPrincipalPortionOfLeaseLiability`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the principal portion of the lease liability which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Payments for share issue costs**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsForShareIssueCosts`
- Description: The cash outflow for share issue costs.

**Payments from changes in ownership interests in subsidiaries that do not result in loss of control**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsFromChangesInOwnershipInterestsInSubsidiaries`
- Description: The cash outflow for changes in ownership interests in subsidiaries that do not result in a loss of control. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]]

**Payments from contracts held for dealing or trading purpose**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsFromContractsHeldForDealingOrTradingPurpose`
- Description: The cash outflow for contracts held for dealing or trading purposes.

**Payments from contracts held for dealing or trading purpose**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsFromContractsHeldForDealingOrTradingPurpose`
- Description: The cash outflow for contracts held for dealing or trading purposes.

**Payments made to non-controlling interests**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PaymentsMadeToAcquireNoncontrollingInterest`
- Description: Represents the amount of payment made to acquire non-controlling interest classified as financing activities.

**Payments of finance lease liabilities, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsOfFinanceLeaseLiabilitiesClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments of finance lease liabilities which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Payments of lease liabilities, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsOfLeaseLiabilitiesClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: The cash outflow for payment of lease liabilities, classified as financing activities. [Refer: Lease liabilities]

**Payments of other equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsOfOtherEquityInstruments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire other equity instruments which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities. A financial instrument is a contract that gives rise to a financial asset of one entity and a financial liability or equity instrument of another entity.

**Payments to acquire or redeem entity's shares**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsToAcquireOrRedeemEntitysShares`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to repurchase and redemption of entity's shares which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Payments to and on behalf of employees**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsToAndOnBehalfOfEmployees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to and on behalf of employees which includes expenses paid by the employees on behalf of the entity and personal expenses paid by the entity for the employees.

**Payments to manufacture or acquire assets held for rental to others and subsequently held for sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsToManufactureOrAcquireAssetsHeldForRentalToOthersAndSubsequentlyHeldForSale`
- Description: The cash outflow to manufacture or acquire assets held for rental to others and subsequently held for sale.

**Payments to suppliers for goods and services**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PaymentsToSuppliersForGoodsAndServices`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for goods and services acquired by the entity from third parties (suppliers).

**Payments to suppliers for goods and services and to and on behalf of employees**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PaymentsToSuppliersForGoodsAndServicesAndToAndOnBehalfOfEmployees`
- Description: The cash outflow for payments to suppliers for goods and services and to, and on behalf of, employees.

**Pension defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PensionDefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for pension defined benefit plans. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Percentage of entity's revenue**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfEntitysRevenue`
- Description: The percentage of the entity's revenue. [Refer: Revenue]

**Percentage of reasonably possible decrease in actuarial assumption**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleDecreaseInActuarialAssumption`
- Description: The reasonably possible percentage of the decrease in the actuarial assumption used to determine the present value of defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Percentage of reasonably possible decrease in risk variable that arises from contracts within scope of IFRS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleDecreaseInRiskExposureThatArisesFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17`
- Description: The percentage of the reasonably possible decrease in the risk variable that arises from contracts within scope of IFRS 17.

**Percentage of reasonably possible decrease in unobservable input, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleDecreaseInUnobservableInputAssets`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible decrease in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of assets.

**Percentage of reasonably possible decrease in unobservable input, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleDecreaseInUnobservableInputEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible decrease in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments.

**Percentage of reasonably possible decrease in unobservable input, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleDecreaseInUnobservableInputLiabilities`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible decrease in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of liabilities.

**Percentage of reasonably possible increase in actuarial assumption**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleIncreaseInActuarialAssumption`
- Description: The reasonably possible percentage of the increase in the actuarial assumption used to determine the present value of defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Actuarial assumptions [member]]

**Percentage of reasonably possible increase in risk variable that arises from contracts within scope of IFRS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleIncreaseInRiskExposureThatArisesFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible increase in the risk variable that arises from contracts within scope of IFRS 17.

**Percentage of reasonably possible increase in unobservable input, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleIncreaseInUnobservableInputAssets`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible increase in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of assets.

**Percentage of reasonably possible increase in unobservable input, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleIncreaseInUnobservableInputEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible increase in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of the entity's own equity instruments.

**Percentage of reasonably possible increase in unobservable input, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfReasonablyPossibleIncreaseInUnobservableInputLiabilities`
- Description: The percentage of a reasonably possible increase in an unobservable input used in fair value measurement of liabilities.

**Percentage of shareholding held**
- Element: `ssmt_PercentageOfShareholdingHeld`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the percentage of shareholding held.

**Percentage of voting equity interests acquired**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PercentageOfVotingEquityInterestsAcquired`
- Description: The percentage of voting equity interests acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Percentage of voting equity interests acquired**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PercentageOfVotingEquityInterestsAcquired`
- Description: The percentage of voting equity interests acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Performance based employee share scheme**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_PerformanceBasedEmployeeShareScheme`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share-based compensation expense. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entity

**Performance based employee share scheme**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PerformanceBasedEmployeeShareScheme`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share-based compensation expense. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entity

**Performance incentives**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PerformanceIncentives`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of performance incentive paid based on performance.

**Performance obligations [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PerformanceObligationsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Performance obligations [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PerformanceObligationsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all performance obligations. A performance obligation is a promise in a contract with a customer to transfer to the customer either: (a) a good or service (or a bundle of goods or services) that is distinct; or (b) a series of distinct goods or services that are substantially the same and that have the same pattern of transfer to the customer. This member also represents the standard value for the 'Performance obligations' axis if no other member is used.

**Performance obligations satisfied at point in time [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PerformanceObligationsSatisfiedAtPointInTimeMember`
- Description: This member stands for performance obligations satisfied at a point in time. An entity satisfies a performance obligation at a point in time, if the performance obligation is not satisfied over time. [Refer: Performance obligations [member]]

**Performance obligations satisfied over time [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PerformanceObligationsSatisfiedOverTimeMember`
- Description: This member stands for performance obligations satisfied over time. An entity satisfies a performance obligation over time, if one of the following criteria is met: (a) the customer simultaneously receives and consumes the benefits provided by the entity’s performance as the entity performs; (b) the entity’s performance creates or enhances an asset (for example, work in progress) that the customer controls as the asset is created or enhanced; or (c) the entity’s performance does not create an asset with an alternative use to the entity and the entity has an enforceable right to payment for performance completed to date. [Refer: Performance obligations [member]]

**Period covered by financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PeriodCoveredByFinancialStatements`
- Description: The description of the period covered by the set of financial statements or notes.

**Period covered by financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PeriodCoveredByFinancialStatements`
- Description: The description of the period covered by the financial statements.

**Perpetual Sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PerpetualSukuk`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of perpetual sukuk.Sukuk are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Plan assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PlanAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for defined benefit plan assets. Plan assets comprise: (a) assets held by a long-term employee benefit fund; and (b) qualifying insurance policies.

**Plan assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PlanAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The fair value of defined benefit plan assets. Plan assets comprise assets held by a long-term employee benefit fund and qualifying insurance policies. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Plan assets, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PlanAssetsAtFairValue`
- Description: The fair value of defined benefit plan assets. Plan assets comprise assets held by a long-term employee benefit fund and qualifying insurance policies. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Plant and equipment**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of machineries used in an industrial or manufacturing process and the necessary items for a particular purpose.

**Plants [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PlantsMember`
- Description: This member stands for plants.

**Portfolio and other management fee income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PortfolioAndOtherManagementFeeIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from underwriting commissions and fund management. Underwriting commissions are the compensation that an entity (a broker) receives for placing a new issue with investors and fund management is the process of managing money.

**Portion of consideration paid (received) consisting of cash and cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PortionOfConsiderationPaidReceivedConsistingOfCashAndCashEquivalents`
- Description: The portion of consideration paid or received, consisting of cash and cash equivalents, in respect of both obtaining and losing control of subsidiaries or other businesses. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]; Cash and cash equivalents; Consideration paid (received)]

**Portion of gains (losses) recognised when control of subsidiary is lost, attributable to derecognising regulatory deferral account balances in former subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PortionOfGainsLossesRecognisedWhenControlOfSubsidiaryIsLostAttributableToDerecognisingRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesInFormerSubsidiary`
- Description: The portion of gains (losses) from losing control of a subsidiary that is attributable to derecognising regulatory deferral account balances in the former subsidiary. [Refer: Gains (losses) recognised when control of subsidiary is lost; Regulatory deferral account balances [member]; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Portion of gains (losses) recognised when control of subsidiary is lost, attributable to recognising investment retained in former subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PortionOfGainsLossesRecognisedWhenControlOfSubsidiaryIsLostAttributableToRecognisingInvestmentRetainedInFormerSubsidiary`
- Description: The portion of gains (losses) from losing control of a subsidiary attributable to recognising any investment retained in the former subsidiary at its fair value at the date when control is lost. [Refer: Gains (losses) recognised when control of subsidiary is lost; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Post-employment benefit expense in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PostemploymentBenefitExpenseInProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of post-employment benefit expense included in profit or loss

**Post-employment benefit expense, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PostemploymentBenefitExpenseDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined benefit plans. Defined benefit plans are post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

**Post-employment benefit expense, defined contribution plans**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PostemploymentBenefitExpenseDefinedContributionPlans`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Post-employment medical defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PostemploymentMedicalDefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for post-employment medical defined benefit plans. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Postcode**
- Element: `ssmt_PostcodeOfImmovablePropertyInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the postcode of immovable property situated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**Postcode**
- Element: `ssmt_Postcode`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to postcode of the residential address in the case of an individual or in the case of a corporation the address of its registered office.

**Potential ordinary share transactions [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PotentialOrdinaryShareTransactionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for potential ordinary share transactions. [Refer: Ordinary shares [member]]

**Power generating assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PowerGeneratingAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing assets that generate power. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Practicing certificate number**
- Element: `ssmt_PracticingCertificateNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to practising certificate number of the secretary.

**Pre-contract costs [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrecontractCostsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a category of assets recognised from the costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers representing the pre-contract costs. [Refer: Assets recognised from costs to obtain or fulfil contracts with customers]

**Preference shares [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PreferenceSharesMember`
- Description: This member stands for equity instruments that are senior in some aspects to ordinary shares, but subordinate to debt instruments in terms of claim. [Refer: Ordinary shares [member]]

**Preference shares [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_PreferenceSharesMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to preference shares of the company.

**Premiums written, net of reinsurance**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PremiumsWrittenNetOfReinsurance`
- Description: The amount of premiums written, net of amounts reinsured with third parties.

**Prepaid land lease**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RightofusePrepaidLandLease`
- Description: Represents the amount of prepaid land lease assets that represent a lessee's right to use an underlying asset for the lease term. Underlying asset is an asset that is the subject of a lease, for which the right to use that asset has been provided by a lessor to a lessee.

**Prepaid land lease**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RightofusePrepaidLandLease`
- Description: Represents the amount of prepaid land lease assets that represent a lessee's right to use an underlying asset for the lease term. Underlying asset is an asset that is the subject of a lease, for which the right to use that asset has been provided by a lessor to a lessee.

**Prepaid rental of buildings and facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_RightofusePrepaidRentalForBuildingAndFacilities`
- Description: Represents the amount of prepaid rental for building and facilities assets that represent a lessee's right to use an underlying asset for the lease term. Underlying asset is an asset that is the subject of a lease, for which the right to use that asset has been provided by a lessor to a lessee.

**Prepaid rental of buildings and facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RightofusePrepaidRentalForBuildingAndFacilities`
- Description: Represents the amount of prepaid rental for building and facilities assets that represent a lessee's right to use an underlying asset for the lease term. Underlying asset is an asset that is the subject of a lease, for which the right to use that asset has been provided by a lessor to a lessee.

**Prepayment and accrued income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherNoncurrentNontradePrepaymentAndAccruedIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of non-current non-trade receivables of income for work that has been done but not yet invoiced.

**Prepayment risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrepaymentRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for the type of risk that one party to a financial asset will incur a financial loss because the other party repays earlier or later than expected. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Prepayments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Prepayments`
- Description: Receivables that represent amounts paid for goods and services before they have been delivered.

**Prepayments**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentPrepayments`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current amounts paid for goods and services before they have been delivered or received.

**Prepayments and accrued income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PrepaymentsAndAccruedIncome`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of prepayments and accrued income.

**Prepayments and accrued income including contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrepaymentsAndAccruedIncomeIncludingContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of prepayments and accrued income, including contract assets. [Refer: Prepayments; Accrued income including contract assets]

**Prepayments and accrued income other than contract assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrepaymentsAndAccruedIncomeOtherThanContractAssets`
- Description: The amount of prepayments and accrued income, other than contract assets. [Refer: Prepayments; Accrued income other than contract assets]

**Present value of defined benefit obligation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PresentValueOfDefinedBenefitObligationMember`
- Description: This member stands for the present value of a defined benefit obligation. The present value of a defined benefit obligation is the present value, without deducting any plan assets, of expected future payments required to settle the obligation resulting from employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Previous GAAP [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PreviousGAAPMember`
- Description: This member stands for the basis of accounting that the entity used immediately before adopting IFRSs. [Refer: IFRSs [member]]

**Previous GAAP [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PreviousGAAPMember`
- Description: This member stands for the basis of accounting that the entity used immediately before adopting IFRS for SMEs. [Refer: IFRS for SMEs [member]]

**Previously stated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PreviouslyStatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the information previously stated in the financial statements (ie before retrospective application or retrospective restatement).

**Previously stated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PreviouslyStatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for the information previously stated in the financial statements (ie before retrospective application or retrospective restatement).

**Price index movements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PriceIndexMovements`
- Description: The movements in the general price index used to restate financial statement information of an entity whose functional currency is the currency of a hyperinflationary economy.

**Price index movements**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PriceIndexMovements`
- Description: The movements in the general price index used to restate financial statement information of an entity whose functional currency is the currency of a hyperinflationary economy.

**Price risks of commodity or firm commitments or highly probable forecast transactions to purchase or sell commodity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PriceRisksOfCommodityOrFirmCommitmentsOrHighlyProbableForecastTransactionsToPurchaseOrSellCommodityMember`
- Description: This member stands for price risks of a commodity or firm commitments or highly probable forecast transactions to purchase or sell a commodity.

**Prices specified in forward agreements to purchase financial assets for cash**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PricesSpecifiedInForwardAgreementsToPurchaseFinancialAssetsForCash`
- Description: Prices specified in forward agreements to purchase financial assets for cash.

**Principal place of business**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusiness`
- Description: The place where an entity principally conducts operations.

**Principal place of business**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_PrincipalPlaceOfBusiness`
- Description: The place where an entity principally conducts operations.

**Principal place of business of associate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusinessOfAssociate`
- Description: The principal place of business of an associate. [Refer: Principal place of business; Associates [member]]

**Principal place of business of entity whose consolidated financial statements have been produced for public use**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusinessOfEntityWhoseConsolidatedFinancialStatementsHaveBeenProducedForPublicUse`
- Description: The principal place of business of the entity's ultimate or any intermediate parent whose consolidated financial statements that comply with IFRSs have been produced for public use. [Refer: Consolidated [member]; IFRSs [member]]

**Principal place of business of joint operation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusinessOfJointOperation`
- Description: The principal place of business of a joint operation. [Refer: Joint operations [member]; Principal place of business]

**Principal place of business of joint venture**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusinessOfJointVenture`
- Description: The principal place of business of a joint venture. [Refer: Principal place of business; Joint ventures [member]]

**Principal place of business of subsidiary**
- Element: `ifrs-full_PrincipalPlaceOfBusinessOfSubsidiary`
- Description: The principal place of business of a subsidiary. [Refer: Principal place of business; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Printing and stationery expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PrintingAndStationaryExpenses`
- Description: Represents the amount of expenses related to printing and stationary.

**Printing and stationery expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_PrintingAndStationaryExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of printing and stationery expense.

**Probability of default [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProbabilityOfDefaultAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Probability of default [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProbabilityOfDefaultMember`
- Description: This member stands for all probabilities of default.

**Probability of default, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProbabilityOfDefaultMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for the probability of default used as a measurement input.

**Proceeds from borrowings, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ProceedsFromBorrowingsClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing debentures, loans, notes, bonds, mortgages and other short-term and long-term borrowings which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Proceeds from borrowings, classified as financing activities**
