Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on change in value of forward elements of forward contracts, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnChangeInValueOfForwardElementsOfForwardContractsBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to change in value of forward elements of forward contracts, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on change in value of forward elements of forward contracts, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnChangeInValueOfForwardElementsOfForwardContractsNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to change in value of forward elements of forward contracts, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on change in value of time value of options, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnChangeInValueOfTimeValueOfOptionsBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to change in value of time value of options, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on change in value of time value of options, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnChangeInValueOfTimeValueOfOptionsNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to change in value of time value of options, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnFinanceIncomeExpensesFromReinsuranceContractsHeldExcludedFromProfitOrLossBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reclassification adjustments on finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnFinanceIncomeExpensesFromReinsuranceContractsHeldExcludedFromProfitOrLossNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reclassification adjustments on financial assets that have been de-designated from overlay approach, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnFinancialAssetsThatHaveBeenDedesignatedFromOverlayApproachBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to financial assets that have been de-designated from the overlay approach during the reporting period, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on financial assets that have been de-designated from overlay approach, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnFinancialAssetsThatHaveBeenDedesignatedFromOverlayApproachNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to financial assets that have been de-designated from the overlay approach during the reporting period, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reclassification adjustments on insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reclassification adjustments on net movement in regulatory deferral account balances, before tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnNetMovementInRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesBeforeTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to the net movement in regulatory deferral account balances, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account balances [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification adjustments on net movement in regulatory deferral account balances, net of tax**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationAdjustmentsOnNetMovementInRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesNetOfTax`
- Description: The amount of reclassification adjustments related to the net movement in regulatory deferral account balances, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit (loss) in the current period that were recognised in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account balances [member]; Other comprehensive income]

**Reclassification into available-for-sale financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationIntoAvailableforsaleFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified into the available-for-sale category. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Reclassification into financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationIntoFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified into the at fair value through profit or loss category. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss]

**Reclassification into held-to-maturity investments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationIntoHeldtomaturityInvestments`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified into the held-to-maturity investments category. [Refer: Held-to-maturity investments; Financial assets]

**Reclassification into loans and receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationIntoLoansAndReceivables`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified into the loans and receivables category. [Refer: Loans and receivables; Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at amortised cost into measured at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtAmortisedCostIntoMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the amortised cost measurement category and into the fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at amortised cost into measured at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtAmortisedCostIntoMeasuredAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the amortised cost measurement category and into the fair value through profit or loss measurement category. [Refer: At fair value [member]; Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at fair value through other comprehensive income into measured at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeIntoMeasuredAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category and into the amortised cost measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at fair value through other comprehensive income into measured at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeIntoMeasuredAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category and into the fair value through profit or loss measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at fair value through profit or loss into measured at amortised cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtFairValueIntoMeasuredAtAmortisedCost`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the fair value through profit or loss measurement category and into the amortised cost measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Reclassification of financial assets out of measured at fair value through profit or loss into measured at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOfFinancialAssetsOutOfMeasuredAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossIntoMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the fair value through profit or loss measurement category and into the fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Reclassification out of available-for-sale financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOutOfAvailableforsaleFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the available-for-sale category. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Reclassification out of financial assets at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOutOfFinancialAssetsAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the at fair value through profit or loss category. [Refer: Financial assets at fair value through profit or loss]

**Reclassification out of held-to-maturity investments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOutOfHeldtomaturityInvestments`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the held-to-maturity investments category. [Refer: Held-to-maturity investments; Financial assets]

**Reclassification out of loans and receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassificationOutOfLoansAndReceivables`
- Description: The amount of financial assets reclassified out of the loans and receivables category. [Refer: Loans and receivables; Financial assets]

**Reclassified items [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassifiedItemsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Reclassified items [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReclassifiedItemsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Reclassified items [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReclassifiedItemsMember`
- Description: This member stands for items that have been reclassified when the entity changes their presentation or classification in its financial statements. It also represents the standard value for the 'Reclassified items' axis if no other member is used.

**Reclassified items [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReclassifiedItemsMember`
- Description: This member stands for items that have been reclassified when the entity changes their presentation or classification in its financial statements. It also represents the standard value for the 'Reclassified items' axis if no other member is used.

**Recognised assets representing continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RecognisedAssetsRepresentingContinuingInvolvementInDerecognisedFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of assets recognised in the statement of financial position representing the entity's continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets.

**Recognised finance lease as assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RecognisedFinanceLeaseAsAssets`
- Description: The amount of assets recognised by the entity, which are leased under finance leases.

**Recognised liabilities representing continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RecognisedLiabilitiesRepresentingContinuingInvolvementInDerecognisedFinancialAssets`
- Description: The amount of liabilities recognised in the statement of financial position representing the entity's continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets.

**Recoverable amount of asset or cash-generating unit**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RecoverableAmountOfAssetOrCashgeneratingUnit`
- Description: The higher of an asset’s (or cash-generating unit’s) fair value less costs of disposal and its value in use. [Refer: Cash-generating units [member]]

**Recurring fair value measurement [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RecurringFairValueMeasurementMember`
- Description: This member stands for fair value measurements which other IFRSs require or permit in the statement of financial position at the end of each reporting period. [Refer: IFRSs [member]]

**Redeemable preference shares [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RedeemablePreferenceSharesMember`
- Description: Redeemable preference shares are redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Redesignated [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignatedMember`
- Description: This member stands for financial instruments redesignated during the transition to IFRSs. It also represents the standard value for the 'Redesignation' axis if no other member is used.

**Redesignated amount [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignatedAmountMember`
- Description: This member stands for the amount that has been redesignated during the transition to IFRSs.

**Redesignated financial asset as at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignatedFinancialAssetAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of financial assets redesignated to be measured at fair value through profit or loss on transition to IFRSs. [Refer: At fair value [member]; IFRSs [member]; Financial assets]

**Redesignated financial asset as available-for-sale**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignatedFinancialAssetAsAvailableforsale`
- Description: The amount of financial assets redesignated as available-for-sale on transition to IFRSs. [Refer: IFRSs [member]; Financial assets]

**Redesignated financial liability as at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignatedFinancialLiabilityAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of financial liabilities redesignated as at fair value through profit or loss on transition to IFRSs. [Refer: At fair value [member]; IFRSs [member]; Financial liabilities]

**Redesignation [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RedesignationAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Reduction of issued capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReductionOfIssuedCapital`
- Description: The decrease in equity resulting from a reduction in issued capital. [Refer: Issued capital]

**Reference number**
- Element: `ssmt_ReferenceNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to reference number for the shareholder or member.

**Reference number for the first rejected application**
- Element: `ssmt_ReferenceNumberForFirstRejectedApplication`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the reference number of first rejected exemption application.

**Refunds provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RefundsProvision`
- Description: The amount of provision for refunds to be made by the entity to its customers. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Refunds provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RefundsProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for refunds to be made by the entity to its customers. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Refunds provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RefundsProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for refunds to be made by the entity to its customers. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Registered number**
- Element: `ssmt_RegisteredNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the registered number of indebtedness.

**Regulatory deferral account balances [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Regulatory deferral account balances [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesMember`
- Description: This member stands for regulatory deferral account balances. A regulatory deferral account balance is the balance of any expense (or income) account that would not be recognised as an asset or a liability in accordance with other Standards, but that qualifies for deferral because it is included, or is expected to be included, by the rate regulator in establishing the rate(s) that can be charged to customers. This member also represents the standard value for the 'Regulatory deferral account balances' axis if no other member is used.

**Regulatory deferral account balances classified as disposal groups [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesClassifiedAsDisposalGroupsMember`
- Description: This member stands for regulatory deferral account balances that are classified as disposal groups. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Regulatory deferral account balances not classified as disposal groups [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesNotClassifiedAsDisposalGroupsMember`
- Description: This member stands for regulatory deferral account balances that are not classified as disposal groups. [Refer: Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]; Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Regulatory deferral account credit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalances`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account credit balances. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Regulatory deferral account credit balances and related deferred tax liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalancesAndRelatedDeferredTaxLiability`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account credit balances and the related deferred tax liability. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances; Deferred tax liability associated with regulatory deferral account balances]

**Regulatory deferral account credit balances directly related to disposal group**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalancesDirectlyRelatedToDisposalGroup`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account credit balances that are directly related to a disposal group. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account debit balances. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Regulatory deferral account debit balances and related deferred tax asset**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalancesAndRelatedDeferredTaxAsset`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account debit balances and the related deferred tax asset. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances; Deferred tax asset associated with regulatory deferral account balances]

**Regulatory deferral account debit balances directly related to disposal group**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalancesDirectlyRelatedToDisposalGroup`
- Description: The amount of regulatory deferral account debit balances that are directly related to a disposal group. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances; Disposal groups classified as held for sale [member]]

**Regulatory environments [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryEnvironmentsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Regulatory environments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RegulatoryEnvironmentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all regulatory environments. It also represents the standard value for the 'Regulatory environments' axis if no other member is used.

**Reimbursement rights related to defined benefit obligation, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReimbursementRightsAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of the entity's rights to the reimbursement by another party of some or all of the expenditure required to settle a defined benefit obligation recognised as a separate asset and measured at fair value. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Reimbursement rights, at fair value**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReimbursementRightsAtFairValue`
- Description: The amount of the entity's rights to the reimbursement by another party of some or all of the expenditure required to settle a defined benefit obligation recognised as a separate asset and measured at fair value. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Reinsurance assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReinsuranceAssets`
- Description: The amount of a cedant’s net contractual rights under a reinsurance contract.

**Reinsurance contracts held [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReinsuranceContractsHeldMember`
- Description: This member stands for reinsurance contracts held. Reinsurance contracts are insurance contracts issued by one entity (the reinsurer) to compensate another entity for claims arising from one or more insurance contracts issued by that other entity (underlying contracts). [Refer: Insurance contracts [member]]

**Reinsurance contracts held that are assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReinsuranceContractsHeldThatAreAssets`
- Description: The amount of reinsurance contracts held that are assets. [Refer: Assets; Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reinsurance contracts held that are liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReinsuranceContractsHeldThatAreLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of reinsurance contracts held that are liabilities. [Refer: Liabilities; Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reinsurer's share of amount arising from insurance contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReinsurersShareOfAmountArisingFromInsuranceContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for the reinsurer's share of the amount arising from insurance contracts. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Related parties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RelatedPartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for related parties. Related parties are persons or entities that are related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (the reporting entity). (a) A person or a close member of that person’s family is related to a reporting entity if that person: (i) has control or joint control over the reporting entity; (ii) has significant influence over the reporting entity; or (iii) is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity or of a parent of the reporting entity. (b) An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the following conditions applies: (i) The entity and the reporting entity are members of the same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary and fellow subsidiary is related to the others). (ii) One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of a group of which the other entity is a member). (iii) Both entities are joint ventures of the same third party. (iv) One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the other entity is an associate of the third entity. (v) The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or an entity related to the reporting entity. If the reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring employers are also related to the reporting entity. (vi) The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a person identified in (a). (vii) A person identified in (a)(i) has significant influence over the entity or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or of a parent of the entity). (viii) The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to the parent of the reporting entity. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]; Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Related parties [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RelatedPartiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for related parties. Related parties are persons or entities that are related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (the reporting entity). (a) A person or a close member of that person's family is related to a reporting entity if that person: (i) has control or joint control over the reporting entity, (ii) has significant influence over the reporting entity, or (iii) is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity or of a parent of the reporting entity. (b) An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the following conditions applies: (i) The entity and the reporting entity are members of the same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary and fellow subsidiary is related to the others). (ii) One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of a group of which the other entity is a member). (iii) Both entities are joint ventures of the same third party. (iv) One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the other entity is an associate of the third entity. (v) The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or an entity related to the reporting entity. If the reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring employers are also related to the reporting entity. (vi) The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a person identified in (a). (vii) The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to the parent of the reporting entity. (viii) A person identified in (a)(i) has significant influence over the entity or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or of a parent of the entity). [Refer: Investments in joint ventures; Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Related party transactions, contribution to fund**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsContributionToFund`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the contribution to related party fund.

**Related party transactions, disposal of subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsDisposalOfSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the disposal of subsidiaries. Subsidiary is an entity that is controlled by another entity.

**Related party transactions, education and staff training services**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsEducationAndStaffTrainingServices`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for provision of education and staff training services to related parties.

**Related party transactions, issue of shares for exchangeable bonds**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsIssueOfSharesForExchangeableBonds`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for issue of shares for exchangeable bonds.

**Related party transactions, key management personnel services**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsKeyManagementPersonnelServiceFees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel personnel services fee.  Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

**Related party transactions, leasing and hire purchase facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsLeasingAndHirePurchaseFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for provision of leasing and hire purchase facilities to related parties.

**Related party transactions, management fees**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsManagementFees`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of management fees paid to related parties.

**Related party transactions, other key management personnel**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsOtherKeyManagementPersonnel`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other related party transactions with key management personnel not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Related party transactions, rental income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsRentalIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from rental income. Rental income includes  any sum received from the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Related party transactions, royalty expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsRoyaltyExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of royalty expenses paid to related parties, which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

**Related party transactions, royalty income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsRoyaltyIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of royalty revenue from related parties which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

**Related party transactions, share option recharged**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsShareOptionRecharged`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for share options recharged.

**Related party transactions, share-based payments transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsShareBasedPaymentTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for share-based payment transactions with related parties. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entity a. receives goods or services from the supplier of those goods or services (including an employee) in a share-based payment arrangement, or b. incurs an obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier in a share-based payment arrangement when another group entity receives those goods or services.

**Related party transactions, supplementary payments and signature bonus**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsSupplementaryPaymentsAndSignatureBonus`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for supplemental payments and signature bonus to related parties.

**Related party transactions, transactions with shareholders and governments**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RelatedPartyTransactionsTransactionsWithShareholdersAndGovernments`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, for transactions with shareholders and governments.

**Remaining amortisation period of intangible assets material to entity**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RemainingAmortisationPeriodOfIntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntity2019`
- Description: The remaining amortisation period of individual intangible assets that are material to the entity’s financial statements. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Remaining amortisation period of intangible assets material to entity**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RemainingAmortisationPeriodOfIntangibleAssetsMaterialToEntity`
- Description: The remaining amortisation period of individual intangible assets that are material to the entity’s financial statements. [Refer: Depreciation and amortisation expense]

**Remaining contractual undiscounted cash outflows (inflows) that arise from contracts within scope of IFRS 17 that are liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RemainingContractualUndiscountedCashOutflowsInflowsThatAriseFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17ThatAreLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of the remaining contractual undiscounted cash outflows (inflows) that arise from contracts within the scope of IFRS 17 that are liabilities.

**Remaining other shareholders [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_RemainingOtherShareholdersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to remaining other shareholder.

**Remaining recovery period of regulatory deferral account debit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RemainingRecoveryPeriodOfRegulatoryDeferralAccountDebitBalances2019`
- Description: The remaining recovery period of regulatory deferral account debit balances. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account debit balances]

**Remaining reversal period of regulatory deferral account credit balances**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RemainingReversalPeriodOfRegulatoryDeferralAccountCreditBalances2019`
- Description: The remaining reversal period of regulatory deferral account credit balances. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account credit balances]

**Remaining unamortised gains (losses) arising on buying reinsurance**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RemainingUnamortisedGainsAndLossesArisingOnBuyingReinsurance`
- Description: The amount of unamortised deferred gains (losses) arising from the purchase of reinsurance.

**Rent deferred income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentDeferredIncome`
- Description: The amount of deferred income arising on rental activity. [Refer: Deferred income other than contract liabilities]

**Rent deferred income classified as current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentDeferredIncomeClassifiedAsCurrent`
- Description: The amount of rent deferred income classified as current. [Refer: Rent deferred income]

**Rent deferred income classified as non-current**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentDeferredIncomeClassifiedAsNoncurrent`
- Description: The amount of rent deferred income classified as non-current. [Refer: Rent deferred income]

**Rent, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentMeasurementInputMember`
- Description: This member stands for the rent used as a measurement input.

**Rental expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RentalExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the rental expenses during the period. Rental expenses  include any sum paid for the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Rental expenses related party transactions**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RentalExpensesRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the rental expenses during the period. Rental expenses  include any sum paid for the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Rental income**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RentalIncome`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from rental income. Rental income includes  any sum received from the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

**Rental income from investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentalIncomeFromInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of rental income arising from investment property recognised in profit or loss. [Refer: Investment property]

**Rental income from investment property, net of direct operating expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RentalIncomeFromInvestmentPropertyNetOfDirectOperatingExpense`
- Description: The amount of rental income arising from investment property, net of direct operating expense from such property. [Refer: Direct operating expense from investment property; Rental income from investment property]

**Repairs and maintenance expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepairsAndMaintenanceExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of repairs and maintenance expense.

**Repayment of loan from associate**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RepaymentOfLoanFromAssociate`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the repayment of loan from associate which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.An associate is an entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, over which the investor has significant influence and that is neither a subsidiary nor an interest in a joint venture.

**Repayments of bonds, notes and debentures**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepaymentsOfBondsNotesAndDebentures`
- Description: The cash outflow for repayments of bonds, notes and debentures.

**Repayments of borrowings, classified as financing activities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RepaymentsOfBorrowingsClassifiedAsFinancingActivities`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the repayments of amounts borrowed which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Repayments of current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepaymentsOfCurrentBorrowings`
- Description: The cash outflow for repayments of current borrowings. [Refer: Current borrowings]

**Repayments of non-current borrowings**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepaymentsOfNoncurrentBorrowings`
- Description: The cash outflow for repayments of non-current borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Repayments of subordinated liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepaymentsOfSubordinatedLiabilities`
- Description: The cash outflow for repayments of subordinated liabilities. [Refer: Subordinated liabilities]

**Reportable segments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReportableSegmentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for operating segments for which IFRS 8 requires information to be disclosed. The entity shall report separately information about an operating segment that meets any of the following quantitative thresholds: (a) reported revenue, including both sales to external customers and intersegment sales or transfers, is 10 per cent or more of the combined revenue, internal and external, of all operating segments; (b) the absolute amount of its reported profit or loss is 10 per cent or more of the greater, in absolute amount, of (i) the combined reported profit of all operating segments that did not report a loss and (ii) the combined reported loss of all operating segments that reported a loss; or (c) assets are 10 per cent or more of the combined assets of all operating segments. Additionally operating segments that do not meet any of the quantitative thresholds may be considered reportable, and separately disclosed, if management believes that information about the segment would be useful to users of the financial statements. [Refer: Operating segments [member]]

**Reported if in compliance with requirement of IFRS [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReportedIfInComplianceWithRequirementOfIFRSMember`
- Description: This member stands for the information that would have been reported in the financial statements by the entity if it was in compliance with the requirement of an IFRS, in the case that the entity departed from that requirement.

**Reporting year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReportingYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for the reporting year.

**Repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RepurchaseAgreementsAndCashCollateralOnSecuritiesLent`
- Description: The amount of instruments sold with the intent to reacquire in repurchase agreements and cash collateral on securities lent.

**Repurchase of treasury shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RepurchaseOfTreasuryShares`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the repurchase of treasury share which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

**Research and development expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of research which is the original and planned investigation undertaken with the prospect of gaining new scientific or technical knowledge and understanding that has not been capitalised as part of the cost of another asset and development which is the application of research findings or other knowledge to a plan or design for the production of new or substantially improved materials, devices, products, processes, systems or services before the start of commercial production or use.

**Research and development expenses, nature**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ResearchAndDevelopmentExpensesNature`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of research and development expenses, by nature of expenses.

**Reserve attributable to disposal group classified as held for sale**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ReversalAttributableToDisposalGroupClassifiedAsHeldForSale`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to reversal attributable to disposal group classified as held for sale during the reporting period.

**Reserve attributable to disposal group classified as held for sale**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_ReversalAttributableToDisposalGroupClassifiedAsHeldForSale`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reserve attributable to disposal group classified as held for sale. Disposal group is a group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

**Reserve for catastrophe**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveForCatastrophe`
- Description: A component of equity representing resources to provide for infrequent but severe catastrophic losses caused by events such as damage to nuclear installations or satellites, or earthquake damage.

**Reserve for catastrophe [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveForCatastropheMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing resources to provide for infrequent but severe catastrophic losses caused by events such as damage to nuclear installations or satellites or earthquake damage.

**Reserve for equalisation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveForEqualisation`
- Description: A component of equity representing resources to cover random fluctuations of claim expenses around the expected value of claims for some types of insurance contract.

**Reserve for equalisation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveForEqualisationMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing resources to cover random fluctuations of claim expenses around the expected value of claims for some types of insurance contract (for example, hail, credit, guarantee and fidelity insurance) using a formula based on experience over a number of years.

**Reserve of cash flow hedges**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReserveOfCashFlowHedges`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated portion of gain (loss) on a hedging instrument that is determined to be an effective hedge for cash flow hedges.

**Reserve of cash flow hedges [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfCashFlowHedgesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated portion of gain (loss) on a hedging instrument that is determined to be an effective hedge for cash flow hedges. [Refer: Cash flow hedges [member]]

**Reserve of cash flow hedges [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReserveOfCashFlowHedgesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated portion of gain (loss) on a hedging instrument that is determined to be an effective hedge for cash flow hedges.

**Reserve of cash flow hedges, continuing hedges**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfCashFlowHedgesContinuingHedges`
- Description: A component of equity representing the reserve of cash flow hedges in relation to continuing hedges. [Refer: Reserve of cash flow hedges]

**Reserve of cash flow hedges, hedging relationships for which hedge accounting is no longer applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfCashFlowHedgesHedgingRelationshipsForWhichHedgeAccountingIsNoLongerApplied`
- Description: A component of equity representing the reserve of cash flow hedges in relation to hedging relationships for which hedge accounting is no longer applied. [Refer: Reserve of cash flow hedges]

**Reserve of change in fair value of financial liability attributable to change in credit risk of liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInFairValueOfFinancialLiabilityAttributableToChangeInCreditRiskOfLiability`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated change in fair value of financial liabilities attributable to change in the credit risk of the liabilities. [Refer: Credit risk [member]; Financial liabilities]

**Reserve of change in fair value of financial liability attributable to change in credit risk of liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInFairValueOfFinancialLiabilityAttributableToChangeInCreditRiskOfLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated change in fair value of financial liabilities attributable to change in the credit risk of the liabilities. [Refer: Credit risk [member]; Financial liabilities]

**Reserve of change in value of foreign currency basis spreads**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfForeignCurrencyBasisSpreads`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of foreign currency basis spreads of financial instruments when excluding them from the designation of these financial instruments as hedging instruments.

**Reserve of change in value of foreign currency basis spreads [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfForeignCurrencyBasisSpreadsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of foreign currency basis spreads of financial instruments when excluding them from the designation of these financial instruments as hedging instruments.

**Reserve of change in value of forward elements of forward contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfForwardElementsOfForwardContracts`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of the forward elements of forward contracts when separating the forward element and spot element of a forward contract and designating as the hedging instrument only the changes in the spot element.

**Reserve of change in value of forward elements of forward contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfForwardElementsOfForwardContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of the forward elements of forward contracts when separating the forward element and spot element of a forward contract and designating as the hedging instrument only the changes in the spot element.

**Reserve of change in value of time value of options**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfTimeValueOfOptions`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of the time value of options when separating the intrinsic value and time value of an option contract and designating as the hedging instrument only the changes in the intrinsic value.

**Reserve of change in value of time value of options [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfChangeInValueOfTimeValueOfOptionsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated change in the value of the time value of options when separating the intrinsic value and time value of an option contract and designating as the hedging instrument only the changes in the intrinsic value.

**Reserve of discretionary participation features**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfDiscretionaryParticipationFeatures`
- Description: A component of equity resulting from discretionary participation features. Discretionary participation features are contractual rights to receive, as a supplement to guaranteed benefits, additional benefits: (a) that are likely to be a significant portion of the total contractual benefits; (b) whose amount or timing is contractually at the discretion of the issuer; and (c) that are contractually based on: (i) the performance of a specified pool of contracts or a specified type of contract; (ii) realised and/or unrealised investment returns on a specified pool of assets held by the issuer; or (iii) the profit or loss of the company, fund or other entity that issues the contract.

**Reserve of discretionary participation features [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfDiscretionaryParticipationFeaturesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity resulting from discretionary participation features. Discretionary participation features are contractual rights to receive, as a supplement to guaranteed benefits, additional benefits: (a) that are likely to be a significant portion of the total contractual benefits; (b) whose amount or timing is contractually at the discretion of the issuer; and (c) that are contractually based on: (i) the performance of a specified pool of contracts or a specified type of contract; (ii) realised and/or unrealised investment returns on a specified pool of assets held by the issuer; or (iii) the profit or loss of the company, fund or other entity that issues the contract.

**Reserve of equity component of convertible instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfEquityComponentOfConvertibleInstruments`
- Description: A component of equity representing components of convertible instruments classified as equity.

**Reserve of equity component of convertible instruments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfEquityComponentOfConvertibleInstrumentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing components of convertible instruments classified as equity.

**Reserve of exchange differences on translation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReserveOfExchangeDifferencesOnTranslation`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of exchange differences arising during the period and classified in a separate component of equity at the end of the period.

**Reserve of exchange differences on translation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfExchangeDifferencesOnTranslationMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing accumulated exchange differences on the translation of financial statements recognised in other comprehensive income. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reserve of exchange differences on translation [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReserveOfExchangeDifferencesOnTranslationMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing accumulated exchange differences on the translation of financial statements of foreign operations recognised in other comprehensive income. [Refer: Other comprehensive income]

**Reserve of exchange differences on translation, continuing hedges**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfExchangeDifferencesOnTranslationContinuingHedges`
- Description: A component of equity representing the reserve of exchange differences on translation in relation to continuing hedges. [Refer: Reserve of exchange differences on translation]

**Reserve of exchange differences on translation, hedging relationships for which hedge accounting is no longer applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfExchangeDifferencesOnTranslationHedgingRelationshipsForWhichHedgeAccountingIsNoLongerApplied`
- Description: A component of equity representing the reserve of exchange differences on translation in relation to hedging relationships for which hedge accounting is no longer applied. [Refer: Reserve of exchange differences on translation]

**Reserve of finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfFinanceIncomeExpensesFromReinsuranceContractsHeldExcludedFromProfitOrLoss`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reserve of finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfFinanceIncomeExpensesFromReinsuranceContractsHeldExcludedFromProfitOrLossMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated finance income (expenses) from reinsurance contracts held excluded from profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Reinsurance contracts held [member]]

**Reserve of gains and losses from investments in equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesFromInvestmentsInEquityInstruments`
- Description: A component of equity representing accumulated gains and losses from investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income.

**Reserve of gains and losses from investments in equity instruments [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesFromInvestmentsInEquityInstrumentsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing accumulated gains and losses from investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income.

**Reserve of gains and losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncome`
- Description: A component of equity representing the reserve of gains and losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income; Other comprehensive income]

**Reserve of gains and losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated gains and losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income. [Refer: Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income; Other comprehensive income]

**Reserve of gains and losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income related to insurance contracts to which paragraphs C18(b), C19(b), C24(b) and C24(c) of IFRS 17 have been applied**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnFinancialAssetsMeasuredAtFairValueThroughOtherComprehensiveIncomeRelatedToInsuranceContractsToWhichParagraphsC18bC19bC24bAndC24cOfIFRS17HaveBeenApplied`
- Description: The cumulative amount included in other comprehensive income for financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income related to insurance contracts to which paragraphs C18(b), C19(b), C24(b) and C24(c) of IFRS 17 have been applied. [Refer: Financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income]

**Reserve of gains and losses on hedging instruments that hedge investments in equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnHedgingInstrumentsThatHedgeInvestmentsInEquityInstruments`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated gains and losses on hedging instruments that hedge investments in equity instruments that the entity has designated at fair value through other comprehensive income.

**Reserve of gains and losses on remeasuring available-for-sale financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnRemeasuringAvailableforsaleFinancialAssets`
- Description: A component of equity representing accumulated gains and losses on remeasuring available-for-sale financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Reserve of gains and losses on remeasuring available-for-sale financial assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfGainsAndLossesOnRemeasuringAvailableforsaleFinancialAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing accumulated gains and losses on remeasuring available-for-sale financial assets. [Refer: Financial assets available-for-sale]

**Reserve of insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will be reclassified to profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossThatWillBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLoss`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will be reclassified subsequently to profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reserve of insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will be reclassified to profit or loss [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossThatWillBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLossMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will be reclassified subsequently to profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reserve of insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will not be reclassified to profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossThatWillNotBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLoss`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will not be reclassified subsequently to profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reserve of insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will not be reclassified to profit or loss [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfInsuranceFinanceIncomeExpensesFromInsuranceContractsIssuedExcludedFromProfitOrLossThatWillNotBeReclassifiedToProfitOrLossMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated insurance finance income (expenses) from insurance contracts issued excluded from profit or loss that will not be reclassified subsequently to profit or loss. [Refer: Insurance finance income (expenses); Insurance contracts issued [member]]

**Reserve of non-current assets classified as held for sale**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ReserveOfNoncurrentAssetsClassifiedAsHeldForSale`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of reserves of non-current assets classified as held for sale.

**Reserve of overlay approach**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfOverlayApproach`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated overlay approach adjustments.

**Reserve of overlay approach [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfOverlayApproachMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the accumulated overlay approach adjustments.

**Reserve of remeasurements of defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfRemeasurementsOfDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: A component of equity representing the accumulated remeasurements of defined benefit plans. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Reserve of remeasurements of defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReserveOfRemeasurementsOfDefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity resulting from remeasurements of defined benefit plans. [Refer: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans]

**Reserves**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_OtherReserves`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

**Reserves [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ReservesMember`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of reserves.

**Reserves within equity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReservesWithinEquityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Reserves within equity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ReservesWithinEquityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Residual value risk [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ResidualValueRiskMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of other price risk that represents the type of risk that the fair value or future cash flows of a financial instrument will fluctuate because of changes in residual values. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Restricted cash and cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RestrictedCashAndCashEquivalents`
- Description: The amount of cash and cash equivalents whose use or withdrawal is restricted. [Refer: Cash and cash equivalents]

**Restrictions on realisability of investment property at fair value through profit or loss or remittance of income and proceeds of disposal of investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RestrictionsOnRealisabilityOfInvestmentPropertyOrRemittanceOfIncomeAndProceedsOfDisposalOfInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of restrictions on the realisability of investment property at fair value through profit or loss or the remittance of income and proceeds of disposal. [Refer: Investment property at fair value through profit or loss]

**Restrictions on realisability of investment property or remittance of income and proceeds of disposal of investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RestrictionsOnRealisabilityOfInvestmentPropertyOrRemittanceOfIncomeAndProceedsOfDisposalOfInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount of restrictions on the realisability of investment property or the remittance of income and proceeds of disposal. [Refer: Investment property]

**Restructuring contingent liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RestructuringContingentLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a contingent liability for restructuring, such as the sale or termination of a line of business; closure of business locations in a country or region or relocation of activities from one country or region to another; changes in management structure; and fundamental reorganisations that have a material effect on the nature and focus of the entity's operations. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Restructuring contingent liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RestructuringContingentLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a contingent liability for restructuring, such as the sale or termination of a line of business; closure of business locations in a country or region or relocation of activities from one country or region to another; changes in management structure; and fundamental reorganisations that have a material effect on the nature and focus of the entity's operations. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Restructuring provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RestructuringProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of a programme that is planned and controlled by management and materially changes either the scope of a business undertaken by an entity or the manner in which that business is conducted.

**Restructuring provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RestructuringProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for restructuring, such as the sale or termination of a line of business; closure of business locations in a country or region or relocation of activities from one country or region to another; changes in management structure; and fundamental reorganisations that have a material effect on the nature and focus of the entity's operations. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Restructuring provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RestructuringProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for restructuring, such as the sale or termination of a line of business; closure of business locations in a country or region or relocation of activities from one country or region to another; changes in management structure; and fundamental reorganisations that have a material effect on the nature and focus of the entity's operations. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Retained earnings**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RetainedEarnings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

**Retained earnings**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetainedEarnings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the reporting entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

**Retained earnings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RetainedEarningsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the net profit available for distibution, less any distribution made.

**Retained earnings of subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetainedEarningsOfSubsidiariesAssociatesJointVenturesGross`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of retained earnings of the reporting entity, its subsidiaries, associates and joint ventures.

**Retained earnings restated**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetainedEarningsRestated`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, retained earnings considered as opening balances after taking into account the impact of changes in accounting policies in current reporting period.

**Retained earnings, excluding profit (loss) for reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarningsExcludingProfitLossForReportingPeriod`
- Description: A component of equity representing the entity’s cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit excluding the profit or loss for the reporting period. [Refer: Retained earnings]

**Retained earnings, excluding profit (loss) for reporting period [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarningsExcludingProfitLossForReportingPeriodMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing an entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit, excluding profit or loss for the reporting period. [Refer: Retained earnings [member]]

**Retained earnings, profit (loss) for reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarningsProfitLossForReportingPeriod`
- Description: A component of equity representing the entity’s undistributed profit or loss for the reporting period. [Refer: Retained earnings; Profit (loss)]

**Retained earnings, profit (loss) for reporting period [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetainedEarningsProfitLossForReportingPeriodMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the entity’s undistributed profit or loss for the reporting period. [Refer: Retained earnings [member]; Profit (loss)]

**Retention payable**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentNontradeRetentionPayable`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of payment for a service or product that is withheld pending the completion of some specified condition.

**Retention payable**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentNontradeRetentionPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of payment for a service or product that is withheld pending the completion of some specified condition.

**Retention payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetentionPayables`
- Description: The amount of payment that is withheld by the entity, pending the fulfilment of a condition.

**Retirement benefits**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetirementBenefits`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of post-employment benefit plans are formal or informal arrangements under which an entity provides post-employment benefits for one or more employees.

**Retirement benefits - defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetirementBenefitsDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the retirement benefits paid during the reporting period  as part of directors remuneration in relation to defined benefit plans. Defined benefit plans are post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

**Retirement benefits - defined contribution plans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_RetirementBenefitsDefinedContributionPlans`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the retirement benefits paid  during the reporting period as part of directors remuneration in relation to defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and has no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions or to make direct benefit payments to employees if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

**Retirements, intangible assets and goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetirementsIntangibleAssetsAndGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets and goodwill resulting from retirements. [Refer: Intangible assets and goodwill]

**Retirements, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetirementsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from retirements. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Retirements, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetirementsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The decrease in property, plant and equipment resulting from retirements. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Retrospective application and retrospective restatement [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RetrospectiveApplicationAndRetrospectiveRestatementAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Retrospective application and retrospective restatement [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RetrospectiveApplicationAndRetrospectiveRestatementAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense, before tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReturnOnPlanAssetsExcludingInterestIncomeOrExpenseBeforeTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, before tax, resulting from the return on plan assets, excluding amounts included in interest expense (income) arising from defined benefit plans. The return on plan assets is interest, dividends and other revenue derived from the plan assets, together with realised and unrealised gains or losses on the plan assets, less any costs of managing plan assets and less any tax payable by the plan itself, other than tax included in the actuarial assumptions used to measure the present value of the defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Other comprehensive income; Defined benefit plans [member]; Plan assets [member]; Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense]

**Return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense, net of tax, defined benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ReturnOnPlanAssetsExcludingInterestIncomeOrExpenseNetOfTaxDefinedBenefitPlans`
- Description: The amount of other comprehensive income, net of tax, resulting from the return on plan assets, excluding amounts included in interest expense (income) arising from defined benefit plans. The return on plan assets is interest, dividends and other revenue derived from the plan assets, together with realised and unrealised gains or losses on the plan assets, less any costs of managing plan assets and less any tax payable by the plan itself, other than tax included in the actuarial assumptions used to measure the present value of the defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Other comprehensive income; Defined benefit plans [member]; Plan assets [member]; Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on remeasurements of defined benefit plans] [Contrast: Decrease (increase) in net defined benefit liability (asset) resulting from return on plan assets excluding interest income or expense]

**Revaluation increase (decrease), intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevaluationIncreaseDecreaseIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The increase (decrease) in intangible assets other than goodwill resulting from revaluations to fair value. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill; Revaluation surplus]

**Revaluation increase (decrease), property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevaluationIncreaseDecreasePropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The increase (decrease) in property, plant and equipment resulting from revaluations to fair value. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment; Revaluation surplus]

**Revaluation increase (decrease), property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RevaluationIncreaseDecreasePropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The increase (decrease) in property, plant and equipment resulting from revaluations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment; Revaluation surplus]

**Revaluation surplus**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RevaluationSurplus`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of increase in carrying amount as a result of a revaluation,the increase shall be recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

**Revaluation surplus [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RevaluationSurplusMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the increase in asset’s carrying amount as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

**Revenue**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Revenue`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the gross inflow of economic benefits during the period arising in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity when those inflows result in increases in equity, other than increases relating to contributions from equity participants.

**Revenue and other operating income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevenueAndOperatingIncome`
- Description: The aggregate amount of the entity's revenue and other operating income. [Refer: Revenue]

**Revenue from commissions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_RevenueFromCommissions`
- Description: The amount of revenue arising from commissions. [Refer: Revenue]

**Revenue from construction contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_RevenueFromConstructionContracts`
- Description: The amount of revenue arising from construction contracts. Construction contracts are contracts specifically negotiated for the construction of an asset or a combination of assets that are closely interrelated or interdependent in terms of their design, technology and function or their ultimate purpose or use. [Refer: Revenue]
