- Description: This member stands for an agreement between the entity or another group entity or any shareholder of the group entity and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receive (a) cash or other assets of the entity for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity; or (b) equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, provided that the specified vesting conditions, if any, are met. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of share-based payment arrangements' axis if no other member is used.

**Share-based payment arrangements [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_SharebasedPaymentArrangementsMember`
- Description: This member stands for an agreement between the entity or another group entity or any shareholder of the group entity and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receive (a) cash or other assets of the entity for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity; or (b) equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, provided that the specified vesting conditions, if any, are met. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of share-based payment arrangements' axis if no other member is used.

**Shareholding [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ShareholdingMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to shareholding count.

**Shares [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_SharesMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of shares of the company.

**Ships**
- Element: `ifrs-full_Ships`
- Description: The amount of property, plant and equipment representing seafaring or other maritime vessels used in the entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Ships**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Ships`
- Description: The amount of property, plant and equipment representing seafaring or other maritime vessels used in the entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Ships [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShipsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing seafaring vessels used in the entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Ships [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShipsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing seafaring vessels used in the entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Short term leasehold land**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ShorttermLeaseholdLand`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

**Short-term borrowings [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermBorrowingsMember`
- Description: This member stands for short-term borrowings. [Refer: Borrowings]

**Short-term contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for short-term contracts with customers.

**Short-term deposits, classified as cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermDepositsClassifiedAsCashEquivalents`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of short term deposits. Deposit is the sum of money paid into a bank or building society account.

**Short-term deposits, not classified as cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermDepositsNotClassifiedAsCashEquivalents`
- Description: The amount of short-term deposits held by the entity that are not classified as cash equivalents. [Refer: Cash equivalents]

**Short-term employee benefits accruals**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermEmployeeBenefitsAccruals`
- Description: The amount of accruals for employee benefits (other than termination benefits) that are expected to be settled wholly within twelve months after the end of the annual reporting period in which the employees render the related services. [Refer: Accruals classified as current]

**Short-term employee benefits expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ShorttermEmployeeBenefitsExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense from employee benefits (other than termination benefits) that are expected to be settled wholly within twelve months after the end of the annual reporting period in which the employees render the related services.

**Short-term investments, classified as cash equivalents**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_ShorttermInvestmentsClassifiedAsCashEquivalents`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

**Short-term lease payments, payments for leases of low-value assets and variable lease payments not included in the measurement of the lease liability**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_PaymentsForLeasesOfLowValueAssetsAndVariableLeasePaymentsNotIncludedInMeasurementOfLeaseLiability`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from short-term lease payments, payments for leases of low-value assets and variable lease payments which are not included in the measurement of the lease liability.

**Significant interest rate benchmarks subject to interest rate benchmark reform [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantInterestRateBenchmarksSubjectToInterestRateBenchmarkReformMember`
- Description: This member stands for all significant interest rate benchmarks that are subject to interest rate benchmark reform.

**Significant unobservable input, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantUnobservableInputAssets`
- Description: The value of significant unobservable input used in the measurement of the fair value of assets.

**Significant unobservable input, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantUnobservableInputEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The value of significant unobservable input used in the measurement of the fair value of entity's own equity instruments.

**Significant unobservable input, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantUnobservableInputLiabilities`
- Description: The value of significant unobservable input used in the measurement of the fair value of liabilities.

**Six years before reporting year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SixYearsBeforeReportingYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a year that ended six years before the end of the reporting year.

**Sixteenth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_SixteenLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to sixteenth largest shareholder or member.

**Sixth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_SixthLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to sixth largest shareholder or member.

**Small holder relationship**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_SmallHolderRelationship`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to small holder relationship.

**Social security contributions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_SocialSecurityContributions`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of social security contributions which are recognized as an expense in the year which the service are rendered by employees and the entity.

**Spare parts**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_SpareParts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of duplicate parts to replace a lost or damaged parts of a machine.

**Specify numbers of employees offered by this share option schemes**
- Element: `ssmt_SpecifyNumbersOfEmployeesOfferedByShareOptionSchemes`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total number of employee who are entitled to receive share options under share-option scheme.

**Specify the highest amount of option shares granted**
- Element: `ssmt_SpecifyHighestAmountOfOptionSharesGranted`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the largest number of shares granted to the employee by a company under share-option scheme.

**Specify the lowest amount of option shares granted**
- Element: `ssmt_SpecifyLowestAmountOfOptionSharesGranted`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the smallest number of shares granted to the employee by a company under share-option scheme.

**SSM Practicing Certificate Number**
- Element: `ssmt_LicensedSecretaryPracticingCertificateNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to practising certificate number of the secretary.

**ssmt-1965_AddressOfAuditFirm**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_AddressOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to address of audit firm.

**ssmt-1965_Assets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Assets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, total assets held by the reporting entity.Assets are resources:a. controlled by an entity as a result of past events; andb. from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

**ssmt-1965_CurrentAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_CurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realize the asset, or intends to sell or       consume it, in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading;c. it expects to realize the asset within twelve months after       the reporting period; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in       MFRS 107) unless the asset is restricted from being       exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve       months after the reporting period.

**ssmt-1965_CurrentLiabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_CurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:   a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. it does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not affect its classification.An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

**ssmt-1965_DisclosureOnNumberOfMembersOfCompany**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_DisclosureOnNumberOfMembersOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of number of members of public company as at annual return date.

**ssmt-1965_Dividend**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Dividend`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net dividend. Dividend is the distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

**ssmt-1965_EquityAndLiabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_EquityAndLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity and liabilities held by the reporting entity.Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities. Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic resources.

**ssmt-1965_Expenditure**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Expenditure`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of expenditure which refers to the use of energy, time, or other resources.

**ssmt-1965_FormFiftySixCertificateForInclusionInPublicCompanysAnnualReturnThatDoesNotIncludeListOfMembers**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_FormFiftySixCertificateForInclusionInPublicCompanysAnnualReturnThatDoesNotIncludeListOfMembers`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to form 56 certificate for inclusion in public companys  annual return that does not include list of members as at the financial year end.

**ssmt-1965_FundAndReserve**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_FundAndReserve`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of fund and reserve held by the reporting entity.

**ssmt-1965_HeadOfficeAccounts**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_HeadOfficeAccounts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of head office accounts.Head office is the principal office of a business organization, constituting the centre for administration and policymaking.

**ssmt-1965_Income**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Income`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue which is a gross inflow of economic benefits during the period arising in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity when those inflows result in increases in equity, other than increases relating to contributions from equity participants.

**ssmt-1965_Investments**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Investments`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of:a. properties (land or a building—or part of a building—or both) held (by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease) to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or bothb. investment in entities, over which the investor has significant influence.c. joint arrangements whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.d. investment in entities controlled by another entity.e. contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity

**ssmt-1965_IssuedCapital**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_IssuedCapital`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

**ssmt-1965_Liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Liabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, total liabilities held by the reporting entity.Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic resources.

**ssmt-1965_NameOfAuditFirm**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NameOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name of audit firm.

**ssmt-1965_NetCurrentAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NetCurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of net current assets held by the reporting entity.Net current assets is the residual interest in the current assets of the entity after deducting all its current liabilities.

**ssmt-1965_NoncontrollingInterests**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity in subsidiaries not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.(Formerly referred as Minority Interest)

**ssmt-1965_NoncurrentAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realise the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading;c. it expects to realise the asset within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in MFRS       107) unless the asset is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period.An entity shall classify all other assets as non-current.

**ssmt-1965_NoncurrentAssetsAndNetCurrentAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NoncurrentAssetsAndNetCurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non current asset and net current assets held by the reporting entity.

**ssmt-1965_NoncurrentLiabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NoncurrentLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:   a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating      cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of      trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months     after the reporting period; ord. it does not have an unconditional right to defer      settlement of the liability for at least twelve months      after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that      could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its      settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not      affect its classification.An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

**ssmt-1965_NonCurrentLiabilitiesAndEquity**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_NonCurrentLiabilitiesAndEquity`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non current liabilties and equity held by the reporting entity.

**ssmt-1965_OtherAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_OtherAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**ssmt-1965_OtherNoncurrentAssets**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_OtherNoncurrentAssets`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**ssmt-1965_ProfitLossAfterTax**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_ProfitLossAfterTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profitor loss which is the total of income lessexpenses, excluding the components of othercomprehensive income.

**ssmt-1965_ProfitLossAttributableToNoncontrollingInterests**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_ProfitLossAttributableToNoncontrollingInterests`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss allocated to non-controlling interests of the subsidiary during the reporting period.

**ssmt-1965_ProfitLossBeforeTax**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_ProfitLossBeforeTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit before tax which is a profitability measure that looks at an entity's profits before the entity has to pay corporate income tax by deducting all expenses from revenue including interest expenses and operating expenses except for income tax.

**ssmt-1965_PropertyPlantAndEquipment**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_PropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of property, plant and equipment which are tangible items that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

**ssmt-1965_RegistrationNumberOfAuditFirm**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_RegistrationNumberOfAuditFirm`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to registration number of audit firm.

**ssmt-1965_RetainedEarnings**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_RetainedEarnings`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the reporting entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

**ssmt-1965_Revenue**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_Revenue`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue which is a gross inflow of economic benefits during the period arising in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity when those inflows result in increases in equity, other than increases relating to contributions from equity participants.

**ssmt-1965_SharePremiumAndReserve**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_SharePremiumAndReserve`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of share premium and reserves attributable to owners not reported elsewhere in the statement.

**ssmt-1965_TypeOfAuditorsOpinion**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_TypeOfAuditorsOpinion`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of auditor's opinion.

**ssmt-1965_UnappropriatedProfitBroughtForward**
- Element: `ssmt-1965_UnappropriatedProfitBroughtForward`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of unappropriated profit reported as closing balances during last reporting period.

**ssmt-dei-1965_ApplicationOfSubmission**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_ApplicationOfSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the application of submission on the filing.

**ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyCurrentFinancialYearEndDate**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyCurrentFinancialYearEndDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company's current financial year end date.

**ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyCurrentFinancialYearStartDate**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyCurrentFinancialYearStartDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company's current financial year start date.

**ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyPreviousFinancialYearEndDate**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyPreviousFinancialYearEndDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company's previous financial year end date.

**ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyPreviousFinancialYearStartDate**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyPreviousFinancialYearStartDate`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company's previous financial year start date.

**ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyRegistrationNumber**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CompanyRegistrationNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company registered number. Company registration number pattern should be maximum 7 digits plus 1 alphabet{[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[A-Z]} example : [5050505X]

**ssmt-dei-1965_CourtOrderReferenceNumber**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_CourtOrderReferenceNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to court order reference number

**ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfAnnualGeneralMeeting**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfAnnualGeneralMeeting`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company's annual general meeting date.

**ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfAnnualReturn**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date made up to the date of the AGM

**ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfCirculationOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsToMembers**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_DateOfCirculationOfFinancialStatementsAndReportsToMembers`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date on which the financial statements and reports are circulated to members.

**ssmt-dei-1965_DescriptionOfPresentationCurrency**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_DescriptionOfPresentationCurrency`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to description of presentation currency. Financial statements will have MYR as mandatory presentation of currency in Malaysia.

**ssmt-dei-1965_DisclosureOfFinancialStatementsPreparationForCurrentSubmission**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_DisclosureOfFinancialStatementsPreparationForCurrentSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to whether company is preparing financial statements for first time since incorporation or subsequent submission.

**ssmt-dei-1965_FinancialYear**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_FinancialYear`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the financial year.

**ssmt-dei-1965_FormerNameOfCompany**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_FormerNameOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to former company's name.

**ssmt-dei-1965_LevelOfRoundingUsedInFinancialStatements**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_LevelOfRoundingUsedInFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to level of rounding used in financial statements.

**ssmt-dei-1965_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementsOfFinancialPosition**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_MethodUsedForPreparingStatementsOfFinancialPosition`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to method used for preparing statement of financial position.

**ssmt-dei-1965_NameAndVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_NameAndVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name and version of software used to generate XBRL file.

**ssmt-dei-1965_NameOfReportingEntity**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_NameOfReportingEntity`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to current company's name.

**ssmt-dei-1965_NameVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_NameVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of name and version of software used to generate XBRL file.

**ssmt-dei-1965_NatureOfFinancialStatements**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_NatureOfFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to whether the financial statements is on company or group level.

**ssmt-dei-1965_NewCompanyRegistrationNumber**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_NewCompanyRegistrationNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to company registered number.  The new company registration number format consists of a 12 digit number, example : 201901000005

**ssmt-dei-1965_OriginOfCompany**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_OriginOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining origin of the company whether incorporated in Malaysia or incorporated outside Malaysia.

**ssmt-dei-1965_StatusOfCompany**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_StatusOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to status of company as at the financial year end.

**ssmt-dei-1965_StatutoryDeclarationForRectification**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_StatutoryDeclarationForRectification`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date of statutory declaration for rectification

**ssmt-dei-1965_TaxonomyVersion**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_TaxonomyVersion`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to taxonomy version for the submission.

**ssmt-dei-1965_TypeOfCompany**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_TypeOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of company as at the financial year end.

**ssmt-dei-1965_TypeOfSubmission**
- Element: `ssmt-dei-1965_TypeOfSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of submission for financial statements under Companies Act 1965

**ssmt-dei_NameVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_NameVersionOfSoftwareUsedToGenerateXBRLFile`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to name and version of software used to generate XBRL file.

**ssmt-ee_AnalysisOfShareholdings**
- Element: `ssmt-ee_AnalysisOfShareholdings`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to analysis of shareholdings.

**ssmt-ee_TypeOfShares**
- Element: `ssmt-ee_TypeOfShares`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to number of shares held by the members.

**ssmt-mpers_NumberOfSharesIssued**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NumberOfSharesIssued`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting date, the number of shares issued during the financial year.

**State**
- Element: `ssmt_StateInWhichImmovablePropertyIsSituatedInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the state in which immovable property is situated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**State**
- Element: `ssmt_State`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to state of the residential address in the case of an individual or in the case of a corporation the address of its registered office.

**State defined benefit plans [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StateDefinedBenefitPlansMember`
- Description: This member stands for defined benefit plans that are established by legislation to cover all entities (or all entities in a particular category) and are operated by national or local government or by another body that is not subject to control or influence by the reporting entity. [Refer: Defined benefit plans [member]]

**State statutory law binding the foreign subsidiary with regards to the financial year end**
- Element: `ssmt_StateStatutoryLawBindingForeignSubsidiaryWithRegardsToFinancialYearEnd`
- Description: Represents the information pertaining to the law that governs the foreign subsidiary where the company is registered or incorporated.

**Statement of cash flows [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfCashFlowsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of cash flows.

**Statement of changes in equity [line items]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementOfChangesInEquityLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of changes in equity [table]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementOfChangesInEquityTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to changes in equity.

**Statement of changes in equity [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfChangesInEquityExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of changes in equity.

**Statement of changes in fund**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_StatementOfChangesInFundExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of changes in equity.

**Statement of changes in fund [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_StatementOfChangesInFundTable`
- Description: Represents the information pertaining to changes in funds.

**Statement of changes in fund [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfChangesInFundTable`
- Description: Represents the information pertaining to changes in funds.

**Statement of compliance with IFRS for SMEs [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementOfIFRSCompliance`
- Description: An explicit and unreserved statement of compliance with all the requirements of IFRS for SMEs.

**Statement of comprehensive income before tax [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfComprehensiveIncomeBeforeTaxLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of comprehensive income before tax [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfComprehensiveIncomeBeforeTaxTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to comprehensive income before tax.

**Statement of comprehensive income net of tax [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfComprehensiveIncomeNetOfTaxLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of comprehensive income net of tax [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfComprehensiveIncomeNetOfTaxTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to comprehensive income net of tax.

**Statement of financial position [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfFinancialPositionExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of financial position (sometimes called the balance sheet) presents an entity’s assets, liabilities and equity as of a specific date—the end of the reporting period.

**Statement of IFRS compliance [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementOfIFRSCompliance`
- Description: An explicit and unreserved statement of compliance with all the requirements of IFRSs.

**Statement of income and expenditure [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfIncomeAndExpenditureLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of income and expenditure [table]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfIncomeAndExpenditureTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to income and expenditure.

**Statement of income and expenditure [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfIncomeAndExpenditureExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of income and expenditure.

**Statement of profit or loss [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfProfitOrLossLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement of profit or loss [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfProfitOrLossTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to profit or loss.

**Statement of profit or loss [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt_StatementOfProfitOrLossExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of profit or loss.

**Statement of retained earnings [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DisclosureOfRetainedEarningsExplanatory`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to statement of retained earnings.

**Statement of retained earnings [text block]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_DisclosureOfRetainedEarningsExplanatoryAbstract`
- Description: The disclosure of retained earnings.

**Statement on analysis of income and expenditure [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_StatementOfAnalysisOfIncomeAndExpenditureLineitems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement on analysis of income and expenditure [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOfAnalysisOfIncomeAndExpenditureLineitems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement on analysis of income and expenditure [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_StatementOnAnalysisOfIncomeAndExpenditureTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to analysis of income and expenditure.

**Statement on analysis of income and expenditure [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOnAnalysisOfIncomeAndExpenditureTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to analysis of income and expenditure.

**Statement on sub-classification of assets, liabilities and equity [line items]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOnSubclassificationOfAssetsLiabilitiesAndEquityLineItems`
- Description: Line items represent concepts included in a table. These concepts are used to disclose reportable information associated with domain members defined in one or many axes of the table.

**Statement on sub-classification of assets, liabilities and equity [table]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_StatementOnSubclassificationOfAssetsLiabilitiesAndEquityTable`
- Description: Schedule disclosing information related to sub-classification of assets, liabilities and equity.

**Statement that comparative information does not comply with IFRS 7 and IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatComparativeInformationDoesNotComplyWithIFRS7AndIFRS9`
- Description: The statement that comparative information does not comply with IFRS 7 and IFRS 9.

**Statement that entity applies paragraph 20 of IFRS 17 in determining groups of insurance contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatEntityAppliesParagraph20OfIFRS17InDeterminingGroupsOfInsuranceContracts`
- Description: The statement that the entity applies paragraph 20 of IFRS 17 in determining the groups of insurance contracts to which it applies the recognition and measurement requirements in IFRS 17. [Refer: Insurance contracts [member]]

**Statement that entity does not disclose previously unpublished information about claims development that occurred earlier than five years before end of annual reporting period in which it first applies IFRS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatEntityDoesNotDisclosePreviouslyUnpublishedInformationAboutClaimsDevelopmentThatOccurredEarlierThanFiveYearsBeforeEndOfAnnualReportingPeriodInWhichItFirstAppliesIFRS17`
- Description: The statement that the entity does not disclose previously unpublished information about claims development that occurred earlier than five years before the end of the annual reporting period in which it first applies IFRS 17.

**Statement that entity elected to use exemption that permits entity to retain accounting policies for financial instruments applied by associate or joint venture when applying equity method**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatEntityElectedToUseExemptionThatPermitsEntityToRetainAccountingPoliciesForFinancialInstrumentsAppliedByAssociateOrJointVentureWhenApplyingEquityMethod`
- Description: The statement that an entity elected to use the exemption that permits the entity to retain the accounting policies for financial instruments applied by an associate or joint venture when applying the equity method.

**Statement that entity has chosen practical expedient when assessing whether contract is, or contains, lease at date of initial application of IFRS 16**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatEntityHasChosenPracticalExpedientWhenAssessingWhetherContractIsOrContainsLeaseAtDateOfInitialApplicationOfIFRS16`
- Description: The statement that the entity has chosen the practical expedient in paragraph C3 of IFRS 16 when assessing whether a contract is, or contains, a lease at the date of initial application of IFRS 16.

**Statement that entity has investment property whose fair value cannot be measured reliably without undue cost or effort**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatEntityHasInvestmentPropertyWhoseFairValueCannotBeMeasuredReliablyWithoutUndueCostOrEffort`
- Description: The statement that the entity has investment property whose fair value cannot be measured reliably without undue cost or effort. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Statement that estimate of financial effect of contingent assets would involve undue cost or effort**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatEstimateOfFinancialEffectOfContingentAssetsWouldInvolveUndueCostOrEffort`
- Description: The statement that an estimate of the financial effect of contingent assets would involve undue cost or effort.

**Statement that fair value of assets other than cash to be distributed to owners cannot be measured reliably without undue cost or effort**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatFairValueOfAssetsOtherThanCashToBeDistributedToOwnersCannotBeMeasuredReliablyWithoutUndueCostOrEffort`
- Description: The statement that the fair value of assets other than cash to be distributed to owners cannot be measured reliably without undue cost or effort.

**Statement that insurer is applying overlay approach**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatInsurerIsApplyingOverlayApproach`
- Description: The statement that an insurer is applying the overlay approach.

**Statement that insurer is applying temporary exemption from IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatInsurerIsApplyingTemporaryExemptionFromIFRS9`
- Description: The statement that an insurer is applying the temporary exemption from IFRS 9.

**Statement that insurer no longer qualifies to apply temporary exemption from IFRS 9**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatInsurerNoLongerQualifiesToApplyTemporaryExemptionFromIFRS9`
- Description: The statement that an insurer no longer qualifies to apply the temporary exemption from IFRS 9.

**Statement that investment entity is required to apply exception from consolidation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatInvestmentEntityIsRequiredToApplyExceptionFromConsolidation`
- Description: The statement that the investment entity is required to apply an exception from consolidation. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]]

**Statement that investment entity prepares separate financial statements as its only financial statements**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatInvestmentEntityPreparesSeparateFinancialStatementsAsItsOnlyFinancialStatements`
- Description: The statement that an investment entity prepares separate financial statements as its only financial statements. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]; Separate [member]]

**Statement that lessee accounts for leases of low-value assets using recognition exemption**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatLesseeAccountsForLeasesOfLowvalueAssetsUsingRecognitionExemption`
- Description: The statement that the lessee accounts for leases of low-value assets using the recognition exemption in paragraph 6 of IFRS 16.

**Statement that lessee accounts for short-term leases using recognition exemption**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatLesseeAccountsForShorttermLeasesUsingRecognitionExemption`
- Description: The statement that the lessee accounts for short-term leases using the recognition exemption in paragraph 6 of IFRS 16. Short-term lease is a lease that, at the commencement date, has a lease term of 12 months or less. A lease that contains a purchase option is not a short-term lease.

**Statement that lessee applied practical expedient in paragraph 46A of IFRS 16 to all rent concessions occurring as direct consequence of covid-19 pandemic that meet conditions in paragraph 46B of IFRS 16**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatLesseeAppliedPracticalExpedientInParagraph46AOfIFRS16ToAllRentConcessionsOccurringAsDirectConsequenceOfCovid19PandemicThatMeetConditionsInParagraph46BOfIFRS16`
- Description: The statement that the lessee has applied the practical expedient in paragraph 46A of IFRS 16 to all the rent concessions occurring as direct consequence of covid-19 pandemic that meet the conditions in paragraph 46B of IFRS 16.

**Statement that lessee uses practical expedients when applying IFRS 16 retrospectively to leases classified as operating leases applying IAS 17**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatLesseeUsesPracticalExpedientsWhenApplyingIFRS16RetrospectivelyToLeasesClassifiedAsOperatingLeasesApplyingIAS17`
- Description: The statement that the lessee uses one or more of the specified practical expedients in paragraph C10 of IFRS 16 when applying IFRS 16 retrospectively in accordance with paragraph C5(b) to leases classified as operating leases applying IAS 17.

**Statement that practical expedient about existence of significant financing component has been used**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatPracticalExpedientAboutExistenceOfSignificantFinancingComponentHasBeenUsed`
- Description: The statement that the practical expedient about the existence of a significant financing component in a contract with a customer has been used.

**Statement that practical expedient about incremental costs of obtaining contract has been used**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatPracticalExpedientAboutIncrementalCostsOfObtainingContractHasBeenUsed`
- Description: The statement that the practical expedient about the incremental costs of obtaining a contract with a customer has been used.

**Statement that rate regulator is related party**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatRateRegulatorIsRelatedParty`
- Description: The statement that the rate regulator is a related party to the entity. [Refer: Description of identity of rate regulator(s); Related parties [member]]

**Statement that regulatory deferral account balance is no longer fully recoverable or reversible**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalanceIsNoLongerFullyRecoverableOrReversible`
- Description: The statement that a regulatory deferral account balance is no longer fully recoverable or reversible. [Refer: Regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Statement that reliable measure of fair value for financial instruments that would otherwise be measured at fair value through profit or loss is no longer available or is not available without undue cost or effort**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatReliableMeasureOfFairValueForFinancialInstrumentsThatWouldOtherwiseBeMeasuredAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLossIsNoLongerAvailableOrIsNotAvailableWithoutUndueCostOrEffort`
- Description: The statement that a reliable measure of fair value for financial instruments that would otherwise be required to be measured at fair value through profit or loss is no longer available or is not available without undue cost or effort.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1AndLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of assets during the year.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1AndLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of the entity's own equity instruments during the year.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1AndLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1 and Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of liabilities during the year.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1Level2OrLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy of assets during the year.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1Level2OrLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy of the entity's own equity instruments during the year.

**Statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatThereWereNoTransfersBetweenLevel1Level2OrLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The statement that there were no transfers between Level 1, Level 2 or Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy of liabilities during the year.

**Statement that unadjusted comparative information has been prepared on different basis**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StatementThatUnadjustedComparativeInformationHasBeenPreparedOnDifferentBasis`
- Description: The statement that unadjusted comparative information in the financial statements has been prepared on a different basis.

**Statement that undue cost or effort exemption is applied for associates**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsAppliedForAssociates`
- Description: The statement that the undue cost or effort exemption is applied for associates. [Refer: Investments in associates]

**Statement that undue cost or effort exemption is applied for jointly controlled entities**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_StatementThatUndueCostOrEffortExemptionIsAppliedForJointlyControlledEntities`
- Description: The statement that the undue cost or effort exemption is applied for jointly controlled entities. A jointly controlled entity is a joint venture that involves the establishment of a corporation, partnership or other entity in which each venturer has an interest.

**Status of carrying on business during the financial year**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_StatusOfCarryingOnBusinessDuringFinancialYear`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to status of carrying on business during the financial year.

**Status of company**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_StatusOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to status of company as at the financial year end.

**Statutory Declaration for rectification**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_StatutoryDeclarationForRectification`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the date of statutory declaration for rectification

**Street name**
- Element: `ssmt_StreetLocationOfImmovablePropertyInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the street location of immovable property sitiuated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**Structured debt, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StructuredDebtAmountContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The amount debt that has been structured to meet a particular investment objective contributes to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]]

**Structured debt, percentage contributed to fair value of plan assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_StructuredDebtPercentageContributedToFairValueOfPlanAssets`
- Description: The percentage debt that has been structured to meet a particular investment objective contributes to the fair value of defined benefit plan assets. [Refer: Plan assets, at fair value; Defined benefit plans [member]] [Contrast: Structured debt, amount contributed to fair value of plan assets]

**Sub-category of objectives of company limited by guarantee**
- Element: `ssmt_SubCategoryOfObjectivesOfCompanyLimitedByGuarantee`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to disclosure on sub-categories of object of promoting any other objects useful for the community or country.

**Subordinated liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SubordinatedLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of liabilities that are subordinate to other liabilities with respect to claims.

**Subscription circulation revenue**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SubscriptionCirculationRevenue`
- Description: The amount of circulation revenue derived from subscriptions. [Refer: Revenue; Circulation revenue]

**Subsequent recognition of deferred tax assets, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SubsequentRecognitionOfDeferredTaxAssetsGoodwill`
- Description: The decrease in goodwill resulting from the subsequent recognition of deferred tax assets during the measurement period for a business combination. [Refer: Goodwill; Deferred tax assets; Business combinations [member]]

**Subsidiaries [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SignificantInvestmentsInSubsidiariesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Subsidiaries [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_SubsidiariesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the subsidiaries. An entity, including an unincorporated entity such as a partnership, that is controlled by another entity (known as the parent).

**Subsidiaries with material non-controlling interests [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SubsidiariesWithMaterialNoncontrollingInterestsMember`
- Description: This member stands for subsidiaries that have non-controlling interests that are material to the reporting entity. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]; Non-controlling interests]

**Summary quantitative data about entity's exposure to risk [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SummaryQuantitativeDataAboutEntitysExposureToRisk`
- Description: The disclosure of summary quantitative data about the entity's exposure to risks arising from financial instruments. This disclosure shall be based on the information provided internally to key management personnel of the entity, for example, the entity’s board of directors or chief executive officer. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]; Key management personnel of entity or parent [member]]

**Summary quantitative data about puttable financial instruments classified as equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SummaryQuantitativeDataAboutPuttableFinancialInstrumentsClassifiedAsEquityInstruments`
- Description: Summary quantitative data about puttable financial instruments classified as equity instruments. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Summary quantitative data about what entity manages as capital**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SummaryOfQuantitativeDataAboutWhatEntityManagesAsCapital`
- Description: Summary quantitative data about what the entity manages as capital.

**Summary quantitative information about exposure to risk that arises from contracts within scope of IFRS 17 [text block]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SummaryQuantitativeInformationAboutExposureToRiskThatArisesFromContractsWithinScopeOfIFRS17Explanatory`
- Description: The disclosure of summary quantitative information about an entity's exposure to risk that arises from contracts within the scope of IFRS 17.

**Sundry receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_OtherCurrentNontradeSundryReceivables`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current non-trade sundry receivable.

**Sundry receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_OtherCurrentNontradeSundryReceivables`
- Description: Represents the amount of other current non-trade sundry receivable.

**Support provided to structured entity without having contractual obligation to do so**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SupportProvidedToStructuredEntityWithoutHavingContractualObligationToDoSo`
- Description: The amount of financial or other support (for example, purchasing assets of, or instruments issued by, the structured entity) provided to a structured entity without having a contractual obligation to do so, including assistance in obtaining financial support. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]; Unconsolidated structured entities [member]]

**Support provided to subsidiary by investment entity or its subsidiaries without having contractual obligation to do so**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SupportProvidedToSubsidiaryWithoutHavingContractualObligationToDoSo`
- Description: The amount of support provided to a subsidiary by the investment entity or its subsidiaries without having a contractual obligation to do so. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Surplus (deficit) after tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_SurplusDeficitAfterTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of surplus or deficit which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

**Surplus (deficit) after tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_SurplusDeficitAfterTax`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of surplus (deficit) after tax during the reporting date.

**Surplus (deficit) before tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_SurplusDeficitBeforeTax`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of surplus before tax which is a profitability measure that looks at an entity's surplus before the entity has to pay corporate income tax by deducting all expenses from income including interest expenses and operating expenses except for income tax.

**Surplus (deficit) before tax**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_SurplusDeficitBeforeTax`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of surplus (deficit) before tax during the reporting date.

**Surplus (deficit) in plan**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SurplusDeficitInPlan`
- Description: The fair value of any plan assets, less the present value of the defined benefit obligation. [Refer: Plan assets [member]]

**Swap contract [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_SwapContractMember`
- Description: This member stands for a derivative financial instrument that involves the exchange of cash flow streams between the parties of the contract over a specified period. [Refer: Derivatives [member]]

**Tangible exploration and evaluation assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssets`
- Description: The amount of exploration and evaluation assets recognised as tangible assets in accordance with the entity's accounting policy. [Refer: Exploration and evaluation assets [member]]

**Tangible exploration and evaluation assets**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssets`
- Description: The amount of exploration and evaluation expenditures recognised as tangible assets in accordance with the entity's accounting policy. Exploration and evaluation expenditures are expenditures incurred by an entity in connection with the exploration for, and evaluation of, mineral resources before the technical feasibility and commercial viability of extracting a mineral resource are demonstrable.

**Tangible exploration and evaluation assets**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssets`
- Description: Represents the amount of property, plant and equipment representing tangible exploration and evaluation assets used in the entity's operations.

**Tangible exploration and evaluation assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing tangible exploration and evaluation assets. [Refer: Exploration and evaluation assets [member]]

**Tangible exploration and evaluation assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TangibleExplorationAndEvaluationAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing tangible exploration and evaluation assets. [Refer: Tangible exploration and evaluation assets]

**Tax benefit arising from previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of prior period used to reduce current tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxBenefitArisingFromPreviouslyUnrecognisedTaxLossTaxCreditOrTemporaryDifferenceOfPriorPeriodUsedToReduceCurrentTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of benefit arising from a previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of a prior period that is used to reduce current tax expense. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax losses [member]; Unused tax credits [member]]

**Tax benefit arising from previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of prior period used to reduce current tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxBenefitArisingFromPreviouslyUnrecognisedTaxLossTaxCreditOrTemporaryDifferenceOfPriorPeriodUsedToReduceCurrentTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of benefit arising from a previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of a prior period that is used to reduce current tax expense. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax losses [member]; Unused tax credits [member]]

**Tax benefit arising from previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of prior period used to reduce deferred tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxBenefitArisingFromPreviouslyUnrecognisedTaxLossTaxCreditOrTemporaryDifferenceOfPriorPeriodUsedToReduceDeferredTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of benefit arising from a previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of a prior period that is used to reduce deferred tax expense. [Refer: Deferred tax expense (income); Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax losses [member]; Unused tax credits [member]]

**Tax benefit arising from previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of prior period used to reduce deferred tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxBenefitArisingFromPreviouslyUnrecognisedTaxLossTaxCreditOrTemporaryDifferenceOfPriorPeriodUsedToReduceDeferredTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of benefit arising from a previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of a prior period that is used to reduce deferred tax expense. Deferred tax is income tax payable (recoverable) in respect of the taxable profit (tax loss) for future reporting periods as a result of past transactions or events. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax losses [member]; Unused tax credits [member]]

**Tax benefit arising from previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of prior period used to reduce tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxBenefitArisingFromPreviouslyUnrecognisedTaxLossTaxCreditOrTemporaryDifferenceOfPriorPeriodUsedToReduceTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of benefit arising from a previously unrecognised tax loss, tax credit or temporary difference of a prior period that is used to reduce tax expense. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax losses [member]; Unused tax credits [member]]

**Tax contingent liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxContingentLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a contingent liability for taxes. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Tax effect from change in tax rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectFromChangeInTaxRate`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to changes in the tax rate. [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Tax effect of expense not deductible in determining taxable profit (tax loss)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectOfExpenseNotDeductibleInDeterminingTaxableProfitTaxLoss`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to expenses not deductible in determining taxable profit (tax loss). [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Tax effect of expense not deductible in determining taxable profit (tax loss)**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxEffectOfExpenseNotDeductibleInDeterminingTaxableProfitTaxLoss`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to expenses not deductible in determining taxable profit (tax loss). Accounting profit is the profit or loss for a period before deducting tax expense.

**Tax effect of foreign tax rates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectOfForeignTaxRates`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to foreign tax rates. [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Tax effect of impairment of goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectOfImpairmentOfGoodwill`
- Description: The amount representing the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to impairment of goodwill. [Refer: Accounting profit; Goodwill]

**Tax effect of revenues exempt from taxation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectOfRevenuesExemptFromTaxation2011`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to revenues that are exempt from taxation. [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Tax effect of revenues exempt from taxation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxEffectOfRevenuesExemptFromTaxation`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to revenues that are exempt from taxation. Accounting profit is the profit or loss for a period before deducting tax expense.

**Tax effect of tax losses**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxEffectOfTaxLosses`
- Description: The amount that represents the difference between the tax expense (income) and the product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s) that relates to tax losses. [Refer: Accounting profit]

**Tax expense (income) at applicable tax rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxExpenseIncomeAtApplicableTaxRate`
- Description: The product of the accounting profit multiplied by the applicable tax rate(s). [Refer: Accounting profit; Applicable tax rate]

**Tax expense (income) relating to changes in accounting policies and errors included in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToChangesInAccountingPoliciesAndErrorsIncludedInProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of tax expense or income relating to changes in accounting policies and errors that are included in profit or loss in accordance with IAS 8, because they cannot be accounted for retrospectively.

**Tax expense (income) relating to changes in accounting policies and errors included in profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TaxExpenseIncomeRelatingToChangesInAccountingPoliciesAndErrorsIncludedInProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The amount of tax expense or income relating to changes in accounting policies and errors that are included in profit or loss in accordance with IFRS for SMEs, because they cannot be accounted for retrospectively.

**Tax expense (income) relating to gain (loss) on discontinuance**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxExpenseRelatingToGainLossOnDiscontinuance`
- Description: The tax expense (income) relating to the gain (loss) on discontinuance when operations are discontinued. [Refer: Discontinued operations [member]]

**Tax expense (income) relating to profit (loss) from ordinary activities of discontinued operations**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxExpenseRelatingToProfitLossFromOrdinaryActivitiesOfDiscontinuedOperations`
- Description: The tax expense (income) relating to the profit (loss) arising from ordinary activities of discontinued operations. [Refer: Discontinued operations [member]; Profit (loss)]

**Tax expense (income), continuing operations**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_IncomeTaxExpenseContinuingOperations`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount included in total comprehensive income or equity for the reporting period in respect of current tax and deferred tax.

**Tax expense other than income tax expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxExpenseOtherThanIncomeTaxExpense`
- Description: The amount of tax expense exclusive of income tax expense.

**Tax paid on gain on disposal from discontinuing operations**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TaxPaidOnGainOnDisposalFromDiscontinuingOperations`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of tax paid on gain on disposal of discontinued operation which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

**Tax rate effect from change in tax rate**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectFromChangeInTaxRate`
- Description: The tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from a change in tax rate. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Tax rate effect of adjustments for current tax of prior periods**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfAdjustmentsForCurrentTaxOfPriorPeriods`
- Description: Tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from adjustments for the current tax of prior periods. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate; Adjustments for current tax of prior periods]

**Tax rate effect of expense not deductible in determining taxable profit (tax loss)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfExpenseNotDeductibleInDeterminingTaxableProfitTaxLoss`
- Description: The tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from the expenses not deductible in determining taxable profit. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Tax rate effect of foreign tax rates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfForeignTaxRates`
- Description: The tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from the application of foreign tax rates. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Tax rate effect of impairment of goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfImpairmentOfGoodwill`
- Description: Tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from the impairment of goodwill. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate; Goodwill]

**Tax rate effect of revenues exempt from taxation**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfRevenuesExemptFromTaxation`
- Description: The tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from revenue that is exempt from taxation. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Tax rate effect of tax losses**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxRateEffectOfTaxLosses`
- Description: The tax rate effect on the reconciliation between the average effective tax rate and the applicable tax rate resulting from tax losses. [Refer: Average effective tax rate; Applicable tax rate]

**Taxation-related regulatory deferral account balances [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TaxationrelatedRegulatoryDeferralAccountBalancesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of regulatory deferral account balances that relates to taxation. [Refer: Classes of regulatory deferral account balances [member]]

**Taxonomy version**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_TaxonomyVersion`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the Taxonomy version

**Technology-based intangible assets [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TechnologybasedIntangibleAssetsMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing assets based on technology. Such assets may include patented and unpatented technology, databases as well as trade secrets. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Technology-based intangible assets recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TechnologybasedIntangibleAssetsRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for technology-based intangible assets acquired in a business combination. [Refer: Technology-based intangible assets [member]; Business combinations [member]]

**Telecommunication equipments**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TelecommunicationEquipments`
- Description: Represents the amount of property, plant and equipment representing telecommunication equipments used in the entity's operations.

**Telephone expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TelephoneExpenses`
- Description: Represents the amount of expenses related to telephone expenses.

**Telephone expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_TelephoneExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of telephone expenses.

**Telephone number**
- Element: `ssmt_TelephoneNumber`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the telephone number of branches places of the entity.

**Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TemporaryDifferenceUnusedTaxLossesAndUnusedTaxCreditsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TemporaryDifferenceUnusedTaxLossesAndUnusedTaxCreditsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TemporaryDifferenceUnusedTaxLossesAndUnusedTaxCreditsMember`
- Description: This member stands for temporary differences, unused tax losses and unused tax credits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax credits [member]; Unused tax losses [member]]

**Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TemporaryDifferenceUnusedTaxLossesAndUnusedTaxCreditsMember`
- Description: This member stands for temporary differences, unused tax losses and unused tax credits. It also represents the standard value for the 'Temporary difference, unused tax losses and unused tax credits' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Temporary differences [member]; Unused tax credits [member]; Unused tax losses [member]]

**Temporary differences [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TemporaryDifferenceMember`
- Description: This member stands for differences between the carrying amount of an asset or liability in the statement of financial position and its tax base. Temporary differences may be either: (a) taxable temporary differences; or (b) deductible temporary differences. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]]

**Temporary differences [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TemporaryDifferenceMember`
- Description: This member stands for differences between the carrying amount of an asset or liability in the statement of financial position and its tax base. Temporary differences may be either: (a) taxable temporary differences, or (b) deductible temporary differences. [Refer: Carrying amount [member]]

**Temporary differences associated with investments in subsidiaries, branches and associates and interests in joint arrangements for which deferred tax liabilities have not been recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TemporaryDifferencesAssociatedWithInvestmentsInSubsidiariesBranchesAndAssociatesAndInterestsInJointVentures`
- Description: The aggregate amount of temporary differences associated with investments in subsidiaries, branches and associates and interests in joint arrangements, for which deferred tax liabilities have not been recognised as a result of satisfying both of the following conditions: (a) the parent, investor, joint venturer or joint operator is able to control the timing of the reversal of the temporary difference; and (b) it is probable that the temporary difference will not reverse in the foreseeable future. [Refer: Associates [member]; Subsidiaries [member]; Temporary differences [member]; Investments in subsidiaries reported in separate financial statements]

**Tenth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_TenthLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to tenth largest shareholder or member.

**Termination benefit obligation**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TerminationBenefitObligation`
- Description: The amount of obligation in relation to termination benefits. [Refer: Termination benefits [member]]

**Termination benefits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TerminationBenefitsMember`
- Description: This member stands for employee benefits provided in exchange for the termination of an employee's employment as a result of either: (a) an entity's decision to terminate an employee's employment before the normal retirement date; or (b) an employee's decision to accept an offer of benefits in exchange for the termination of employment. It also represents the standard value for the 'Categories of termination benefits' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Employee benefits expense]

**Termination benefits expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TerminationBenefitsExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense in relation to termination benefits. Termination benefits are employee benefits provided in exchange for the termination of an employee's employment as a result of either: (a) an entity's decision to terminate an employee's employment before the normal retirement date; or (b) an employee's decision to accept an offer of benefits in exchange for the termination of employment. [Refer: Employee benefits expense]

**Termination benefits expense**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TerminationBenefitsExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of termination benefits. Termination benefits are employee benefits payable as a result of either:i.  an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment before the normal retirement date; orii. an employee’s decision to accept voluntary redundancy in exchange for those benefits.

**that category of Company Exempted from beneficial owner reporting**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatCategoryOfCompanyExemptedFromBeneficialOwnerReporting`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries Certify that category of Company Exempted from beneficial owner reporting

**that company has not since date of incorporation of company issued any invitation to public to subscribe for any shares in or debentures of company or to deposit moneys for fixed periods or payable at call**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatCompanyHasNotSinceDateOfIncorporationOfCompanyIssuedAnyInvitationToPublicToSubscribeForAnySharesOrDebenturesOrToDepositMoneysForFixedPeriodsOrPayableAtCall`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify that the company has not since date of the incorporation of the company issued any invitation to the public to subscribe for any shares in or debentures of the company or to deposit moneys for fixed periods or payable at call.

**that company has not since date of last annual return issued any invitation to public to subscribe for any shares in or debentures of company or to deposit moneys for fixed periods or payable at call**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatCompanyHasNotSinceDateOfLastAnnualReturnIssuedAnyInvitationToPublicToSubscribeForAnySharesInOrDebenturesOfCompanyOrToDepositMoneysForFixedPeriodsOrPayableAtCall`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify that the company has not since the date of the last annual return issued any invitation to the public to subscribe for any shares in or debentures of the company or to deposit moneys for fixed periods or payable at call.

**that company is a public company which has more than five hundred members and company provides reasonable opportunities and facilities for a person to inspect and take copies of its list of members and its particulars of shares transferred**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatCompanyIsPublicCompanyWhichHasMoreThanFiveHundredMembersAndReasonableOpportunitiesAndFacilitiesForPersonToInspectTakeCopiesOfItsListOfMembersItsParticularsOfSharesTransferred`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify that the company is a public company which has more than five hundred members and the company provides reasonable opportunities and facilities for a person to inspect and take copies of its list of members and its particulars of shares transferred.

**that excess of members of company above fifty (counting joint holders of shares as one person) consists only of persons who are in employment of company or of its subsidiary or persons who while previously in employment of company or of its subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatExcessOfMembersOfcompanyAboveFiftyConsistsOnlyOfPersonsWhoAreInemploymentOfCompanyOrOfItsSubsidiaryOrPersonsWhoWhilePreviouslyInemploymentOfcompanyOrOfItsSubsidiaryWereAndThereafterHaveContinuedToBeMembersOfCompany`
