- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify that the excess of members of the company above fifty (counting joint holders of shares as one person) consists only of persons who are in the employment of the company or of its subsidiary or persons who while previously in the employment of the company or of its subsidiary were and thereafter have continued to be members of the company.

**that provisions of Unclaimed Moneys Act 1965, relating to unclaimed moneys have been complied with in relation to company**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatProvisionsOfUnclaimedMoneysActHaveBeenCompliedWith`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify that the provisions of the Unclaimed Moneys Act 1965, relating to the unclaimed moneys have/ have not been complied with in relation to the company.

**that The company has the following status relating to its director**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatCompanyHasFollowingStatusRelatingToItsDirector`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries Certify that The company has the following status relating to its director

**that the status relating to the beneficial owner(s) of the company is as follows**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatStatusRelatingToBeneficialOwnersOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries Certify that the status relating to the beneficial owner(s) of the company is as follows

**there is no change in the particulars referred to under Section 68(3) of the Companies Act 2016 since the last preceding annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_CertifyThatNoChangeInParticularsSinceLastPrecedingAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the particulars of certificate by director and/ or secretary after having made due inquiries certify there is no change in the particulars referred to under Section 68(3) of the Companies Act 2016 since the last preceding annual return.

**Third largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ThirdLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to third largest shareholder or member.

**Thirteenth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_ThirteenthLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to thirteenth largest shareholder or member.

**Three years before reporting year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ThreeYearsBeforeReportingYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a year that ended three years before the end of the reporting year.

**Time-and-materials contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TimeandmaterialsContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for time-and-materials contracts with customers.

**Timing of transfer of goods or services [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TimingOfTransferOfGoodsOrServicesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Timing of transfer of goods or services [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TimingOfTransferOfGoodsOrServicesMember`
- Description: This member stands for all timings of the transfer of goods or services in contracts with customers. It also represents the standard value for the 'Timing of transfer of goods or services' axis if no other member is used.

**Title**
- Element: `ssmt_Title`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to title conferred by the Ruler (State or Federal) or title which is certified by the National Registration Department/ Prime Minister Department.

**Title of initially applied IFRS**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TitleOfInitiallyAppliedIFRS`
- Description: The title of an initially applied IFRS. [Refer: IFRSs [member]]

**Title of new IFRS**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TitleOfNewIFRS`
- Description: The title of a new IFRS that has been issued but is not yet effective.

**Top of range [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TopOfRangeMember`
- Description: This member stands for top of a range.

**Top twenty largest shareholders or members [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_TopTwentyLargestShareholdersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to top twenty largest shareholders or members.

**Total Amount of the indebtedness in MYR (Including MYR and Other currencies)**
- Element: `ssmt_AmountOfIndebtednessIncludingLocalAndOtherCurrencies`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total amount of the indebtedness in MYR

**Total fund and reserves [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_FundsAndReservesMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to funds and reserves.

**Total fund and reserves [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_FundsAndReservesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of fund/equity representing the sum of fund/equity and reserves.

**Total fund and reserves attributable to owners [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_FundsAndReservesAttributableToOwnersMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to funds and reserves attributable to owners.

**Total fund and reserves attributable to owners [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_FundsAndReservesAttributableToOwnersMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of fund/equity representing the sum of fund/equity and reserves attributable to owners.

**Total number of shares, of company with equal to or less than five hundred members**
- Element: `ssmt_NumberOfSharesHeldOfCompanyWithEqualToOrLessThanFiveHundredMembers`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total number of shares held by the members of company with equal to or less than five hundred members.

**Total number of shares, of company with more than five hundred members**
- Element: `ssmt_NumberOfSharesHeldOfCompanyWithMoreThanFiveHundredMembers`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to total number of shares held by the members of company with more than five hundred members.

**Town**
- Element: `ssmt_TownInWhichImmovablePropertyIsSituatedInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the town in which immovable property is situated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**Town**
- Element: `ssmt_Town`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to town of the residential address in the case of an individual or in the case of a corporation the address of its registered office.

**Trade and other current payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

**Trade and other current receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherCurrentReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

**Trade and other non-current payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_NoncurrentPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses

**Trade and other non-current receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_NoncurrentReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

**Trade and other payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount billed to a company by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the company in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

**Trade and other payables recognised as of acquisition date**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherPayablesRecognisedAsOfAcquisitionDate`
- Description: The amount recognised as of the acquisition date for trade and other payables assumed in a business combination. [Refer: Trade and other payables; Business combinations [member]]

**Trade and other payables, undiscounted cash flows**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeAndOtherPayablesUndiscountedCashFlows`
- Description: The amount of contractual undiscounted cash flows in relation to trade and other payables. [Refer: Trade and other payables]

**Trade and other receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of  amounts billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of nontrade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

**Trade payable due to contract suppliers**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToContractCustomers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate gross amount due to customers for contract work.

**Trade payables**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TradeAndOtherPayablesToTradeSuppliers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of trade payables.

**Trade payables due to associate companies**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount billed to the reporting entity by its associates for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade payables due to holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount billed to the reporting entity by its holding company for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade payables due to joint venture companies**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount billed to the reporting entity by its joint ventures for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade payables due to other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentTradePayablesDueToRelatedCompanies`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of trade payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Trade payables due to other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentTradePayablesDueToOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of trade payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Trade payables due to other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of trade payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Trade payables due to subsidiary companies**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradePayablesDueToSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount billed to the reporting entity by its subsidiaries for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of trade receivables.

**Trade receivables [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradeReceivablesMember`
- Description: This member stands for trade receivables. [Refer: Trade receivables]

**Trade receivables due from contract customers**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_ReceivablesFromContractsWithCustomers`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by a business to its contract customers when it delivers goods or services in the ordinary course of business (only applicable to construction contracts).

**Trade receivables due from holding company**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromHoldingCompany`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by the reporting entity to its holding company when it delivers goods or services in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables due from joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by the reporting entity  to its joint ventures when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables due from money lenders**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromMoneyLenders`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money lending receivables not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Trade receivables due from other related parties**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromOtherRelatedParties`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by the reporting entity to its other related parties when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables due from subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by the reporting entity to its subsidiaries when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables from associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesDueFromAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amounts billed by the reporting entity to its associates when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business.

**Trade receivables unearned current carrying charges**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TradeReceivablesUnearnedCurrentCarryingCharges`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of unearned current carrying charges not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Trading equity securities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingEquitySecuritiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for equity instruments that (a) are acquired or incurred principally for the purpose of selling or repurchasing it in the near term; or (b) on initial recognition are part of a portfolio of identified financial instruments that are managed together and for which there is evidence of a recent actual pattern of short-term profit-taking.

**Trading income (expense)**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingIncomeExpense`
- Description: The amount of income (expense) relating to trading assets and liabilities.

**Trading income (expense) on debt instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingIncomeExpenseOnDebtInstruments`
- Description: The amount of trading income (expense) relating to debt instruments. [Refer: Debt instruments held; Trading income (expense)]

**Trading income (expense) on derivative financial instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingIncomeExpenseOnDerivativeFinancialInstruments`
- Description: The amount of trading income (expense) relating to derivative financial instruments. [Refer: Derivatives [member]; Trading income (expense)]

**Trading income (expense) on equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingIncomeExpenseOnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of trading income (expense) relating to equity instruments. [Refer: Equity instruments held; Trading income (expense)]

**Trading income (expense) on foreign exchange contracts**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingIncomeExpenseOnForeignExchangeContracts`
- Description: The amount of trading income (expense) relating to foreign exchange contracts. [Refer: Trading income (expense)]

**Trading securities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TradingSecuritiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for financial instruments that (a) are acquired or incurred principally for the purpose of selling or repurchasing it in the near term; or (b) on initial recognition are part of a portfolio of identified financial instruments that are managed together and for which there is evidence of a recent actual pattern of short-term profit-taking. [Refer: Financial instruments, class [member]]

**Transaction price allocated to remaining performance obligations**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransactionPriceAllocatedToRemainingPerformanceObligations`
- Description: The amount of the transaction price allocated to the performance obligations that are unsatisfied (or partially unsatisfied) as of the end of the reporting period. The transaction price is the amount of consideration to which an entity expects to be entitled in exchange for transferring promised goods or services to a customer, excluding amounts collected on behalf of third parties (for example, some sales taxes). [Refer: Performance obligations [member]]

**Transactions recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransactionsRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombinationAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Transactions recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransactionsRecognisedSeparatelyFromAcquisitionOfAssetsAndAssumptionOfLiabilitiesInBusinessCombinationMember`
- Description: This member stands for transactions that are recognised separately from the acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combinations. It also represents the standard value for the 'Transactions recognised separately from acquisition of assets and assumption of liabilities in business combination' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Transactions relating to non-controlling interest**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_TransactionsRelatingToNoncontrollingInterest`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to transactions relating to non-controlling interest.

**Transactions relating to non-controlling interest**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_TransactionsRelatingToNoncontrollingInterest`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to transactions relating to non-controlling interest.

**Transfer between financial liabilities and equity attributable to change in redemption prohibition**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransferBetweenFinancialLiabilitiesAndEquityAttributableToChangeInRedemptionProhibition`
- Description: The amount transferred between financial liabilities and the equity attributable to a change in the redemption prohibition.

**Transfer from (to) inventories and owner-occupied property, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransferFromToInventoriesAndOwnerOccupiedPropertyInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount transferred from (to) inventories and owner-occupied property to (from) investment property. [Refer: Inventories; Investment property]

**Transfer from (to) inventories and owner-occupied property, investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferFromToInventoriesAndOwnerOccupiedPropertyInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount transferred from (to) inventories and owner-occupied property to (from) investment property at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Inventories; Investment property [member]]

**Transfer from investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferFromInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The increase in investment property at fair value through profit or loss relating to transfers from investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment when a reliable measure of fair value becomes available. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transfer from investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferFromInvestmentPropertyAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The increase in investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment relating to transfers from investment property at fair value through profit or loss when a reliable measure of fair value is no longer available without undue cost or effort. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transfer from investment property under construction or development, investment property**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransferFromInvestmentPropertyUnderConstructionOrDevelopmentInvestmentProperty`
- Description: The amount transferred from investment property under construction or development to completed investment property. [Refer: Investment property]

**Transfer to (from) investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferToFromInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in investment property at fair value through profit or loss relating to transfers to (from) investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transfer to (from) investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferToFromInvestmentPropertyAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The decrease (increase) in investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment relating to transfers to (from) investment property at fair value through profit or loss. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transfer to investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferToInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The decrease in investment property at fair value through profit or loss relating to transfers to investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment when a reliable measure of fair value is no longer available without undue cost or effort. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transfer to investment property at fair value through profit or loss**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransferToInvestmentPropertyAtFairValueThroughProfitOrLoss`
- Description: The decrease in investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment relating to transfers to investment property at fair value through profit or loss when a reliable measure of fair value becomes available. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_FinancialAssetsWhichDoNotQualifyForDerecognitionAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_FinancialAssetsWhichDoNotQualifyForDerecognitionAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_FinancialAssetsWhichDoNotQualifyForDerecognitionMember`
- Description: This member stands for transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety. It also represents the standard value for the 'Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Financial assets]

**Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_FinancialAssetsWhichDoNotQualifyForDerecognitionMember`
- Description: This member stands for transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety. It also represents the standard value for the 'Transferred financial assets that are not derecognised in their entirety' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Financial assets, class [member]]

**Transfers from (to) other retirement benefit plans**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersFromToOtherRetirementBenefitPlans`
- Description: The increase (decrease) in net assets available for benefits resulting from transfers from (to) other retirement benefit plans. [Refer: Assets (liabilities) of benefit plan]

**Transfers into Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersIntoLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The amount of transfers of assets into Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers into Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersIntoLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of transfers of the entity's own equity instruments into Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Entity's own equity instruments [member]; Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers into Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersIntoLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of transfers of liabilities into Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers of cumulative gain (loss) within equity when changes in liability's credit risk are presented in other comprehensive income**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOfCumulativeGainLossWithinEquity`
- Description: The amount of transfers within equity of the cumulative gain (loss) on financial liabilities designated as at fair value through profit or loss for which changes in the liability's credit risk are presented in other comprehensive income. [Refer: Financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss]

**Transfers of research and development from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOfResearchAndDevelopmentFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers of research and development from the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers of research and development from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersOfResearchAndDevelopmentFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers of research and development from the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers of research and development to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOfResearchAndDevelopmentToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers of research and development to the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers of research and development to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersOfResearchAndDevelopmentToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers of research and development to the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 1 into Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, assets held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel1IntoLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The amount of transfers out of Level 1 and into Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of assets held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 1 into Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel1IntoLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of transfers out of Level 1 and into Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of the entity's own equity instruments held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Entity's own equity instruments [member]; Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 1 into Level 2 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel1IntoLevel2OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of transfers out of Level 1 and into Level 2 of the fair value hierarchy of liabilities held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 2 into Level 1 of fair value hierarchy, assets held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel2IntoLevel1OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The amount of transfers out of Level 2 and into Level 1 of the fair value hierarchy of assets held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 2 into Level 1 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel2IntoLevel1OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of any transfers out of Level 2 and into Level 1 of the fair value hierarchy of the entity's own equity instruments held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Entity's own equity instruments [member]; Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 2 into Level 1 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities held at end of reporting period**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel2IntoLevel1OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of transfers out of Level 2 and into Level 1 of the fair value hierarchy of liabilities held at the end of the reporting period. [Refer: Level 1 of fair value hierarchy [member]; Level 2 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyAssets`
- Description: The amount of transfers of assets out of Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, entity's own equity instruments**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyEntitysOwnEquityInstruments`
- Description: The amount of transfers of the entity's own equity instruments out of Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Entity's own equity instruments [member]; Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers out of Level 3 of fair value hierarchy, liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersOutOfLevel3OfFairValueHierarchyLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of transfers of liabilities out of Level 3 of the fair value hierarchy. [Refer: Level 3 of fair value hierarchy [member]]

**Transfers under finance agreements from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersUnderFinanceAgreementsFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under finance agreements from the entity in related party transactions, including loans and equity contributions in cash or in kind. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under finance agreements from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersUnderFinanceAgreementsFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under finance agreements from the entity in related party transactions, including loans and equity contributions in cash or in kind. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under finance agreements to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersUnderFinanceAgreementsToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under finance agreements to the entity in related party transactions, including loans and equity contributions in cash or in kind. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under finance agreements to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersUnderFinanceAgreementsToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under finance agreements to the entity in related party transactions, including loans and equity contributions in cash or in kind. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under licence agreements from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersUnderLicenseAgreementsFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under licence agreements from the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under licence agreements to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransfersUnderLicenseAgreementsToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under licence agreements to the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under license agreements from entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersUnderLicenseAgreementsFromEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under licence agreements from the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transfers under license agreements to entity, related party transactions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TransfersUnderLicenseAgreementsToEntityRelatedPartyTransactions`
- Description: The amount of transfers under licence agreements to the entity in related party transactions. [Refer: Related parties [member]]

**Transportation expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TransportationExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense arising from transportation services.

**Travel expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TravelExpense`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of travelling expenses.

**Treasury shares**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TreasuryShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amounts of the equity instruments of an entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.

**Treasury shares [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TreasurySharesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing entity's own equity instruments which is held by the entity or other members of the consolidated group.

**Twelfth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_TwelfthLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to twelfth largest shareholder or member.

**Twentieth largest shareholder or member [member]**
- Element: `ssmt_TwentiethLargestShareholderMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to twentieth largest shareholder or member.

**Two years before reporting year [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TwoYearsBeforeReportingYearMember`
- Description: This member stands for a year that ended two years before the end of the reporting year.

**Type of agent**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfAgent`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to Type of agent

**Type of currency [Member]**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfCurrencyMember`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of currency of amount of shares.

**Type of director**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfDirector`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of director

**Type of director's interests in receiving benefit or fixed salary**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfDirectorsInterestsInReceivingBenefitOrFixedSalary`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of directors interest in receiving benefit or fixed salary.

**Type of directors interests in shares or debentures**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfDirectorsInterestsInSharesOrDebentures`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of directors interest in shares and debentures.

**Type of extension of time application**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfExtensionOfTimeApplication`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of extension of time application

**Type of identification**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentification`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of the entity.

**Type of identification of company secretary who signed certificate of exempt private company**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfCompanySecretaryWhoSignedCertificateOfExemptPrivateCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of company secretary who is responsible for signing the return of exempt private company.

**Type of identification of director who signed certificate of exempt private company**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfDirectorWhoSignedCertificateOfExemptPrivateCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of director who is responsible for signing the return of exempt private company.

**Type of identification of person who signed the statutory declaration**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfPersonWhoSignedStatutoryDeclaration`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of the person who signed the statutory declaration.

**Type of identification of shareholder or member**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfIdentificationOfShareholder`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of identification of shareholder or member.

**Type of immovable property count in Malaysia [axis]**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfImmovablePropertyCountMalaysiaAxis`
- Description: Represents the classification of different type of immovable property count in Malaysia.

**Type of immovable property count in Malaysia [table]**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfImmovablePropertyCountInMalaysiaTable`
- Description: Represents the type of immovable property count in Malaysia.

**Type of immovable property situated in Malaysia**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfImmovablePropertySituatedInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of immovable property in Malaysia held by foreign company.

**Type of measurement of expected credit losses [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypeOfMeasurementOfExpectedCreditLossesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Type of measurement of expected credit losses [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypeOfMeasurementOfExpectedCreditLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of measurement of expected credit losses. Expected credit losses are the weighted average of credit losses with the respective risks of a default occurring as the weights. This member also represents the standard value for the 'Type of measurement of expected credit losses' axis if no other member is used.

**Type of reason for failure of validation in XBRL filing**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfReasonForFailureOfValidationInXBRLFiling`
- Description: Represents the type of reasons for failure of validation in XBRL filing.

**Type of reasons for extension of time to lodge annual return**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfReasonsForExtensionOfTimeToLodgeAnnualReturn`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of reasons for extension of time to lodge annual return.

**Type of reasons for extension of time to lodge financial statements and reports**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfReasonsForExtensionOfTimeToLodgeFinancialStatementsAndReports`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of reasons for extension of time to lodge financial statements and reports.

**Type of reasons for financial statements and reports due to extension of circulation**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfReasonsForFinancialStatementsAndReportsDueToExtensionOfCirculation`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of reasons for extension of time to lodge financial statements and reports.

**Type of relief requested as to the components of financial statements**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfReliefRequestedAsToComponentsOfFinancialStatements`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of financial statements.

**Type of resubmission**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfExemptionApplicationResubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of resubmission of exemption application.

**Type of shareholder or member**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfShareholder`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of member whether individual, body corporate or joint holders (individual/ body corporate).

**Type of shareholder or member, sub-classification**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfShareholderSubclassification`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of shareholder whether individual, body corporate or joint holders (individual/ body corporate).

**Type of submission**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_TypeOfSubmission`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of submission for preparing financial statements.

**Type of subsidiaries count in Malaysia [axis]**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfSubsidiariesCountInMalaysiaAxis`
- Description: Represents the classification of different type of subsidiaries count in Malaysia.

**Type of subsidiaries count in Malaysia [table]**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfSubsidiariesCountInMalaysiaTable`
- Description: Represents the type of subsidiaries count in Malaysia.

**Type of trustee**
- Element: `ssmt_TypeOfTrustee`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to type of trustee/ administrator/ executor if the shares held by decesed/ bankrupt/ under age shareholder or member.

**Types of company**
- Element: `ssmt-dei_TypeOfCompany`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the type of company as at the financial year end.

**Types of contracts [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfContractsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of contracts with customers. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of contracts' axis if no other member is used.

**Types of customers [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfCustomersAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of customers [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfCustomersMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of customers. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of customers' axis if no other member is used.

**Types of financial assets [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfFinancialAssetsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of financial liabilities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfFinancialLiabilitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of hedges [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfHedgesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of instrument [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfInstrumentMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of financial instruments. It also represents the standard value for the 'Continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets by type of instrument' axis if no other member is used.

**Types of insurance contracts [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfInsuranceContractsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of insurance contracts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_InsuranceContractsMember`
- Description: This member stands for contracts under which one party (the insurer) accepts significant insurance risk from another party (the policyholder) by agreeing to compensate the policyholder if a specified uncertain future event (the insured event) adversely affects the policyholder. It also represents the standard value for the 'Types of insurance contracts' axis if no other member is used.

**Types of interest rates [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfInterestRatesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of investment property [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfInvestmentPropertyAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of rate-regulated activities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfRateregulatedActivitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of risks [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfRisksAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of risks [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TypesOfRisksAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of share-based payment arrangements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfSharebasedPaymentArrangementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of share-based payment arrangements [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_TypesOfSharebasedPaymentArrangementsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the domain members or categories in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Types of transfer [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_TypesOfTransferMember`
- Description: This member stands for all types of transfers of financial instruments. It also represents the standard value for the 'Continuing involvement in derecognised financial assets by type of transfer' axis if no other member is used.

**UMTS licences [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UMTSLicencesMember`
- Description: This member stands for Universal Mobile Telecommunications System licenses. [Refer: Licences and franchises]

**Unallocated amounts [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnallocatedAmountsMember`
- Description: This member stands for items that have not been allocated to operating segments.

**Unallocated goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnallocatedGoodwill`
- Description: The amount of goodwill acquired in a business combination that has not been allocated to a cash-generating unit (group of units). [Refer: Goodwill; Cash-generating units [member]; Business combinations [member]]

**Unappropriated profit brought forward**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_UnappropriatedProfitBroughtForward`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of unappropriated profit reported as closing balances during last reporting period.

**Unappropriated profit brought forward**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnappropriatedProfitBroughtForward`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of unappropriated profit brought forward during the reporting date.

**Unappropriated profit carried forward**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_UnappropriatedProfitCarriedForward`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting period, of unappropriated profit at the end of the period.

**Unappropriated profit carried forward**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnappropriatedProfitCarriedForward`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to amount of unappropriated profit carried forward during the reporting date.

**Unconsolidated structured entities [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedStructuredEntitiesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Unconsolidated structured entities [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedStructuredEntitiesMember`
- Description: This member stands for unconsolidated structured entities. A structured entity is an entity that has been designed so that voting or similar rights are not the dominant factor in deciding who controls the entity, such as when any voting rights relate to administrative tasks only and the relevant activities are directed by means of contractual arrangements. [Refer: Consolidated [member]]

**Unconsolidated structured entities controlled by investment entity [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedStructuredEntitiesControlledByInvestmentEntityAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Unconsolidated structured entities controlled by investment entity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedStructuredEntitiesControlledByInvestmentEntityMember`
- Description: This member stands for unconsolidated structured entities controlled by an investment entity. It also represents the standard value for the 'Unconsolidated structured entities controlled by investment entity' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]; Unconsolidated structured entities [member]]

**Unconsolidated subsidiaries [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedSubsidiariesAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Unconsolidated subsidiaries [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedSubsidiariesMember`
- Description: This member stands for unconsolidated subsidiaries. [Refer: Subsidiaries [member]]

**Unconsolidated subsidiaries controlled by subsidiaries of investment entity [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedSubsidiariesControlledBySubsidiariesOfInvestmentEntityMember`
- Description: This member stands for unconsolidated subsidiaries controlled by subsidiaries of the investment entity. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Unconsolidated subsidiaries that investment entity controls directly [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnconsolidatedSubsidiariesThatInvestmentEntityControlsDirectlyMember`
- Description: This member stands for unconsolidated subsidiaries that the investment entity controls directly. [Refer: Disclosure of investment entities [text block]; Subsidiaries [member]]

**Undated subordinated liabilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndatedSubordinatedLiabilities`
- Description: The amount of subordinated liabilities that do not have a specified repayment date. [Refer: Subordinated liabilities]

**Underlying equity instrument [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnderlyingEquityInstrumentMember`
- Description: This member represents the standard value for the ‘Underlying equity instrument and depositary receipts’ axis if no other member is used.

**Underlying equity instrument and depositary receipts [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnderlyingEquityInstrumentAndDepositaryReceiptsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Undiscounted cash outflow required to repurchase derecognised financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndiscountedCashOutflowRequiredToRepurchaseDerecognisedFinancialAssets`
- Description: The undiscounted cash outflows that would, or may be, required to repurchase derecognised financial assets (for example, the strike price in an option agreement). [Refer: Financial assets]

**Undiscounted expected credit losses at initial recognition on purchased or originated credit-impaired financial assets initially recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndiscountedExpectedCreditLossesAtInitialRecognitionOnPurchasedOrOriginatedCreditimpairedFinancialAssetsInitiallyRecognised`
- Description: The amount of undiscounted expected credit losses at initial recognition on financial assets initially recognised during the reporting period as purchased or originated credit-impaired.

**Undiscounted finance lease payments to be received**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndiscountedFinanceLeasePaymentsToBeReceived`
- Description: The amount of undiscounted finance lease payments to be received. Finance lease is a lease that transfers substantially all the risks and rewards incidental to ownership of an underlying asset.

**Undiscounted operating lease payments to be received**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndiscountedOperatingLeasePaymentsToBeReceived`
- Description: The amount of undiscounted operating lease payments to be received. Operating lease is a lease that does not transfer substantially all the risks and rewards incidental to ownership of an underlying asset.

**Undrawn borrowing facilities**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UndrawnBorrowingFacilities`
- Description: The amount of undrawn borrowing facilities that may be available for future operating activities and to settle capital commitments. [Refer: Capital commitments]

**Unearned finance income on finance lease**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UnearnedFinanceIncomeOnFinanceLease`
- Description: The difference for a finance lease between: (a) the gross investment in the lease, and (b) the net investment in the lease. The gross investment in the lease is the aggregate of: (a) the minimum lease payments receivable by the lessor under a finance lease; and (b) any unguaranteed residual value accruing to the lessor. The net investment in the lease is the gross investment in the lease discounted at the interest rate implicit in the lease. [Refer: Finance income]

**Unearned finance income relating to finance lease payments receivable**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnearnedFinanceIncomeRelatingToFinanceLeasePaymentsReceivable`
- Description: The amount of unearned finance income relating to the finance lease payments receivable. Finance lease is a lease that transfers substantially all the risks and rewards incidental to ownership of an underlying asset. [Refer: Finance income]

**Unearned premiums**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnearnedPremiums`
- Description: The amount of liability for written premiums on insurance contracts that have not yet been earned. [Refer: Types of insurance contracts [member]]

**Unique identifier number of foreign subsidiary**
- Element: `ssmt_UniqueIdentifierNumberOfForeignSubsidiary`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to unique identifier number of foreign subsidiary incorporated outside Malaysia.

**Unit**
- Element: `ssmt_UnitLocationOfImmovablePropertyInMalaysia`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the unit location of immovable property sitiuated in Malaysia by foreign company.

**Unobservable inputs [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnobservableInputsAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Unobservable inputs [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnobservableInputsMember`
- Description: This member stands for all the unobservable inputs. It also represents the standard value for the 'Unobservable inputs' axis if no other member is used.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentsInAssociatesUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentsInJointVentureUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_InvestmentsInSubsidiariesUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentsInAssociatesUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentsInJointVentureUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentsInSubsidiariesUnquotedSharesNetOfImpairmentLosses`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

**Unrated credit exposures**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnratedCreditExposures`
- Description: The amount of credit exposure that has not been rated by external rating agencies. [Refer: Credit exposure]

**Unrealised foreign exchange gains (losses) [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnrealisedForeignExchangeGainsLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for gains (losses) resulting from changes in foreign exchange rates which have not yet been realised.

**Unrealised gain on foreign exchange**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnrealisedGainOnForeignExchange`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of unrealized gain on foreign exchange for which an entity shall recognise, in profit or loss in the period in which they arise, exchange differences arising on the settlement of monetary items or on translating monetary items at rates different from those at which they were translated on initial recognition during the period or in previous periods.

**Unrealised profit on transactions with joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_InvestmentsInJointVentureUnrealisedProfitOnTransactionsWithJointVentures`
- Description: Represents the amount representing unrealised profit on transactions with joint ventures included under investments in joint venture.

**Unrealised retailed earnings of Company and subsidiaries**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnrealisedRetailedEarningsOfCompanyAndSubsidiaries`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the total retained earnings unrealised for the reporting entity and its subsidiaries.

**Unrealised retained earnings of associates**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnrealisedRetailedEarningsOfAssociates`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the total retained earnings unrealised for the associates.

**Unrealised retained earnings of joint ventures**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnrealisedRetailedEarningsOfJointVentures`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the total retained earnings unrealised for the joint ventures.

**Unrecognised share of losses of associates**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnrecognisedShareOfLossesOfAssociates`
- Description: The amount of the unrecognised share of associates' losses if the entity has stopped recognising its share of losses when applying the equity method. [Refer: Associates [member]]

**Unrecognised share of losses of joint ventures**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnrecognisedShareOfLossesOfJointVentures`
- Description: The amount of the unrecognised share of joint ventures' losses if the entity has stopped recognising its share of losses when applying the equity method. [Refer: Joint ventures [member]]

**Unsecured bank loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentUnsecuredBankLoansReceivedAndCurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current unsecured bank loans.

**Unsecured bank loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the non-current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans.

**Unsecured bank loans received**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured bank loans.

**Unsecured bank overdrafts**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfNoncurrentUnsecuredBankOverdrafts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current unsecured bank overdrafts.

**Unsecured bank overdrafts**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredBankOverdrafts`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of unsecured bank overdrafts not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Unsecured block discounting payables**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredBlockDiscountingPayables`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured block discounting payables.

**Unsecured bonds**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredBonds`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured bonds.

**Unsecured bonds/sukuk/loan stock**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredBondsSukukAndLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Unsecured convertible notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_CurrentPortionOfUnsecuredConvertibleNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the current portion of current unsecured convertible notes.

**Unsecured convertible notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_NoncurrentPortionOfUnsecuredConvertibleNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of the non-current portion of non-current unsecured convertible notes.

**Unsecured convertible notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredConvertibleNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured convertible notes.

**Unsecured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredHirePurchaseAndFinanceLeaseLiabilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured hire purchase and finance lease liabilities.

**Unsecured irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS)**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredIrredeemableConvertibleUnsecuredLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of unsecured Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS).

**Unsecured islamic financing facilities**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredIslamicFinancingFacilities`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured Islamic financing facilities.

**Unsecured islamic medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredIslamicMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured Islamic medium term notes.

**Unsecured loan stocks**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredLoanStocks`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured loan stocks.

**Unsecured medium term notes**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredMediumTermNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured medium term notes.

**Unsecured other unsecured bank loans received**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredOtherBankLoansReceived`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other unsecured bank loans not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

**Unsecured preference shares**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredPreferenceShares`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

**Unsecured revolving credit and others**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredRevolvingCreditAndNotes`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured revolving credits and others.

**Unsecured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredSukuk`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Unsecured sukuk**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredSukukAsPerShariahCommittee`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured sukuk which are certificates of equal value which evidence undivided ownership or investment in the assets using Shariah principles and concepts endorsed by the Shariah Committee.

**Unsecured term loans**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_UnsecuredTermLoans`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of unsecured term loan from a bank for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

**Unused provision reversed, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnusedProvisionReversedOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount reversed for unused other provisions. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Unused provision reversed, other provisions**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UnusedProvisionReversedOtherProvisions`
- Description: The amount reversed for unused other provisions. [Refer: Other provisions]

**Unused tax credits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnusedTaxCreditsMember`
- Description: This member stands for tax credits that have been received and are carried forward for use against future taxable profit.

**Unused tax credits [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UnusedTaxCreditsMember`
- Description: This member stands for tax credits that have been received and are carried forward for use against future taxable profit.

**Unused tax credits for which no deferred tax asset recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnusedTaxCreditsForWhichNoDeferredTaxAssetRecognised`
- Description: The amount of unused tax credits for which no deferred tax asset is recognised in the statement of financial position. [Refer: Unused tax credits [member]]

**Unused tax losses [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnusedTaxLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for tax losses that have been incurred and are carried forward for use against future taxable profit.

**Unused tax losses [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UnusedTaxLossesMember`
- Description: This member stands for tax losses that have been incurred and are carried forward for use against future taxable profit.

**Unused tax losses for which no deferred tax asset recognised**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UnusedTaxLossesForWhichNoDeferredTaxAssetRecognised`
- Description: The amount of unused tax losses for which no deferred tax asset is recognised in the statement of financial position. [Refer: Unused tax losses [member]]

**Useful life measured as period of time, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredAsPeriodOfTimeBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The useful life, measured as period of time, used for biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Useful life measured as period of time, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredAsPeriodOfTimeIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The useful life, measured as period of time, used for intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Useful life measured as period of time, investment property, cost model**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredAsPeriodOfTimeInvestmentPropertyCostModel`
- Description: The useful life, measured as period of time, used for investment property. [Refer: Investment property]

**Useful life measured as period of time, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredAsPeriodOfTimePropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The useful life, measured as period of time, used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Useful life measured in production or other similar units, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredInProductionOrOtherSimilarUnitsBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The useful life, measured in production or other similar units, used for biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Useful life measured in production or other similar units, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredInProductionOrOtherSimilarUnitsIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The useful life, measured in production or other similar units, used for intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Useful life measured in production or other similar units, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UsefulLifeMeasuredInProductionOrOtherSimilarUnitsPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The useful life, measured in production or other similar units, used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Useful lives or amortisation rates, intangible assets other than goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UsefulLivesOrAmortisationRatesIntangibleAssetsOtherThanGoodwill`
- Description: The useful lives or amortisation rates used for intangible assets other than goodwill. [Refer: Intangible assets other than goodwill]

**Useful lives or depreciation rates, biological assets, at cost**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UsefulLivesOrDepreciationRatesBiologicalAssetsAtCost`
- Description: The useful lives or depreciation rates used for biological assets. [Refer: Biological assets]

**Useful lives or depreciation rates, investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UsefulLivesOrDepreciationRatesInvestmentPropertyAtCostLessAccumulatedDepreciationAndImpairment`
- Description: The useful lives or depreciation rates used for investment property at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment. [Refer: Investment property [member]]

**Useful lives or depreciation rates, property, plant and equipment**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UsefulLivesOrDepreciationRatesPropertyPlantAndEquipment`
- Description: The useful lives or depreciation rates used for property, plant and equipment. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Useful lives, goodwill**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_UsefulLivesGoodwill`
- Description: The useful lives used for goodwill. [Refer: Goodwill]

**Utilisation, allowance account for credit losses of financial assets**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UtilisationAllowanceAccountForCreditLossesOfFinancialAssets`
- Description: The decrease in an allowance account for credit losses of financial assets resulting from the utilisation of the allowance. [Refer: Allowance account for credit losses of financial assets]

**Utilities expense**
- Element: `ifrs-full_UtilitiesExpense`
- Description: The amount of expense arising from purchased utilities.

**Valuation techniques [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValuationTechniquesMember`
- Description: This member stands for valuation techniques used by the entity to measure fair value. It also represents the standard value for the 'Valuation techniques used in fair value measurement' axis if no other member is used. [Refer: At fair value [member]]

**Valuation techniques used in fair value measurement [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValuationTechniquesUsedInFairValueMeasurementAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Value added tax payables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValueAddedTaxPayables`
- Description: The amount of payables related to a value added tax.

**Value added tax receivables**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValueAddedTaxReceivables`
- Description: The amount of receivables related to a value added tax.

**Value at risk**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValueAtRisk`
- Description: The measure of a potential loss exposure as a result of future market movements, based on a specified confidence interval and measurement horizon.

**Value of business acquired [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_ValueOfBusinessAcquiredMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of intangible assets representing the difference between (a) the fair value of the contractual insurance rights acquired and the insurance obligations assumed in a business combination; and (b) the amount of liability measured in accordance with the insurer’s accounting policies for insurance contracts that it issues. [Refer: Business combinations [member]]

**Vehicles**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_Vehicles`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of vehicles which refer vehicles of any description, propelled by means of mechanism contained within itself and constructed or adapted so as to be capable of being used on roads, and includes a trailer.

**Vehicles [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_VehiclesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing vehicles used in the entity's operations, specifically to include aircraft, motor vehicles and ships. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Vehicles [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_VehiclesMember`
- Description: This member stands for a class of property, plant and equipment representing vehicles used in the entity's operations. [Refer: Property, plant and equipment]

**Vessels**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_Vessels`
- Description: Represents the amount of property, plant and equipment representing vessels used in the entity's operations.

**Voluntary changes in accounting policy [axis]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_VoluntaryChangesInAccountingPolicyAxis`
- Description: The axis of a table defines the relationship between the members in the table and the line items or concepts that complete the table.

**Voluntary changes in accounting policy [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_VoluntaryChangesInAccountingPolicyMember`
- Description: This member stands for changes in accounting policy that result in the financial statements providing reliable and more relevant information about the effects of transactions, other events or conditions on the entity’s financial position, financial performance or cash flows. Early application of an IFRS is not considered a voluntary change in accounting policy. It also represents the standard value for the 'Voluntary changes in accounting policy' axis if no other member is used.

**Wages and salaries**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_WagesAndSalaries`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of wages, salaries, paid annual leave and sick leave, bonuses and non-monetary benefits which are accrued in the period in which the services are rendered by employees.

**Warrant liability**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WarrantLiability`
- Description: The amount of warrant liabilities.

**Warranty contingent liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WarrantyContingentLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a contingent liability for estimated costs of making good under warranties for products sold. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Warranty contingent liability [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_WarrantyContingentLiabilityMember`
- Description: This member stands for a contingent liability for estimated costs of making good under warranties for products sold. [Refer: Contingent liabilities [member]]

**Warranty provision**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_WarrantyProvision`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

**Warranty provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WarrantyProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for estimated costs of making good under warranties for products sold. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Warranty provision [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-smes_WarrantyProvisionMember`
- Description: This member stands for a provision for estimated costs of making good under warranties for products sold. [Refer: Other provisions [member]]

**Warranty reserve**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_WarrantyReserve`
- Description: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

**Warranty reserve [member]**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_WarrantyReserveMember`
- Description: This member stands for a component of equity representing the legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

**Water and electricity expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mpers_WaterAndElectricityExpenses`
- Description: Represents the amount of expenses related to water and electricity expenses.

**Water and electricity expenses**
- Element: `ssmt-mfrs_WaterAndElectricityExpenses`
- Description: Report the value, for the reporting period, of water and electricity expenses.

**Website**
- Element: `ssmt_Website`
- Description: Represents information pertaining to the website of branches places of the entity.

**Weighted average [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WeightedAverageMember`
- Description: This member stands for an average in which each quantity to be averaged is assigned a weight that determines the relative effect of each quantity on the average.

**Weighted average cost of capital, measurement input [member]**
- Element: `ifrs-full_WeightedAverageCostOfCapitalMeasurementInputMember`
